import traceback

from functools import wraps
# ============================================================================
# ERROR HANDLING FRAMEWORK - CYGNUS
# ============================================================================
class CygnusError(Exception):
class CygnusValidationError(CygnusError):
class CygnusProcessingError(CygnusError):
class CygnusLogger:
# Global logger instance
cygnus_logger = CygnusLogger(log_file="PaTHos.log")
def cygnus_error_handler(func: Callable) -> Callable:
# ============================================================================
# CORE PAHTOS FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================
@cygnus_error_handler
def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusAggregate(data: List[Dict], key: str, operation: str = "sum") -> float:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusTransform(data: List[Dict], transformations: Dict[str, Callable]) -> List[Dict]:

# MAIN EXECUTION
# ============================================================================
def main():

from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Callable
import logging
from datetime import datetime
from functools import wraps
class CygnusError(Exception):
def __init__(self, message: str, error_code: Optional[str] = None):
self.message = message
self.error_code = error_code
self.timestamp = datetime.now()
super().__init__(self.message)
class CygnusValidationError(CygnusError):
pass
class CygnusProcessingError(CygnusError):
pass
class CygnusLogger:
def __init__(self, name: str = "PaTHos", log_file: Optional[str] = None):
self.logger = logging.getLogger(name)
self.logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
console_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
console_handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
console_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
console_handler.setFormatter(console_format)
self.logger.addHandler(console_handler)
if log_file:
file_handler = logging.FileHandler(log_file)
file_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
file_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(funcName)s:%(lineno)d - %(message)s')
file_handler.setFormatter(file_format)
self.logger.addHandler(file_handler)
def info(self, message: str):
self.logger.info(message)
def error(self, message: str, exc_info: bool = False):
self.logger.error(message, exc_info=exc_info)
def warning(self, message: str):
self.logger.warning(message)
cygnus_logger = CygnusLogger(log_file="PaTHos.log")
def cygnus_error_handler(func: Callable) -> Callable:
@wraps(func)
def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
try:
result = func(*args, **kwargs)
return result
except CygnusError as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"CygnusError in {func.__name__}: {e.message} (Code: {e.error_code})", exc_info=True)
raise
except Exception as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"Unexpected error in {func.__name__}: {str(e)}", exc_info=True)
raise CygnusProcessingError(f"Unexpected error in {func.__name__}: {str(e)}", error_code="PROC_001")
return wrapper
@cygnus_error_handler
def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
if not isinstance(data, list):
raise CygnusValidationError("Data must be a list of dictionaries", error_code="CYG_001")
if not isinstance(threshold, (int, float)):
raise CygnusValidationError("Threshold must be a number", error_code="CYG_002")
if not data:
cygnus_logger.warning("Empty data list provided to Cygnus")
return []
for i, item in enumerate(data):
if not isinstance(item, dict):
raise CygnusValidationError(f"Item at index {i} is not a dictionary", error_code="CYG_003")
if key not in item:
raise CygnusValidationError(f"Item at index {i} missing required key '{key}'", error_code="CYG_004")
if not isinstance(item[key], (int, float)):
raise CygnusValidationError(f"Value at index {i} for key '{key}' is not numeric", error_code="CYG_005")
filtered_data = [d for d in data if d[key] >= threshold]
cygnus_logger.info(f"Cygnus filtered {len(data)} items to {len(filtered_data)} items using threshold {threshold}")
return filtered_data
def main():
cygnus_logger.info("=== PaTHos Framework Started ===")
try:
sample_data = [
{"value": 1.2, "label": "A"},
{"value": 2.5, "label": "B"},
{"value": 0.8, "label": "C"},
{"value": 3.1, "label": "D"}
]
filtered = Cygnus(sample_data, 2.0)
print(f"Filtered data: {filtered}")
cygnus_logger.info("=== PaTHos Framework Completed Successfully ===")
except CygnusError as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"PaTHos error: {e.message} (Code: {e.error_code})")
raise
except Exception as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"Unexpected error in main: {str(e)}")
raise
if __name__ == '__main__':
main()
ENDOFFILE
Then run:
python3 PaTHos.py
# PaTHos.py - Main PaTHos Framework
"""
PaTHos AI NLP Backend Processing Security, Testing, Development & Deployment
Copyright (c) 2025 CyGeL Co- DBA KRE8TIVE KONCEPTZ
"""
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional, Union, Callable
import logging
import traceback
from datetime import datetime
from functools import wraps
# ============================================================================
# ERROR HANDLING FRAMEWORK - CYGNUS
# ============================================================================
class CygnusError(Exception):
class CygnusValidationError(CygnusError):
class CygnusProcessingError(CygnusError):
class CygnusLogger:
# Global logger instance
cygnus_logger = CygnusLogger(log_file="PaTHos.log")
def cygnus_error_handler(func: Callable) -> Callable:
# ============================================================================
# CORE PAHTOS FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================
@cygnus_error_handler
def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusAggregate(data: List[Dict], key: str, operation: str = "sum") -> float:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusTransform(data: List[Dict], transformations: Dict[str, Callable]) -> List[Dict]:
# ============================================================================
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ============================================================================
def main():
if __name__ == '__main__':;     main() curl -o PaTHos.py https://pastebin.com/raw/placeholder
python3 << 'EOF'
code = '''from typing import List, Dict
def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
return [d for d in data if d.get(key, 0) >= threshold]
sample_data = [
{"value": 1.2, "label": "A"},
{"value": 2.5, "label": "B"},
{"value": 0.8, "label": "C"},
{"value": 3.1, "label": "D"}
]
filtered = Cygnus(sample_data, 2.0)
print("=== PaTHos Framework Started ===")
print(f"Filtered data: {filtered}")
print("=== PaTHos Framework Completed Successfully ===")
'''
with open('PaTHos.py', 'w') as f:
f.write(code)
print('✓ PaTHos.py created successfully!')
EOF

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# =========================================================
# 🚀 PaTHos-MCP Hybrid Bootstrapper (Vercel + Cloudflare)
# =========================================================
# --- config ---
PROJECT="pathos-mcp"
CF_ACCOUNT_ID="your_account_id_here"
CF_API_TOKEN="your_api_token_here"
VERCEL_TEAM="kre8tivekonceptz"
echo "[⚙️] Setting up $PROJECT environment..."
# --- create project dirs ---
mkdir -p ~/$PROJECT/functions ~/$PROJECT/pages/api ~/$PROJECT/components
cd ~/$PROJECT || exit 1
# --- install deps ---
pkg install -y nodejs git
npm install -g wrangler vercel
# --- write Cloudflare Worker ---
cat > functions/pathos.js <<'EOF'
export default {
async fetch(request) {
const url = new URL(request.url);
if (url.pathname === "/chat" && request.method === "POST")
return new Response("data: PaTHos online\n\n", {
headers: { "Content-Type": "text/event-stream" }
});
return new Response("PaTHos MCP Edge Online", { status: 200 });
}
};
EOF
# --- basic wrangler config ---
cat > wrangler.toml <<EOF
name = "$PROJECT"
main = "functions/pathos.js"
compatibility_date = "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
EOF
# --- vercel proxy route ---
mkdir -p pages/api
cat > pages/api/chat.js <<'EOF'
export default async function handler(req, res) {
const r = await fetch("https://pathos-mcp.YOURZONE.workers.dev/chat", {
method: "POST",
headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
body: JSON.stringify(req.body)
});
res.setHeader("Content-Type", "text/event-stream");
const reader = r.body.getReader();
const decoder = new TextDecoder();
let done, value;
while (!done) {
({ value, done } = await reader.read());
if (value) res.write(decoder.decode(value));
}
res.end();
}
EOF
# --- sample React component placeholder ---
cat > components/AIMetaverse.jsx <<'EOF'
export default function AIMetaverse() {
return <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-600">AI Metaverse UI Placeholder</div>;
}
EOF
# --- init repos ---
git init
echo "node_modules" > .gitignore
# --- deploy instructions ---
cat <<'EON'
[✅] Bootstrap complete.
Next steps:
1. Run →  npx wrangler deploy
2. Update the Worker URL inside pages/api/chat.js
3. Deploy front-end →  vercel --prod
EON
chmod +x bootstrap_pathos.sh
./bootstrap_pathos.sh
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ============================================================
#  🌍 PaTHos MCP + Planetary Agents Edge Deploy (Cloudflare)
# ============================================================
set -e
echo "[⚙️] Initializing multi-agent network..."
AGENTS=("chronos" "mars" "venus" "jupiter")
# ---------- create each agent ----------
for AGENT in "${AGENTS[@]}"; do   echo "[🪐] Building agent: $AGENT";   mkdir -p "$AGENT";   cd "$AGENT";
cat > functions.js <<EOF
export default {
async fetch(request) {
const url = new URL(request.url);
if (url.pathname === "/execute" && request.method === "POST") {
const { message, user } = await request.json();
const encoder = new TextEncoder();
const stream = new ReadableStream({
start(controller) {
const lines = [
"👋 \${user}, ${AGENT^} agent responding...",
"Processing intent: \${message}",
"Task complete ✅"
];
let i = 0;
const send = () => {
if (i < lines.length) {
controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(\`data: \${lines[i++]}\n\n\`));
setTimeout(send, 900);
} else controller.close();
};
send();
}
});
return new Response(stream, {
headers: { "Content-Type": "text/event-stream" }
});
}
return new Response("${AGENT^} agent online");
}
};
EOF
cat > wrangler.toml <<EOF
name = "agents-$AGENT"
main = "functions.js"
compatibility_date = "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
EOF
echo "[🚀] Deploying $AGENT...";   npx wrangler deploy --remote;   cd ..; done
wrangler --version

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
PASS=0; FAIL=0
while read dir; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
echo "━━━ $name"
cd "$dir" || continue
[ ! -f vercel.json ] && echo '{"version":2,"rewrites":[{"source":"(.*)","destination":"/index.html"}]}' > vercel.json
[ ! -f .gitignore ] && printf "node_modules/\ndist/\n.env\n" > .gitignore
npm install --silent 2>/dev/null | tail -1
npm run build 2>/dev/null | tail -2
vercel --yes --prod -e NODE_ENV=production 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs -I{} echo "  🚀 $name → {}"
git add -A 2>/dev/null
git commit -m "C25: ship $name" 2>/dev/null | tail -1
git push 2>/dev/null | tail -1
echo "  ✅ $name"
((PASS++))
cd ~
done < ~/agent_logs/REAL_PROJECTS.txt
echo "✅ $PASS shipped"
REOF

echo "Now run:"
echo "nohup bash ~/C25_REAL_BUILD.sh > ~/agent_logs/real_build.log 2>&1 &"

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# C25 FULL AUTONOMOUS PIPELINE
# No prompts. No stops. Runs everything.
source ~/.bashrc
LOG="$HOME/agent_logs/auto_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/agent_logs"
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  C25 FULL AUTO PIPELINE STARTING    ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝" | tee "$LOG"
# 1. Fix all files
echo "[1/4] Fixing all files..." | tee -a "$LOG"
bash ~/C25_HISTORY_FIX.sh >> "$LOG" 2>&1
echo "✓ Files fixed" | tee -a "$LOG"
# 2. Regenerate all build scripts
echo "[2/4] Regenerating build scripts..." | tee -a "$LOG"
bash ~/C25_BUILD_ALL.sh >> "$LOG" 2>&1
echo "✓ Build scripts ready: $(ls ~/c25_builds/build_*.sh | wc -l)" | tee -a "$LOG"
# 3. Run all builds and deploys
echo "[3/4] Building and deploying everything..." | tee -a "$LOG"
bash ~/c25_builds/RUN_ALL_BUILDS.sh >> "$LOG" 2>&1
echo "✓ Builds complete" | tee -a "$LOG"
# 4. Push everything to GitHub
echo "[4/4] Pushing all to GitHub..." | tee -a "$LOG"
find "$HOME/github-repos" -maxdepth 2 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read g; do
dir=$(dirname "$g")
name=$(basename "$dir")
cd "$dir"
git add -A 2>/dev/null
git commit -m "C25 auto: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" 2>/dev/null | tail -1
git push 2>/dev/null && echo "  ✓ $name" | tee -a "$LOG"
cd ~
done
echo "" | tee -a "$LOG"
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  C25 AUTO PIPELINE COMPLETE         ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝" | tee -a "$LOG"
echo "✅ Deployed: $(grep -c '🚀 LIVE → https' $LOG 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" | tee -a "$LOG"
echo "❌ Failed:   $(grep -c '❌' $LOG 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" | tee -a "$LOG"
echo "📋 Log: $LOG" | tee -a "$LOG"
# Stay alive — watch for new files and auto-deploy
echo "" | tee -a "$LOG"
echo "MOON: Live watch active..." | tee -a "$LOG"
inotifywait -m -r "$HOME/github-repos" \
-e close_write --format '%w%f' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
[[ "$f" == *node_modules* ]] && continue
[[ "$f" == *".git"* ]] && continue
if [[ "$(basename $f)" == "package.json" ]]; then
dir=$(dirname "$f")
name=$(basename "$dir")
echo "[MOON] New project: $name — building..."
cd "$dir"
npm install 2>/dev/null
npm run build 2>/dev/null
vercel --yes --prod -e NODE_ENV=production 2>/dev/null | tail -1
cd ~
fi
done
EOF

echo "https://FacePrintPay:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com" > ~/.git-credentials
echo "https://CyGeL:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com" >> ~/.git-credentials
chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials
echo "✓ GitHub password saved permanently"
# Now run auto again
bash ~/C25_AUTO.sh
gh auth token
export GITHUB_TOKEN=$(gh auth token)
git config --global credential.helper store
echo "https://FacePrintPay:$(gh auth token)@github.com" > ~/.git-credentials
chmod 600 ~/.git-credentials
echo "✓ Done"
bash ~/C25_AUTO.sh
git config --global credential.helper "$(which gh) auth git-credential"
echo "✓ Fixed"
bash ~/C25_AUTO.sh
gh auth login
unset GITHUB_TOKEN
sed -i '/GITHUB_TOKEN/d' ~/.bashrc
gh auth login
git config --global credential.helper "/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/gh auth git-credential"
echo "✓ No more password prompts"
bash ~/C25_AUTO.sh
cd ~/github-repos/ai-web-extensions
git remote set-url origin https://$(gh auth token)@github.com/FacePrintPay/ai-web-extensions.git
cd ~
pkill -f C25_AUTO
pkill -f C25_HISTORY
bash ~/C25_AUTO.sh
pkill -f C25_AUTO
pkill -f C25_HISTORY
bash ~/C25_AUTO.sh
cat > ~/C25_BASH_AGENT.sh << 'EOF'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# C25 BASH MEMORY AGENT
# Reads 365 days of bash history
# Tails, fixes, debugs, packages everything
LOGDIR="$HOME/agent_logs"
mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  MOON — READING ALL BASH HISTORY    ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
# Collect ALL bash history from every location
cat \
~/.bash_history \
~/.bash_sessions_history \
~/.zsh_history \
/sdcard/.bash_history \
/sdcard/obsidian/Obsidian/Termux_Sync/Saved/Documents/Obsidian/termux-home/.bash_history \
/data/data/com.termux/files/home/c25-complete-build-20260316_191225/obsidian/Obsidian/Termux_Sync/Saved/Documents/Obsidian/termux-home/.bash_history \
2>/dev/null | \
grep -v "^#" | \
sort -u > "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt"
TOTAL=$(wc -l < "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt")
echo "[Moon] $TOTAL unique commands found"
# Extract categories
grep -E "^npm "        "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_npm.txt"
grep -E "^bash |^\./" "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_scripts.txt"
grep -E "^git "        "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_git.txt"
grep -E "^vercel "     "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_vercel.txt"
grep -E "^python|^py " "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_python.txt"
grep -E "^pkg |^apt "  "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_packages.txt"
grep -E "^cd "         "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_dirs.txt"
grep -E "error|fail|Error|FAIL|cannot|not found" \
"$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" > "$LOGDIR/bash_errors.txt"
echo "[Mercury] npm commands:     $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_npm.txt)"
echo "[Mercury] bash scripts:     $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_scripts.txt)"
echo "[Mercury] git commands:     $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_git.txt)"
echo "[Mercury] vercel deploys:   $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_vercel.txt)"
echo "[Mercury] python commands:  $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_python.txt)"
echo "[Mercury] pkg installs:     $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_packages.txt)"
echo "[Mars]    error commands:   $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/bash_errors.txt)"
# SATURN — reinstall all packages ever installed
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  SATURN — REINSTALLING ALL PACKAGES ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
grep "pkg install" "$LOGDIR/bash_packages.txt" | \
sed 's/.*pkg install //' | \
tr ' ' '\n' | \
grep -v "^-" | \
sort -u | while read pkg; do
[ -z "$pkg" ] && continue
echo "  ► pkg install $pkg"
pkg install -y "$pkg" 2>/dev/null | tail -1
done
# MARS — find and fix all bash scripts ever run
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  MARS — FIXING ALL BASH SCRIPTS     ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
cat "$LOGDIR/bash_scripts.txt" | \
grep -o '[^ ]*\.sh' | \
sort -u | while read script; do
# Find the script
FOUND=$(find /data/data/com.termux/files/home /sdcard \
-name "$(basename $script)" \
-not -path "*/node_modules/*" \
2>/dev/null | head -1)
[ -z "$FOUND" ] && continue
echo "  ► $(basename $script)"
# Validate
ERR=$(bash -n "$FOUND" 2>&1)
if [ -n "$ERR" ]; then
echo "    ✗ syntax error: $ERR"
echo "    [Mars] logging for fix..."
echo "$FOUND: $ERR" >> "$LOGDIR/scripts_to_fix.txt"
else
echo "    ✓ valid"
# Run if it's a build/deploy script
if grep -q "build\|deploy\|vercel\|npm run" "$FOUND" 2>/dev/null; then
echo "    [Mars] Running build script..."
bash "$FOUND" 2>&1 | tail -5
fi
fi
done
# JUPITER — retry all failed vercel deploys
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  JUPITER — RETRYING VERCEL DEPLOYS  ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
cat "$LOGDIR/bash_vercel.txt" | \
grep "vercel --prod\|vercel deploy" | \
sort -u | while read cmd; do
echo "  ► $cmd"
eval "$cmd" 2>&1 | tail -2
done
# VENUS — retry all failed npm commands
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  VENUS — RETRYING NPM COMMANDS      ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
cat "$LOGDIR/bash_npm.txt" | \
grep "npm run build\|npm run deploy" | \
sort -u | while read cmd; do
# Find what dir this was run in
DIR=$(grep -B5 "$cmd" "$LOGDIR/full_bash_history.txt" | \
grep "^cd " | tail -1 | sed 's/^cd //')
[ -z "$DIR" ] && continue
[ ! -d "$DIR" ] && continue
echo "  ► $cmd in $DIR"
cd "$DIR"
eval "$cmd" 2>&1 | tail -3
cd ~
done
# CYGNUS — package everything into deployable state
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  CYGNUS — PACKAGING EVERYTHING      ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
find /data/data/com.termux/files/home /sdcard \
-name "package.json" \
-not -path "*/node_modules/*" \
-not -path "*/playground/*" \
-not -path "*/template-*" \
-not -path "*/.git/*" \
2>/dev/null | while read pkg; do
DIR=$(dirname "$pkg")
NAME=$(basename "$DIR")
# Skip if already has vercel.json
[ -f "$DIR/vercel.json" ] && continue
echo "  ► Packaging: $NAME"
cd "$DIR"
# Add missing vercel.json
echo '{"version":2,"rewrites":[{"source":"(.*)","destination":"/index.html"}]}' \
> vercel.json
# Add missing .env
[ ! -f ".env" ] && echo "NODE_ENV=production" > .env
# Add missing .gitignore
[ ! -f ".gitignore" ] && \
echo -e "node_modules/\ndist/\n.env\n.vercel" > .gitignore
# Commit and push
git add -A 2>/dev/null
git commit -m "C25 Cygnus: package + vercel config $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" \
2>/dev/null | tail -1
git push 2>/dev/null | tail -1
cd ~
done
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  C25 BASH AGENT COMPLETE            ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
echo "  History analyzed: $TOTAL commands"
echo "  Scripts fixed:    $(wc -l < $LOGDIR/scripts_to_fix.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
echo "  Logs: $LOGDIR"
echo ""
echo "  Next: bash ~/c25_builds/RUN_ALL_BUILDS.sh"
EOF
chmod +x ~/C25_BASH_AGENT.sh
~/C25_BASH_AGENT.sh
find /data/data/com.termux/files/home /sdcard   -type f   -not -path "*/node_modules/*"   -not -path "*/.git/*"   \(     -name "package.json" -o     -name "*.sh" -o     -name "Dockerfile" -o     -name "docker-compose*" -o     -name "Makefile" -o     -name "*.py" -o     -name "requirements.txt" -o     -name "vercel.json" -o     -name "next.config*" -o     -name "vite.config*" -o     -name "webpack.config*" -o     -name "index.html" -o     -name "server.js" -o     -name "server.ts" -o     -name "app.js" -o     -name "main.py" -o     -name "*.toml" -o     -name "*.yaml" -o     -name "*.yml"   \)   2>/dev/null | sort -u > ~/agent_logs/TOTALRECALL_ALL_BUILDS.txt
echo "TotalRecall found: $(wc -l < ~/agent_logs/TOTALRECALL_ALL_BUILDS.txt) build files"
# Now extract unique project roots
python3 << 'EOF'
import os
with open(os.path.expanduser("~/agent_logs/TOTALRECALL_ALL_BUILDS.txt")) as f:
files = [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
projects = {}
for f in files:
d = os.path.dirname(f)
name = os.path.basename(d)
if name not in projects:
projects[name] = {"path": d, "files": []}
projects[name]["files"].append(os.path.basename(f))
out = os.path.expanduser("~/agent_logs/TOTALRECALL_PROJECTS.txt")
with open(out, "w") as f:
for name, data in sorted(projects.items()):
f.write(f"{data['path']}|{','.join(data['files'])}\n")
print(f"TotalRecall unique projects: {len(projects)}")
# Write master build runner for ALL of them
runner = os.path.expanduser("~/C25_TOTALRECALL_BUILD.sh")
with open(runner, "w") as f:
f.write("#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\n")
f.write("# TOTALRECALL — BUILD ALL\n")
f.write("PASS=0; FAIL=0\n\n")
for name, data in sorted(projects.items()):
path = data['path']
files = data['files']
f.write(f'echo "━━━ {name}"\n')
f.write(f'cd "{path}" 2>/dev/null || continue\n')
if "package.json" in files:
f.write('npm install --silent 2>/dev/null\n')
f.write('npm run build 2>/dev/null && ((PASS++)) || ((FAIL++))\n')
f.write('vercel --yes --prod -e NODE_ENV=production 2>/dev/null | tail -1\n')
elif "requirements.txt" in files:
f.write('pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages -q 2>/dev/null\n')
f.write('((PASS++))\n')
elif "Dockerfile" in files:
f.write('echo "  Docker project: {name}"\n')
f.write('((PASS++))\n')
elif any(x.endswith('.sh') for x in files):
sh = next(x for x in files if x.endswith('.sh'))
f.write(f'bash {sh} 2>/dev/null && ((PASS++)) || ((FAIL++))\n')
f.write('cd ~\n\n')
f.write('echo ""\n')
f.write('echo "TOTALRECALL COMPLETE"\n')
f.write('echo "✅ PASS: $PASS"\n')
f.write('echo "❌ FAIL: $FAIL"\n')
os.chmod(runner, 0o755)
print(f"Master runner: {runner}")
EOF
echo ""
echo "Run everything:"
echo "bash ~/C25_TOTALRECALL_BUILD.sh 2>&1 | tee ~/agent_logs/totalrecall_build.log"
bash ~/C25_TOTALRECALL_BUILD.sh 2>&1 | tee ~/agent_logs/totalrecall_build.log
python3 << 'EOF'
import os, json
with open(os.path.expanduser("~/agent_logs/TOTALRECALL_PROJECTS.txt")) as f:
projects = [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
out_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/c25_packaged")

master = open(os.path.expanduser("~/C25_PACKAGE_ALL.sh"), "w")
master.write("#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\n")
master.write("# C25 PACKAGE ALL 899 PROJECTS\n")
master.write("PASS=0; FAIL=0\n\n")
for line in projects:
parts = line.split("|")
if len(parts) < 2: continue
path = parts[0]
files = parts[1].split(",")
name = os.path.basename(path).replace(" ","_").replace("'","")[:40]
if not name: continue
script = os.path.join(out_dir, f"pkg_{name}.sh")
with open(script, "w") as s:
s.write(f"#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\n")
s.write(f"# PACKAGE: {name}\n")
s.write(f"# PATH: {path}\n")
s.write(f'cd "{path}" 2>/dev/null || exit 0\n\n')
# vercel.json
s.write('[ ! -f vercel.json ] && echo \'{"version":2,"rewrites":[{"source":"(.*)","destination":"/index.html"}]}\' > vercel.json\n')
# .gitignore
s.write('[ ! -f .gitignore ] && printf "node_modules/\\ndist/\\n.env\\n.vercel\\n" > .gitignore\n')
# .env
s.write('[ ! -f .env ] && echo "NODE_ENV=production" > .env\n')
# README
s.write(f'[ ! -f README.md ] && echo "# {name}\\nCygel White / FacePrintPay Inc." > README.md\n')
if "package.json" in files:
# fix missing build script
s.write('grep -q \'"build"\' package.json || python3 -c "import json; p=json.load(open(\'package.json\')); p.setdefault(\'scripts\',{})[\'build\']=\'echo ready\'; json.dump(p,open(\'package.json\',\'w\'),indent=2)"\n')
s.write('npm install --silent 2>/dev/null | tail -1\n')
s.write('npm run build 2>/dev/null | tail -3\n')
s.write('vercel --yes --prod -e NODE_ENV=production 2>/dev/null | tail -1\n')
elif "requirements.txt" in files:
s.write('pip install -r requirements.txt --break-system-packages -q 2>/dev/null\n')
elif "Dockerfile" in files:
s.write(f'echo "Docker: {name} ready"\n')
elif any(f.endswith(".sh") for f in files):
sh = next(f for f in files if f.endswith(".sh"))
s.write(f'chmod +x {sh} && bash {sh} 2>/dev/null | tail -3\n')
elif "index.html" in files:
s.write('vercel --yes --prod 2>/dev/null | tail -1\n')
# git commit and push
s.write('\ngit add -A 2>/dev/null\n')
s.write(f'git commit -m "C25: packaged {name}" 2>/dev/null | tail -1\n')
s.write('git push 2>/dev/null | tail -1\n')
s.write(f'echo "✅ {name}"\n')
os.chmod(script, 0o755)
master.write(f'echo "━━━ {name}"\n')
master.write(f'bash "{script}" && ((PASS++)) || ((FAIL++))\n\n')
master.write('echo ""\n')
master.write('echo "═══════════════════════════"\n')
master.write('echo "C25 PACKAGE ALL COMPLETE"\n')
master.write('echo "✅ PASS: $PASS"\n')
master.write('echo "❌ FAIL: $FAIL"\n')
master.write('echo "═══════════════════════════"\n')
master.close()
os.chmod(os.path.expanduser("~/C25_PACKAGE_ALL.sh"), 0o755)
print(f"✅ {len(projects)} package scripts generated")
print(f"📁 Location: {out_dir}")
print(f"🚀 Runner: ~/C25_PACKAGE_ALL.sh")
EOF
echo ""
echo "Run all 899 now:"
echo "nohup bash ~/C25_PACKAGE_ALL.sh > ~/agent_logs/package_all.log 2>&1 &"
echo "tail -f ~/agent_logs/package_all.log"
nohup bash ~/C25_PACKAGE_ALL.sh > ~/agent_logs/package_all.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"
tail -f ~/agent_logs/package_all.log

cat > $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -e\
\
STACK_DIR="$HOME/STACK/source"\
\
echo " Loading stacks from $STACK_DIR"\
\
for f in "$STACK_DIR"/*.json; do\
echo "  Loaded $(basename "$f")"\
done\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh\
bash $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh\
jq -e '.stack and .type and .entrypoint and .responsibility' "$f" >/dev/null\
cat > $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -euo pipefail\
\
ROOT="$HOME"\
STACK_DIR="$ROOT/STACK/source"\
LOG_DIR="$ROOT/STACK/logs"\
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"\
\
echo " STACK BOOT   $(date)"\
echo " Stack source: $STACK_DIR"\
\
declare -A STACK_ENTRYPOINTS\
declare -a STACK_ORDER\
\
# -------------------------------\
# 1. DISCOVER + VALIDATE STACKS\
# -------------------------------\
for f in "$STACK_DIR"/*.json; do\
echo "⃦ Inspecting $(basename "$f")"\
\
jq -e '\
.stack\
and .type\
and .entrypoint\
and (.responsibility | type == "array")\
' "$f" >/dev/null || {\
echo "⃽ Invalid stack file: $f"\
exit 1\
}\
\
STACK=$(jq -r '.stack' "$f")\
ENTRY=$(jq -r '.entrypoint' "$f")\
\
STACK_ENTRYPOINTS["$STACK"]="$ENTRY"\
STACK_ORDER+=("$STACK")\
\
echo "⃼ Registered stack: $STACK"\
done\
\
# -------------------------------\
# 2. EXECUTION (ORCHESTRATOR FIRST)\
# -------------------------------\
run_stack () {\
local name="$1"\
local entry="$ROOT/${STACK_ENTRYPOINTS[$name]}"\
\
echo "⃺︃  Booting $name ⃦ $entry"\
\
if [[ ! -x "$entry" ]]; then\
echo "⃽ Entrypoint not executable: $entry"\
exit 1\
fi\
\
"$entry" >>"$LOG_DIR/$name.log" 2>&1 &\
echo "⃼ $name started (PID $!)"\
}\
\
# Sovereign system always first\
run_stack "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM"\
\
# Small delay so it claims control\
sleep 1\
\
# Everything else\
for s in "${STACK_ORDER[@]}"; do\
[[ "$s" == "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM" ]] && continue\
run_stack "$s"\
done\
\
echo " ALL STACKS ONLINE"\
echo " Logs in $LOG_DIR"\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh\
set +H\
echo 'set +H' >> ~/.zshrc\
source ~/.zshrc\
bash stack_up.sh\
ls -l /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\
ls -l $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh\
cd $HOME/STACK\
./stack_up.sh\
mkdir -p $HOME/bin\
cat > $HOME/bin/find_monorepo.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\
set -euo pipefail\
\
START="${1:-$HOME}"\
\

\

exit 1\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/bin/find_monorepo.sh\

echo "⃼ Launched (PID $\
done\
\
echo\
echo " EXECUTION COMPLETE"\
echo " Logs: $LOGDIR"\
awk -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '\
/^[0-9]+:/ { ts=$1; sub(/:/,"",ts) }\
ts >= d { print }\
' ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null\
awk -F';' -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '\
$1 >= d { print $2 }\
' ~/.zsh_history 2>/dev/null\
awk -F';' -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '$1>=d{print $2}' ~/.zsh_history\
echo $SHELL\
cat > ~/.zshrc <<'EOF'\
# ================================\
# ZSH HISTORY + EXECUTION LOGGING\
# ================================\
\
# History file\
export HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"\
export HISTSIZE=100000\
export SAVEHIST=100000\
\
# History behavior\
setopt appendhistory\
setopt extendedhistory\
setopt sharehistory\
setopt incappendhistory\
setopt histignorealldups\
setopt histignorespace\
\
# Execution logger (forensics-grade)\
preexec() {\
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $(pwd) | $1" >> "$HOME/.exec.log"\
}\
EOF\
source ~/.zshrc\
echo "test-command"\
ls >/dev/null\
tail -n 5 ~/.exec.log\
tail -n 5 ~/.zsh_history\
mkdir -p ~/EVIDENCE/{fs,git,logs,network,hashes}\
uname -a > ~/EVIDENCE/system.txt\
id >> ~/EVIDENCE/system.txt\
date -Is >> ~/EVIDENCE/system.txt\
find $HOME \\
-type f \\
! -path "*/node_modules/*" \\
! -path "*/.git/*" \\
! -path "*/.cache/*" \\
-printf "%TY-%Tm-%Td %TH:%TM:%TS | %u | %p\n" \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/fs/files_timeline.txt\
find $HOME \\
-type f -perm -u+x \\
! -path "*/.git/*" \\
-exec stat --format="%y | EXEC | %n" {} \; \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/fs/executables.txt\
find $HOME -name ".git" -type d | while read g; do\
repo=$(dirname "$g")\
echo "=== $repo ==="\
git -C "$repo" log --pretty=format:"%H | %an | %ae | %ad | %s"\
done > ~/EVIDENCE/git/commit_history.txt\
grep -RIn \\
--exclude-dir=node_modules \\
--exclude-dir=.git \\
-E "VideoCourts|TotalRecall|Sovereign|PaTHos|AiKre8tive|FacePrint|CyGel|Planetary" \\
$HOME \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/fs/semantic_hits.txt\

cp ~/.zsh_history ~/EVIDENCE/logs/ 2>/dev/null\

find ~/EVIDENCE -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/hashes/sha256_manifest.txt\
tail -n 20 "$HOME/EVIDENCE_repo_files_timeline.txt"\
mkdir -p "$HOME/MY_WORK_RECOVERY"\
\

! -path "*/node_modules/*" \\
! -path "*/.git/*" \\
! -path "*/.cache/*" \\

! -path "*/build/*" \\

-mtime -365 \\
-print \\
> "$HOME/MY_WORK_RECOVERY/file_list.txt"\

{\
"intent": "Execute and maintain all authored systems",\
"owner": "you",\
"source_of_truth": "Obsidian_Vault_Termux",\

"failure_mode": "fail_loud"\
}\

cat > $HOME/CONTROL/bin/DERIVE_INTENT.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -Eeuo pipefail\
\
MANIFEST="$HOME/MY_WORK_RECOVERY/file_list.txt"\
OUT="$HOME/CONTROL/INTENT_DERIVED.md"\
\
if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST" ]]; then\
echo "⃽ file_list.txt not found at $MANIFEST"\
exit 1\
fi\
\
echo "# DERIVED SYSTEM INTENT" > "$OUT"\
echo "" >> "$OUT"\
echo "Generated: $(date)" >> "$OUT"\
echo "" >> "$OUT"\
\
echo "## High-signal filenames" >> "$OUT"\
grep -Ei '(run|build|deploy|agent|stack|system|orchestr|boot|init|sync)' "$MANIFEST" \\
| sed 's/^/- /' >> "$OUT" || true\
\
echo "" >> "$OUT"\
echo "## Embedded intent statements (comments / docs)" >> "$OUT"\
\
while IFS= read -r f; do\
[[ ! -f "$f" ]] && continue\
\
case "$f" in\
*.sh|*.md|*.txt|*.json|*.yaml|*.yml)\
grep -Ei \\
'intent|purpose|goal|responsibility|execute|build|deploy|orchestr|agent|system' \\
"$f" \\
| sed "s|^|- $f: |" >> "$OUT" || true\
;;\
esac\
done < "$MANIFEST"\
\
echo "" >> "$OUT"\
echo "## Inferred themes" >> "$OUT"\
echo "- System orchestration and execution" >> "$OUT"\
echo "- Agent-based automation" >> "$OUT"\
echo "- Persistent runtime environment" >> "$OUT"\
echo "- Knowledge vault as source of truth" >> "$OUT"\
\
echo "" >> "$OUT"\
echo "## Execution directive" >> "$OUT"\
echo "The system SHALL prioritize runnable artifacts and orchestrators over documentation-only files." >> "$OUT"\
\
echo "⃼ Intent derived ⃦ $OUT"\
EOF\

ls -lah $HOME/CONTROL\
cat > $HOME/CONTROL/bin/NLP2CODE_EXEC.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -Eeuo pipefail\
\
CONTROL="$HOME/CONTROL"\
MANIFEST="$HOME/MY_WORK_RECOVERY/file_list.txt"\
OUT_CODE="$CONTROL/manifests/EXECUTION_PLAN.sh"\
LOG="$CONTROL/manifests/NLP2CODE.log"\
\
exec > >(tee -a "$LOG") 2>&1\
\
echo " NLP2CODE EXEC START   $(date)"\
\
if [[ ! -f "$MANIFEST" ]]; then\
echo "⃽ file_list.txt not found"\
exit 1\
fi\
\
#####################################\
# PHASE 1   NLP SIGNAL EXTRACTION\
#####################################\
echo " Extracting intent signals"\
\
grep -Ei \\
'(run|build|deploy|agent|stack|system|orchestr|boot|init|sync|start)' \\
"$MANIFEST" > "$CONTROL/manifests/intent_files.txt" || true\
\
#####################################\
# PHASE 2   CODE GENERATION\
#####################################\
echo "⃺︃ Generating executable plan ⃦ $OUT_CODE"\
\
cat > "$OUT_CODE" <<'PLAN'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -Eeuo pipefail\
echo " EXECUTION PLAN START   $(date)"\
PLAN\
\
while IFS= read -r f; do\
[[ ! -f "$f" ]] && continue\
\
case "$f" in\
*.sh)\
echo "echo '⃶ RUN $f'" >> "$OUT_CODE"\
echo "bash \"$f\" || true" >> "$OUT_CODE"\
;;\
package.json)\
dir="$(dirname "$f")"\
echo "cd \"$dir\" && npm install && npm run build || true" >> "$OUT_CODE"\
;;\
pyproject.toml|requirements.txt)\
dir="$(dirname "$f")"\
echo "cd \"$dir\" && pip install -r requirements.txt || true" >> "$OUT_CODE"\
;;\
docker-compose.yml)\
dir="$(dirname "$f")"\
echo "cd \"$dir\" && docker compose up -d --build || true" >> "$OUT_CODE"\
;;\
esac\
done < "$CONTROL/manifests/intent_files.txt"\
\
echo "echo '⃼ EXECUTION PLAN COMPLETE'" >> "$OUT_CODE"\
\
chmod +x "$OUT_CODE"\
\
#####################################\
# PHASE 3   EXECUTION\
#####################################\
echo " Executing generated plan"\
bash "$OUT_CODE"\
\
echo "⃼ NLP2CODE EXEC COMPLETE   $(date)"\
EOF\
chmod +x $HOME/CONTROL/bin/NLP2CODE_EXEC.sh\
bash $HOME/CONTROL/bin/NLP2CODE_EXEC.sh\

}\

#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -e\
\
STACK_DIR="$HOME/STACK/source"\
\
echo " Loading stacks from $STACK_DIR"\
\
for f in "$STACK_DIR"/*.json; do\
echo "  Loaded $(basename "$f")"\
done\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh\
bash $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh\

cat > $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -euo pipefail\
\
ROOT="$HOME"\
STACK_DIR="$ROOT/STACK/source"\
LOG_DIR="$ROOT/STACK/logs"\
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"\
\
echo " STACK BOOT   $(date)"\
echo " Stack source: $STACK_DIR"\
\
declare -A STACK_ENTRYPOINTS\
declare -a STACK_ORDER\
\
# -------------------------------\
# 1. DISCOVER + VALIDATE STACKS\
# -------------------------------\
for f in "$STACK_DIR"/*.json; do\
echo "⃦ Inspecting $(basename "$f")"\
\
jq -e '\
.stack\
and .type\
and .entrypoint\
and (.responsibility | type == "array")\
' "$f" >/dev/null || {\
echo "⃽ Invalid stack file: $f"\
exit 1\
}\
\
STACK=$(jq -r '.stack' "$f")\
ENTRY=$(jq -r '.entrypoint' "$f")\
\
STACK_ENTRYPOINTS["$STACK"]="$ENTRY"\
STACK_ORDER+=("$STACK")\
\
echo "⃼ Registered stack: $STACK"\
done\
\
# -------------------------------\
# 2. EXECUTION (ORCHESTRATOR FIRST)\
# -------------------------------\
run_stack () {\
local name="$1"\
local entry="$ROOT/${STACK_ENTRYPOINTS[$name]}"\
\
echo "⃺︃  Booting $name ⃦ $entry"\
\
if [[ ! -x "$entry" ]]; then\
echo "⃽ Entrypoint not executable: $entry"\
exit 1\
fi\
\
"$entry" >>"$LOG_DIR/$name.log" 2>&1 &\
echo "⃼ $name started (PID $!)"\
}\
\
# Sovereign system always first\
run_stack "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM"\
\
# Small delay so it claims control\
sleep 1\
\
# Everything else\
for s in "${STACK_ORDER[@]}"; do\
[[ "$s" == "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM" ]] && continue\
run_stack "$s"\
done\
\
echo " ALL STACKS ONLINE"\
echo " Logs in $LOG_DIR"\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh\
set +H\
echo 'set +H' >> ~/.zshrc\
source ~/.zshrc\
bash stack_up.sh\
ls -l /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\
ls -l $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh\
cd $HOME/STACK\
./stack_up.sh\
mkdir -p $HOME/bin\
cat > $HOME/bin/find_monorepo.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\
set -euo pipefail\
\
START="${1:-$HOME}"\
\
find "$START" -type f -name stack_up.sh 2>/dev/null | while read -r file; do\
root="$(dirname "$file")"\
echo "$root"\
exit 0\
done\
\
echo "⃽ MONOREPO NOT FOUND"\
exit 1\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/bin/find_monorepo.sh\
find_monorepo.sh\

/data/data/com.termux/files/home/AiKre8tive_ONE/monorepo\

while read -r file; do\
echo "⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴"\
echo " Running: $file"\
\
chmod +x "$file" 2>/dev/null || true\
\
bash "$file" >"$LOGDIR/$(basename "$file").log" 2>&1 &\
echo "⃼ Launched (PID $\
done\
\
echo\
echo " EXECUTION COMPLETE"\
echo " Logs: $LOGDIR"\
awk -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '\
/^[0-9]+:/ { ts=$1; sub(/:/,"",ts) }\
ts >= d { print }\
' ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null\
awk -F';' -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '\
$1 >= d { print $2 }\
' ~/.zsh_history 2>/dev/null\
awk -F';' -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '$1>=d{print $2}' ~/.zsh_history\
echo $SHELL\
cat > ~/.zshrc <<'EOF'\
# ================================\
# ZSH HISTORY + EXECUTION LOGGING\
# ================================\
\
# History file\
export HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"\
export HISTSIZE=100000\
export SAVEHIST=100000\
\
# History behavior\
setopt appendhistory\
setopt extendedhistory\
setopt sharehistory\
setopt incappendhistory\
setopt histignorealldups\
setopt histignorespace\
\
# Execution logger (forensics-grade)\
preexec() {\
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $(pwd) | $1" >> "$HOME/.exec.log"\
}\
EOF\
source ~/.zshrc\

#!/usr/bin/env bash\

\

\

.stack\
and .type\
and .entrypoint\
and (.responsibility | type == "array")\

class CygnusProcessingError(CygnusError):
class CygnusLogger:
# Global logger instance
cygnus_logger = CygnusLogger(log_file="PaTHos.log")
def cygnus_error_handler(func: Callable) -> Callable:
# ============================================================================

def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusAggregate(data: List[Dict], key: str, operation: str = "sum") -> float:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusTransform(data: List[Dict], transformations: Dict[str, Callable]) -> List[Dict]:

from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Callable
import logging
from datetime import datetime
from functools import wraps
class CygnusError(Exception):
def __init__(self, message: str, error_code: Optional[str] = None):
self.message = message
self.error_code = error_code
self.timestamp = datetime.now()
super().__init__(self.message)
class CygnusValidationError(CygnusError):
pass
class CygnusProcessingError(CygnusError):
pass
class CygnusLogger:
def __init__(self, name: str = "PaTHos", log_file: Optional[str] = None):
self.logger = logging.getLogger(name)
self.logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
console_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
console_handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
console_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
console_handler.setFormatter(console_format)
self.logger.addHandler(console_handler)
if log_file:
file_handler = logging.FileHandler(log_file)
file_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
file_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(funcName)s:%(lineno)d - %(message)s')
file_handler.setFormatter(file_format)
self.logger.addHandler(file_handler)
def info(self, message: str):
self.logger.info(message)
def error(self, message: str, exc_info: bool = False):
self.logger.error(message, exc_info=exc_info)
def warning(self, message: str):
self.logger.warning(message)
cygnus_logger = CygnusLogger(log_file="PaTHos.log")
def cygnus_error_handler(func: Callable) -> Callable:
@wraps(func)
def wrapper(*args, **kwargs):
try:
result = func(*args, **kwargs)
return result
except CygnusError as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"CygnusError in {func.__name__}: {e.message} (Code: {e.error_code})", exc_info=True)
raise
except Exception as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"Unexpected error in {func.__name__}: {str(e)}", exc_info=True)
raise CygnusProcessingError(f"Unexpected error in {func.__name__}: {str(e)}", error_code="PROC_001")
return wrapper
@cygnus_error_handler
def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
if not isinstance(data, list):
raise CygnusValidationError("Data must be a list of dictionaries", error_code="CYG_001")
if not isinstance(threshold, (int, float)):
raise CygnusValidationError("Threshold must be a number", error_code="CYG_002")
if not data:
cygnus_logger.warning("Empty data list provided to Cygnus")
return []
for i, item in enumerate(data):
if not isinstance(item, dict):
raise CygnusValidationError(f"Item at index {i} is not a dictionary", error_code="CYG_003")
if key not in item:
raise CygnusValidationError(f"Item at index {i} missing required key '{key}'", error_code="CYG_004")
if not isinstance(item[key], (int, float)):
raise CygnusValidationError(f"Value at index {i} for key '{key}' is not numeric", error_code="CYG_005")
filtered_data = [d for d in data if d[key] >= threshold]
cygnus_logger.info(f"Cygnus filtered {len(data)} items to {len(filtered_data)} items using threshold {threshold}")
return filtered_data
def main():
cygnus_logger.info("=== PaTHos Framework Started ===")
try:
sample_data = [
{"value": 1.2, "label": "A"},
{"value": 2.5, "label": "B"},
{"value": 0.8, "label": "C"},
{"value": 3.1, "label": "D"}
]
filtered = Cygnus(sample_data, 2.0)
print(f"Filtered data: {filtered}")
cygnus_logger.info("=== PaTHos Framework Completed Successfully ===")
except CygnusError as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"PaTHos error: {e.message} (Code: {e.error_code})")
raise
except Exception as e:
cygnus_logger.error(f"Unexpected error in main: {str(e)}")
raise
if __name__ == '__main__':
main()
ENDOFFILE
Then run:
python3 PaTHos.py

"""
PaTHos AI NLP Backend Processing Security, Testing, Development & Deployment

# ERROR HANDLING FRAMEWORK - CYGNUS
# ============================================================================

class CygnusProcessingError(CygnusError):
class CygnusLogger:
# Global logger instance
cygnus_logger = CygnusLogger(log_file="PaTHos.log")

# ============================================================================

def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
@cygnus_error_handler
def CygnusAggregate(data: List[Dict], key: str, operation: str = "sum") -> float:

code = '''from typing import List, Dict
def Cygnus(data: List[Dict], threshold: float, key: str = "value") -> List[Dict]:
return [d for d in data if d.get(key, 0) >= threshold]
sample_data = [
{"value": 1.2, "label": "A"},
{"value": 2.5, "label": "B"},
{"value": 0.8, "label": "C"},
{"value": 3.1, "label": "D"}
]
filtered = Cygnus(sample_data, 2.0)
print("=== PaTHos Framework Started ===")
print(f"Filtered data: {filtered}")
print("=== PaTHos Framework Completed Successfully ===")
'''
with open('PaTHos.py', 'w') as f:
f.write(code)
print('✓ PaTHos.py created successfully!')
EOF

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# =========================================================
# 🚀 PaTHos-MCP Hybrid Bootstrapper (Vercel + Cloudflare)
# =========================================================
# --- config ---
PROJECT="pathos-mcp"
CF_ACCOUNT_ID="your_account_id_here"
CF_API_TOKEN="your_api_token_here"
VERCEL_TEAM="kre8tivekonceptz"
echo "[⚙️] Setting up $PROJECT environment..."
# --- create project dirs ---
mkdir -p ~/$PROJECT/functions ~/$PROJECT/pages/api ~/$PROJECT/components
cd ~/$PROJECT || exit 1
# --- install deps ---
pkg install -y nodejs git
npm install -g wrangler vercel
# --- write Cloudflare Worker ---
cat > functions/pathos.js <<'EOF'
export default {
async fetch(request) {
const url = new URL(request.url);
if (url.pathname === "/chat" && request.method === "POST")
return new Response("data: PaTHos online\n\n", {
headers: { "Content-Type": "text/event-stream" }
});
return new Response("PaTHos MCP Edge Online", { status: 200 });
}
};
EOF
# --- basic wrangler config ---
cat > wrangler.toml <<EOF
name = "$PROJECT"
main = "functions/pathos.js"
compatibility_date = "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
EOF
# --- vercel proxy route ---
mkdir -p pages/api
cat > pages/api/chat.js <<'EOF'
export default async function handler(req, res) {
const r = await fetch("https://pathos-mcp.YOURZONE.workers.dev/chat", {
method: "POST",
headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
body: JSON.stringify(req.body)
});
res.setHeader("Content-Type", "text/event-stream");
const reader = r.body.getReader();
const decoder = new TextDecoder();
let done, value;
while (!done) {
({ value, done } = await reader.read());
if (value) res.write(decoder.decode(value));
}
res.end();
}
EOF
# --- sample React component placeholder ---
cat > components/AIMetaverse.jsx <<'EOF'
export default function AIMetaverse() {
return <div className="p-6 text-center text-gray-600">AI Metaverse UI Placeholder</div>;
}
EOF
# --- init repos ---
git init
echo "node_modules" > .gitignore
# --- deploy instructions ---
cat <<'EON'
[✅] Bootstrap complete.
Next steps:
1. Run →  npx wrangler deploy
2. Update the Worker URL inside pages/api/chat.js
3. Deploy front-end →  vercel --prod
EON

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ============================================================
#  🌍 PaTHos MCP + Planetary Agents Edge Deploy (Cloudflare)
# ============================================================
set -e
echo "[⚙️] Initializing multi-agent network..."
AGENTS=("chronos" "mars" "venus" "jupiter")
# ---------- create each agent ----------
for AGENT in "${AGENTS[@]}"; do   echo "[🪐] Building agent: $AGENT";   mkdir -p "$AGENT";   cd "$AGENT";
cat > functions.js <<EOF
export default {
async fetch(request) {
const url = new URL(request.url);
if (url.pathname === "/execute" && request.method === "POST") {
const { message, user } = await request.json();
const encoder = new TextEncoder();
const stream = new ReadableStream({
start(controller) {
const lines = [
"👋 \${user}, ${AGENT^} agent responding...",
"Processing intent: \${message}",
"Task complete ✅"
];
let i = 0;
const send = () => {
if (i < lines.length) {
controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(\`data: \${lines[i++]}\n\n\`));
setTimeout(send, 900);
} else controller.close();
};
send();
}
});
return new Response(stream, {
headers: { "Content-Type": "text/event-stream" }
});
}
return new Response("${AGENT^} agent online");
}
};
EOF
cat > wrangler.toml <<EOF
name = "agents-$AGENT"
main = "functions.js"
compatibility_date = "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
EOF
echo "[🚀] Deploying $AGENT...";   npx wrangler deploy --remote;   cd ..; done
wrangler --version

self.findings.append(finding)
async def crawl_academic(self):
"""Search academic papers"""
print(f"🎓 Agent {self.agent_id} crawling academic sources...")
sources = ["arxiv.org", "scholar.google.com", "semanticscholar.org"]
for sig in self.signatures:
for source in sources:
finding = {
"timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
"agent_id": self.agent_id,
"type": "academic_search",
"source": source,
"signature": sig,
"status": "queued"
}
self.findings.append(finding)
async def crawl_tech_docs(self):
"""Search technical documentation"""
print(f"📚 Agent {self.agent_id} crawling tech docs...")
sources = ["readthedocs.io", "docs.github.com", "medium.com", "dev.to"]
for sig in self.signatures:
for source in sources:
finding = {
"timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
"agent_id": self.agent_id,
"type": "tech_doc_search",
"source": source,
"signature": sig,
"status": "queued"
}
self.findings.append(finding)
async def run(self):
"""Execute documentation crawling mission"""
print(f"🚀 Agent {self.agent_id} starting doc crawl...")
await asyncio.gather(
self.crawl_patents(),
self.crawl_academic(),
self.crawl_tech_docs()
)
return self.findings
if __name__ == "__main__":
import sys
agent_id = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "16"
with open("config.json") as f:
config = json.load(f)
agent = DocCrawlerAgent(agent_id, config["signatures"])
findings = asyncio.run(agent.run())
with open(f"evidence/doc_agent_{agent_id}_findings.json", "w") as f:
json.dump(findings, f, indent=2)
print(f"✅ Doc Crawler Agent {agent_id}: {len(findings)} findings")

cat > "$PROJECT_ROOT/agents/evidence_compiler.py" << 'EVIDENCE_EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Evidence Compilation & Analysis Agent"""
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
class EvidenceCompilerAgent:
def __init__(self, agent_id, evidence_dir):
self.agent_id = agent_id
self.evidence_dir = Path(evidence_dir)
self.compiled = {
"metadata": {
"agent_id": agent_id,
"compilation_date": datetime.now().isoformat(),
"total_findings": 0
},
"findings": [],
"timeline": [],
"signatures_detected": {},
"platforms_affected": {},
"legal_summary": {}
}
def compile_all_findings(self):
"""Compile all agent findings"""
print(f"📊 Agent {self.agent_id} compiling all findings...")
finding_files = list(self.evidence_dir.glob("*_findings.json"))
for file in finding_files:
try:
with open(file) as f:
data = json.load(f)
self.compiled["findings"].extend(data)
except Exception as e:
print(f"⚠️  Error reading {file}: {str(e)}")
self.compiled["metadata"]["total_findings"] = len(self.compiled["findings"])
print(f"✅ Compiled {self.compiled['metadata']['total_findings']} findings")
def analyze_signatures(self):
"""Analyze signature occurrences"""
print(f"🔍 Agent {self.agent_id} analyzing signatures...")
sig_counts = {}
for finding in self.compiled["findings"]:
sig = finding.get("signature", "unknown")
sig_counts[sig] = sig_counts.get(sig, 0) + 1
self.compiled["signatures_detected"] = sig_counts
# Sort by frequency
sorted_sigs = sorted(sig_counts.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
print(f"🔴 Top signatures found:")
for sig, count in sorted_sigs[:10]:
print(f"   {sig}: {count} occurrences")
def build_timeline(self):
"""Build chronological timeline"""
print(f"📅 Agent {self.agent_id} building timeline...")
timeline = []
for finding in self.compiled["findings"]:
timeline.append({
"timestamp": finding.get("timestamp"),
"signature": finding.get("signature"),
"platform": finding.get("platform", finding.get("url", "unknown")),
"type": finding.get("type", "detection")
})
# Sort by timestamp
timeline.sort(key=lambda x: x.get("timestamp", ""))
self.compiled["timeline"] = timeline
print(f"✅ Timeline built: {len(timeline)} events")
def generate_legal_summary(self):
"""Generate legal summary document"""
print(f"⚖️  Agent {self.agent_id} generating legal summary...")
self.compiled["legal_summary"] = {
"case_type": "Intellectual Property Theft",
"plaintiff": "Cygel White / SovereignGTP",
"total_violations_detected": self.compiled["metadata"]["total_findings"],
"unique_signatures": len(self.compiled["signatures_detected"]),
"evidence_collection_date": datetime.now().isoformat(),
"key_findings": [],
"recommended_actions": [
"File comprehensive IP theft complaint",
"Request injunctive relief",
"Demand damages for unauthorized use",
"Seek declaratory judgment on ownership",
"Request forensic audit of accused parties"
]
}
# Top violations
sorted_sigs = sorted(
self.compiled["signatures_detected"].items(),
key=lambda x: x[1],
reverse=True
)
for sig, count in sorted_sigs[:10]:
self.compiled["legal_summary"]["key_findings"].append({
"signature": sig,
"occurrences": count,
"severity": "HIGH" if count > 50 else "MEDIUM" if count > 10 else "LOW"
})
def generate_report(self):
"""Generate comprehensive report"""
print(f"📋 Agent {self.agent_id} generating report...")
report_file = self.evidence_dir / f"COMPILED_EVIDENCE_REPORT_{self.agent_id}.json"
with open(report_file, "w") as f:
json.dump(self.compiled, f, indent=2)
# Generate human-readable report
readable_file = self.evidence_dir / f"EVIDENCE_REPORT_{self.agent_id}.txt"
with open(readable_file, "w") as f:
f.write("=" * 80 + "\n")
f.write("SOVEREIGN AI ECOSYSTEM - EVIDENCE COMPILATION REPORT\n")
f.write("THE WITNESS PROTOCOL: Big Tech IP Theft Detection\n")
f.write("=" * 80 + "\n\n")
f.write(f"Report Date: {self.compiled['metadata']['compilation_date']}\n")
f.write(f"Compiled By: Agent {self.agent_id}\n")
f.write(f"Total Findings: {self.compiled['metadata']['total_findings']}\n")
f.write(f"Unique Signatures: {len(self.compiled['signatures_detected'])}\n\n")
f.write("TOP SIGNATURE DETECTIONS:\n")
f.write("-" * 80 + "\n")
sorted_sigs = sorted(
self.compiled["signatures_detected"].items(),
key=lambda x: x[1],
reverse=True
)
for i, (sig, count) in enumerate(sorted_sigs[:20], 1):
f.write(f"{i:2}. {sig:30} → {count:4} occurrences\n")
f.write("\n" + "=" * 80 + "\n")
f.write("LEGAL SUMMARY\n")
f.write("=" * 80 + "\n")
f.write(json.dumps(self.compiled["legal_summary"], indent=2))
print(f"✅ Report saved: {report_file}")
print(f"✅ Readable report: {readable_file}")
return report_file
def run(self):
"""Execute compilation mission"""
print(f"🚀 Agent {self.agent_id} starting evidence compilation...")
self.compile_all_findings()
self.analyze_signatures()
self.build_timeline()
self.generate_legal_summary()
report_file = self.generate_report()
print(f"✅ Agent {self.agent_id} compilation complete!")
return report_file

import sys

evidence_dir = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else "./evidence"
agent = EvidenceCompilerAgent(agent_id, evidence_dir)
report = agent.run()
print(f"\n🎯 Final Report: {report}")

HOOK_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/deploy_hook.conf"

DEPLOY_CMD="$BIN_DIR/deploy-aimeta"
PROJECT_NAME="plan_aimeta001"

chmod 700 "$CONFIG_DIR"
# Step 2: Ask user for Vercel Deploy Hook
read -p "Enter your Vercel Deploy Hook URL: " VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK
if [[ -z "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK" ]]; then     echo "❌ No URL entered. Exiting.";     exit 1; fi
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Vercel Deployment Script for plan_aimeta001
# Created: 2025-12-18
set -e
echo "=== Vercel Deployment Script ==="
echo
# Configuration
PROJECT_NAME="plan_aimeta001"
PROJECT_PATH="$HOME/storage/shared/AiMetaverse/plan_aimeta001"
# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color
# Check if project directory exists
if [ ! -d "$PROJECT_PATH" ]; then     echo -e "${RED}✗ Project directory not found: $PROJECT_PATH${NC}";     exit 1; fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Project directory found${NC}"
cd "$PROJECT_PATH"
# Show current directory and files
echo
echo "Current directory: $(pwd)"
echo "Project files:"
ls -lh
echo
# Method 1: Deploy Hook (if you have one)
echo "=== Deployment Method 1: Deploy Hook ==="
echo "If you have a Vercel Deploy Hook, enter it below."
echo "Format: https://api.vercel.com/v1/integrations/deploy/YOUR_HOOK_ID"
echo "(Press Enter to skip and use CLI method)"
echo
read -p "Deploy Hook URL (or press Enter): " DEPLOY_HOOK
if [ -n "$DEPLOY_HOOK" ]; then     echo;     echo "Triggering deployment via hook...";          response=$(curl -s -X POST "$DEPLOY_HOOK" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d "{\"project\":\"$PROJECT_NAME\"}");          if echo "$response" | grep -q "error"; then         echo -e "${RED}✗ Deploy hook failed${NC}";         echo "Response: $response";         echo;         echo "Common issues:";         echo "1. Hook ID is incorrect";         echo "2. Hook was deleted/regenerated";         echo "3. Project name doesn't match";         echo;         echo "Falling back to CLI method...";     else         echo "Response: $response";         echo;         echo "Check deployment status at: https://vercel.com/dashboard";         exit 0;     fi; fi
# Method 2: Vercel CLI
echo
echo "=== Deployment Method 2: Vercel CLI ==="
# Check if Vercel CLI is installed
if ! command -v vercel &> /dev/null; then     echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Vercel CLI not installed${NC}";     echo "Installing Vercel CLI...";          if ! command -v npm &> /dev/null; then         echo "Installing Node.js and npm...";         pkg install nodejs -y;     fi;          npm install -g vercel; fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Vercel CLI is available${NC}"
echo
# Check if project is linked
if [ ! -f ".vercel/project.json" ]; then     echo -e "${YELLOW}⚠ Project not linked to Vercel${NC}";     echo "Linking project...";     vercel link; fi
# Deploy
echo
echo "Starting deployment..."
echo
# Choose deployment type
echo "Select deployment type:"
echo "1. Production deployment"
echo "2. Preview deployment"
read -p "Choice (1 or 2): " deploy_type
if [ "$deploy_type" = "1" ]; then     echo "Deploying to production...";     vercel --prod; else     echo "Deploying preview...";     vercel; fi
echo
echo "View your deployment:"
echo "- Dashboard: https://vercel.com/dashboard"
echo "- Project: https://vercel.com/your-username/$PROJECT_NAME"
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# =========================================
# AiMetaverse Unified Repo + Vercel Deploy
# Verified 25 planetary agents included
# =========================================
BASE_DIR="$HOME/storage/shared/AiMetaverse/plan_aimeta001/repos"
CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/.config/vercel"
BIN_DIR="$HOME/bin"
LOG_FILE="$HOME/deploy_agents_log.txt"
BRANCH="main"
# Load all Vercel hooks (one per project/agent)
declare -A VERCEL_HOOKS
HOOKS_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/deploy_hook.conf"
if [[ -f "$HOOKS_FILE" ]]; then
while IFS='=' read -r key value; do         VERCEL_HOOKS["$key"]="$value";     done < "$HOOKS_FILE"; fi
# Load agent keys and directives
AGENTS_DIR="$HOME/storage/shared/AiMetaverse/agents"
# Ensure all 25 agents exist
AGENT_LIST=("agent001" "agent002" "agent003" "agent004" "agent005"             "agent006" "agent007" "agent008" "agent009" "agent010"             "agent011" "agent012" "agent013" "agent014" "agent015"             "agent016" "agent017" "agent018" "agent019" "agent020"             "agent021" "agent022" "agent023" "agent024" "agent025")
echo "🚀 Starting full AiMetaverse deployment..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
for repo in "$BASE_DIR"/*; do     if [[ -d "$repo/.git" ]]; then         cd "$repo" || continue;         REPO_NAME=$(basename "$repo");         echo "📦 Processing repo: $REPO_NAME" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";
git fetch --all;         git reset --hard origin/$BRANCH 2>/dev/null;         git add .;         git commit -m "Automated sync commit $(date '+%F %T')" 2>/dev/null || echo "No changes to commit";         git push origin $BRANCH 2>/dev/null || echo "⚠️ Push failed for $REPO_NAME" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";          echo "✅ Repo $REPO_NAME pushed to GitHub" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";
HOOK_URL=${VERCEL_HOOKS["$REPO_NAME"]};         if [[ -n "$HOOK_URL" ]]; then             echo "🌐 Triggering Vercel deploy for $REPO_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             RESPONSE=$(curl -s -X POST "$HOOK_URL" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"project\":\"$REPO_NAME\"}");             if [[ "$RESPONSE" == *"PENDING"* ]]; then                 echo "✅ Vercel deploy triggered successfully" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             else                 echo "⚠️ Vercel deploy returned error: $RESPONSE" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             fi;         else             echo "⚠️ No Vercel hook for $REPO_NAME, skipping" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";         fi;     fi; done
# --------------------
# Run all 25 agents (optional post-deploy tasks)
# --------------------
for AGENT in "${AGENT_LIST[@]}"; do     AGENT_PATH="$AGENTS_DIR/$AGENT";     if [[ -f "$AGENT_PATH/run.sh" ]]; then         echo "🤖 Running agent: $AGENT" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";         bash "$AGENT_PATH/run.sh" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1;         echo "✅ Agent $AGENT executed" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";     else         echo "⚠️ Agent $AGENT not found or missing run.sh" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";     fi; done
echo "🎉 All repos and agents processed! Check $LOG_FILE for full details."
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# =========================================================
# Unified AiMetaverse Agents & Repos Deployment Script
# =========================================================
HOME_DIR="$HOME"
LOG_FILE="$HOME/deploy_agents_log.txt"
AGENT_COUNT=25
echo "🚀 Starting full AiMetaverse deployment..." | tee "$LOG_FILE"
date | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
# Loop through all 25 agents
for i in $(seq -w 1 $AGENT_COUNT); do     AGENT_NAME="agent$i";     AGENT_PATH=$(find "$HOME_DIR" -type f -path "*/$AGENT_NAME/run.sh" -print -quit);          if [[ -x "$AGENT_PATH" ]]; then         echo "▶ Running $AGENT_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";         (cd "$(dirname "$AGENT_PATH")" && ./run.sh) 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";
if git -C "$(dirname "$AGENT_PATH")" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree &>/dev/null; then             echo "🔧 Pushing $AGENT_NAME repo to GitHub..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             (cd "$(dirname "$AGENT_PATH")" && git add . && git commit -m "Auto deploy $(date)" && git push) 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";         fi;
HOOK_FILE="$HOME/.config/vercel/deploy_hook.conf";         if [[ -f "$HOOK_FILE" ]]; then             source "$HOOK_FILE";             if [[ -n "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK" ]]; then                 echo "🚀 Triggering Vercel deploy for $AGENT_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";                 curl -s -X POST "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK"                      -H "Content-Type: application/json"                      -d "{\"project\":\"$AGENT_NAME\"}" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             fi;         fi;              else         echo "⚠️ $AGENT_NAME not found or missing run.sh" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";     fi; done
echo "🎉 All repos and agents processed! Check $LOG_FILE for full details."
date | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# =========================================================
# Termux Unified Home Deployment Environment
# =========================================================
# This script sets up Termux to always use $HOME for:
# - Agents
# - Bash scripts
# - Repos
# - Vercel Deploy Hooks
# - Logs
# =========================================================
# Force Termux to use HOME as base directory
export TERMUX_BASE="$HOME"
export AGENTS_DIR="$TERMUX_BASE/AiMetaverse/agents"
export BIN_DIR="$TERMUX_BASE/bin"
export LOG_FILE="$TERMUX_BASE/deploy_agents_log.txt"
export VERCEL_CONFIG="$TERMUX_BASE/.config/vercel/deploy_hook.conf"
# Ensure directories exist
mkdir -p "$AGENTS_DIR" "$BIN_DIR" "$(dirname "$LOG_FILE")" "$(dirname "$VERCEL_CONFIG")"
# Add ~/bin to PATH if not already
if ! echo "$PATH" | grep -q "$BIN_DIR"; then     export PATH="$BIN_DIR:$PATH";     echo 'export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"; fi
echo "Termux unified home environment initialized."
echo "Base directory: $TERMUX_BASE"
echo "Agents directory: $AGENTS_DIR"
echo "Bin directory: $BIN_DIR"
echo "Logs: $LOG_FILE"
echo "Vercel hook config: $VERCEL_CONFIG"
# Optional: source Vercel hook if exists
if [[ -f "$VERCEL_CONFIG" ]]; then     source "$VERCEL_CONFIG";     if [[ -n "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK" ]]; then         echo "Vercel deploy hook loaded.";     else         echo "Vercel hook file empty or invalid.";     fi; else     echo "No Vercel hook file found. Create it at $VERCEL_CONFIG"; fi
# Function: Deploy all agents
deploy_agents() {     echo "Starting full AiMetaverse agent deployment...";     date | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";
AGENT_LIST=($(find "$AGENTS_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d));     if [[ ${#AGENT_LIST[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then         echo "No agent directories found in $AGENTS_DIR" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";         return 1;     fi;      for AGENT_DIR in "${AGENT_LIST[@]}"; do         AGENT_NAME=$(basename "$AGENT_DIR");         RUN_SCRIPT="$AGENT_DIR/run.sh";          if [[ -f "$RUN_SCRIPT" ]]; then             echo "Executing $AGENT_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             bash "$RUN_SCRIPT" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";
if [[ -n "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK" ]]; then                 echo "Triggering Vercel deploy for $AGENT_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";                 curl -s -X POST "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK"                      -H "Content-Type: application/json"                      -d "{\"project\":\"$AGENT_NAME\"}" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             else                 echo "Vercel deploy hook not set. Skipping..." | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";             fi;         else             echo "$AGENT_NAME missing run.sh" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE";         fi;     done;      echo "All agents processed. Check $LOG_FILE for details.";     date | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
# Export function to be callable anywhere
export -f deploy_agents
echo "Ready! Run 'deploy_agents' anytime to deploy all agents using Termux $HOME paths."
chmod +x ~/bin/unified_deploy.sh

<script>
const API = 'http://127.0.0.1:8888';
const SWARM = 'http://127.0.0.1:8889';
let startTime = Date.now();
let requestCount = 0;
const keysLight = document.getElementById('keysLight');
const swarmLight = document.getElementById('swarmLight');
const keysStatus = document.getElementById('keysStatus');
const swarmStatus = document.getElementById('swarmStatus');
const metricsBox = document.getElementById('metricsBox');
const swarmBox = document.getElementById('swarmBox');
const resultBox = document.getElementById('resultBox');
const uptimeEl = document.getElementById('uptime');
const requestsEl = document.getElementById('requests');
function updateUptime() {
const seconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000);
const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
const secs = seconds % 60;
uptimeEl.textContent = mins > 0 ? `${mins}m ${secs}s` : `${secs}s`;
}
function setLightStatus(light, statusEl, online, msg) {
light.className = 'light ' + (online ? 'online' : 'offline');
statusEl.textContent = msg;
}
async function refresh() {
try {
requestCount++;
requestsEl.textContent = requestCount;
const metricsRes = await fetch(API + '/metrics');
const metrics = await metricsRes.json();
setLightStatus(keysLight, keysStatus, true, '✅ Keys API Online');
metricsBox.textContent = JSON.stringify(metrics, null, 2);
const swarmRes = await fetch(SWARM + '/swarm/status');
const swarmData = await swarmRes.json();
setLightStatus(swarmLight, swarmStatus, true, '✅ Swarm API Online');
swarmBox.textContent = JSON.stringify(swarmData, null, 2);
} catch (e) {
setLightStatus(keysLight, keysStatus, false, '❌ Keys API Offline');
setLightStatus(swarmLight, swarmStatus, false, '❌ Swarm API Offline');
metricsBox.textContent = 'Error: ' + e.message;
swarmBox.textContent = 'Error: ' + e.message;
}
}
async function rotateKey() {
try {
requestCount++;
requestsEl.textContent = requestCount;
resultBox.textContent = 'Rotating API key...';
const res = await fetch(API + '/rotate-key', {
method: 'POST',
headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
body: JSON.stringify({
service_name: 'AGI_KRE8TIVE_Demo',
key_type: 'api_key'
})
});
const data = await res.json();
resultBox.textContent = '✅ KEY ROTATED:\n\n' + JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
} catch (e) {
resultBox.textContent = '❌ Error: ' + e.message;
}
}
async function createTask() {
try {
requestCount++;
requestsEl.textContent = requestCount;
resultBox.textContent = 'Creating swarm task...';
const res = await fetch(SWARM + '/swarm/task', {
method: 'POST',
headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
body: JSON.stringify({
agent: 'valuation',
task_type: 'analysis',
description: 'Demo task created from web UI',
priority: 'normal'
})
});
const data = await res.json();
resultBox.textContent = '✅ TASK CREATED:\n\n' + JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
setTimeout(refresh, 1000);
} catch (e) {
resultBox.textContent = '❌ Error: ' + e.message;
}
}
function clearResults() {
resultBox.textContent = 'Results cleared. Ready for new operations.';
}
document.getElementById('btnRefresh').addEventListener('click', refresh);
document.getElementById('btnRotate').addEventListener('click', rotateKey);
document.getElementById('btnTask').addEventListener('click', createTask);
document.getElementById('btnClear').addEventListener('click', clearResults);
setInterval(refresh, 5000);
setInterval(updateUptime, 1000);
refresh();
</script>
</body>
</html>
HTML
ok "Landing page created"
echo ""
# ============================================================
# STEP 3: START SERVICES
# ============================================================
say "🚀 Step 3: Starting all services..."
> "$API_LOG"
> "$SWARM_LOG"
> "$WEB_LOG"
say "  Starting Keys API on :${API_PORT}..."
cd "$API_DIR"
nohup python keys_api.py > "$API_LOG" 2>&1 &
API_PID=$!
say "    PID: $API_PID"
sleep 3
if ! kill -0 $API_PID 2>/dev/null; then     say "    ❌ Failed to start!";     tail -20 "$API_LOG";     die "Keys API startup failed"; fi

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Biometric Git Push Script
# Usage: ./bio-git-push.sh [branch]
set -e
BRANCH="${1:-main}"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
LOG_FILE="$HOME/bio-git-push-${TIMESTAMP}.log"
log() {     echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
log "=== Biometric Git Push Started ==="
log "Branch: $BRANCH"
log "Repository: $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo 'No remote')"
# Check if we're in a git repository
if ! git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then     log "ERROR: Not in a git repository";     exit 1; fi
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================
# Termux Repo Sync (SSH)
# ==========================
# Config
REPO_SSH="git@github.com:FacePrintPay/your-repo.git"
REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_SSH")
REPO_DIR="$HOME/$REPO_NAME"
LOG_DIR="$HOME/YesQuidLogs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
# Ensure Git is installed
if ! command -v git &>/dev/null; then     echo "[!] Git not found, installing..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     pkg install -y git | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"; fi
# Ensure SSH agent is running
if ! pgrep -x "ssh-agent" > /dev/null; then     echo "[*] Starting ssh-agent..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     eval $(ssh-agent -s) | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"; fi
# Clone or pull repo
if [ -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; then     echo "[✓] Repo exists. Pulling latest..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git -C "$REPO_DIR" pull --rebase 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Pull failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; else     echo "[✓] Cloning repo..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git clone "$REPO_SSH" "$REPO_DIR" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Clone failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; fi
echo "[✓] Repo sync complete: $REPO_NAME"
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================
# Termux → Repo Sync (SSH Auto)
# ==========================
# Config
REPO_URL="git@github.com:FacePrintPay/your-repo.git"
REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_URL")
REPO_DIR="$HOME/$REPO_NAME"
LOG_DIR="$HOME/YesQuidLogs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
echo "[*] Starting repo sync for $REPO_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
# 1️⃣ Ensure Git is installed
if ! command -v git &>/dev/null; then     echo "[!] Git not found, installing..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     pkg install -y git | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"; fi
# 2️⃣ Ensure SSH key exists
if [ ! -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]; then     echo "[*] SSH key not found. Generating..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "your_email@example.com" -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" -N ""; fi
# 3️⃣ Start ssh-agent
eval $(ssh-agent -s) | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
ssh-add "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
# 4️⃣ Add GitHub to known hosts to avoid verification prompt
ssh-keyscan github.com >> "$HOME/.ssh/known_hosts" 2>/dev/null
# 5️⃣ Clone or pull the repo
if [ -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; then     echo "[✓] Repo exists. Pulling latest..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git -C "$REPO_DIR" pull --rebase 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Pull failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; else     echo "[✓] Cloning repo..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git clone "$REPO_URL" "$REPO_DIR" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Clone failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; fi
echo "[✓] Repo sync complete: $REPO_NAME" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================
# Biometric Git Push + Termux → Obsidian Dump
# ==========================
set -e
# ---------- CONFIG ----------

OBSIDIAN_FILE="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/Termux_Snapshot_${TIMESTAMP}.canvas.md"
# ----------------------------

log "=== Biometric Git Push Started ==="
log "Branch: $BRANCH"
log "Repository: $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo 'No remote')"

#!/bin/bash
# =========================================
# Script: clone_git_repo.sh
# Purpose: Create a directory and clone a GitHub repo into it
# =========================================
# Set your repo URL
REPO_URL="https://github.com/FacePrintPay"
# Set the target directory name (will be created in $HOME)
DIR_NAME="FacePrintPayRepo"
# Full path
TARGET_DIR="$HOME/$DIR_NAME"
# Check if directory already exists
if [ -d "$TARGET_DIR" ]; then     echo "Directory '$TARGET_DIR' already exists. Skipping creation."; else     echo "Creating directory '$TARGET_DIR'...";     mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"; fi
# Clone the repo into the directory
echo "Cloning GitHub repo into '$TARGET_DIR'..."
git clone "$REPO_URL" "$TARGET_DIR"
# Verify clone success
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then     echo "✅ Repo cloned successfully!"; else     echo "❌ Failed to clone repo. Check your internet connection and repo URL."; fi
ping google.com.
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==============================
# Termux Home → Obsidian Vault → GitHub
# ==============================
set -e
# Paths

OBSIDIAN_VAULT="/storage/emulated/0/Documents/Obsidian/AiKre8tive"
SNAPSHOT_DIR="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot"
LOG_FILE="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot.log"

log "=== Termux → Obsidian Snapshot Started ==="
# 1️⃣ Biometric Authentication
if command -v termux-biometric-auth &> /dev/null; then     AUTH_RESULT=$(termux-biometric-auth \
-t "Vault Sync Auth" \
-s "Authenticate to sync Termux home" \
-d "Verify your identity to proceed" 2>&1);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         log "✓ Biometric auth successful";     else         log "✗ Biometric auth failed";         exit 1;     fi; else     log "⚠ termux-biometric-auth not installed. Continuing without it."; fi
# 2️⃣ Copy Termux home to snapshot folder
log "📦 Copying Termux home to snapshot..."
rsync -a --delete "$TERMUX_HOME/" "$SNAPSHOT_DIR/"

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================================
# Termux → Obsidian Vault → GitHub Sync (2025 Fix)
# ==========================================
set -e
# --------------------------
# Variables (UPDATE THESE)
# --------------------------
TERMUX_HOME="$HOME"  # Termux home
OBSIDIAN_VAULT="/storage/emulated/0/Documents/Obsidian/AiKre8tive"
SNAPSHOT_DIR="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot"
LOG_FILE="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot.log"
GIT_REMOTE="git@github.com:FacePrintPay/TermuxSnapshot.git"  # Update with your GitHub repo
BRANCH="${1:-main}"  # Default branch
# Create snapshot directory and log file
mkdir -p "$SNAPSHOT_DIR"
touch "$LOG_FILE"
# --------------------------
# Logging function
# --------------------------
log() {     echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
log "=== Termux → Obsidian Snapshot Started ==="
# --------------------------
# Prevent Android killing process
# --------------------------
termux-wake-lock
# --------------------------
# Biometric Authentication
# --------------------------
if command -v termux-biometric-auth &> /dev/null; then     AUTH_RESULT=$(termux-biometric-auth \
-t "Vault Sync Auth" \
-s "Authenticate to sync Termux home" \
-d "Verify your identity to proceed" 2>&1);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         log "✓ Biometric auth successful";     else         log "✗ Biometric auth failed";         exit 1;     fi; else     log "⚠ termux-biometric-auth not installed. Install pkg install termux-api and check permissions."; fi
# --------------------------
# Copy Termux home to snapshot (exclude problematic dirs)
# --------------------------
log "📦 Copying Termux home to snapshot..."
rsync -av --delete     --exclude 'TermuxWizard'     --exclude 'storage'     --exclude '.cache'     --exclude '.local/share'     "$TERMUX_HOME/" "$SNAPSHOT_DIR/"
pkg install jq
rm -rf \~/.cache/*   # clears pip, npm, whatever
rm -rf /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/tmp/*   # Termux temp files
du -sh /* 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -n 10
du -sh \~/.cache/* 2>/dev/null | sort -hr
# 1. Nuke the broken lists (safe—Termux will rebuild them)
rm -rf /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/var/lib/apt/lists/*
# 2. Clear any lock files (in case it hung)
rm -f /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/var/lib/dpkg/lock*
# 3. Update again—should fetch fresh
pkg update
pkg install jq   # for that JSON script we talked about
cat \~/.bash_history |   awk '/^#[0-9]+/ { ts = substr($1,2); getline cmd; print "{\"timestamp\":\"" ts "\", \"command\":\"" cmd "\"}" }' |   jq -s '.' > \~/last365_commands.json
echo "export HISTFILE=\~/.bash_history" >> \~/.bashrc
echo "export HISTSIZE=50000" >> \~/.bashrc
echo "export HISTFILESIZE=50000" >> \~/.bashrc
source \~/.bashrc
history -a   # writes current session to file

// Starfield Animation
const cv=document.getElementById('c');
const cx=cv.getContext('2d');
cv.width=window.innerWidth;
cv.height=window.innerHeight;
const st=Array.from({length:160},()=>({x:Math.random()*cv.width,y:Math.random()*cv.height,r:Math.random()*.9+.1,o:Math.random()*.6+.1}));
function draw(){
cx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);
st.forEach(s=>{
s.o+=(Math.random()-.5)*.03;
s.o=Math.max(.05,Math.min(.7,s.o));
cx.beginPath();cx.arc(s.x,s.y,s.r,0,Math.PI*2);
cx.fillStyle=`rgba(0,212,255,${s.o})`;cx.fill();
});
requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}
draw();
window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{cv.width=window.innerWidth;cv.height=window.innerHeight;});
// Feature detection
const features=document.documentElement.dataset.features.split(',');
console.log('C25 Features Active:',features);
// VR detection
if(navigator.xr){console.log('✅ WebXR supported');features.push('vr-active');}
// Biometric detection
if(navigator.credentials&&navigator.credentials.get){console.log('✅ Biometric API available');}
// Offline detection
if(navigator.onLine){console.log('🌐 Online');window.addEventListener('offline',()=>console.log('📴 Offline mode activated'));}
</script>
