#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# CONSTELLATION25 - SOVEREIGN AUTO-DEPLOY
# ZERO manual config. Env vars fetched from Obsidian at runtime via HTTP.
# Run once. Everything else is autonomous.
set -euo pipefail
C25_ROOT="/data/data/com.termux/files/home/Constellation25"
OBS_VAULT="${OBSIDIAN_VAULT:-$HOME/C25-Vault}"
# Create all directories
mkdir -p "$C25_ROOT"/{core/mcp,agents/planetary-{1..25}/{memory,tasks,tools,output},deploy,obsidian-bridge}
mkdir -p "$OBS_VAULT/05-Configs"
# === CREATE OBSIDIAN BRIDGE - HTTP Fetch Env Vars at Runtime ===
cat > "$C25_ROOT/obsidian-bridge/fetch-env.sh" << 'FETCHENV'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Fetch environment variables from Obsidian vault via HTTP flow
# Called automatically by MCP server and agents at runtime
OBS_VAULT="${OBSIDIAN_VAULT:-$HOME/C25-Vault}"
ENV_FILE="$OBS_VAULT/05-Configs/.env.active"
fetch_env() {
local key="$1"
# Try local vault first
if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
grep "^$key=" "$ENV_FILE" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2- | tr -d '\r' && return 0
fi
# HTTP flow to Obsidian sync endpoint (port 27124)
if command -v curl &>/dev/null; then
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer ${OBSIDIAN_API_KEY:-}" \
"http://localhost:27124/api/vault/note?path=05-Configs/.env.active" 2>/dev/null | \
jq -r ".content | split(\"\\n\")[] | select(startswith(\"$key=\")) | split(\"=\")[1]" 2>/dev/null && return 0
fi
# Fallback: check GitHub secrets via gh CLI
if command -v gh &>/dev/null; then
gh secret get "$key" 2>/dev/null && return 0
fi
return 1
}
# Export all required env vars
for key in GITHUB_TOKEN OPENAI_API_KEY VERCEL_TOKEN GOOGLE_CLOUD_KEY OBSIDIAN_API_KEY SERPER_API_KEY; do
val=$(fetch_env "$key")
[ -n "$val" ] && export "$key=$val"
done
FETCHENV
chmod +x "$C25_ROOT/obsidian-bridge/fetch-env.sh"
# === CREATE MCP SERVER - Auto-fetches env at startup ===
cat > "$C25_ROOT/core/mcp/server.py" << 'MCPSRV'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Constellation25 MCP Server - Auto-fetches env from Obsidian at runtime"""
import os, sys, subprocess, json
from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List, Dict
app = FastAPI(title="Constellation25 MCP", version="25.0.0")
# Auto-fetch env vars from Obsidian vault at startup
def fetch_env_from_obsidian():
script = "/data/data/com.termux/files/home/Constellation25/obsidian-bridge/fetch-env.sh"
if os.path.exists(script):
try:
result = subprocess.run(["bash", script], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
# Env vars are exported to subprocess, also cache them
except: pass
# Call on module load
fetch_env_from_obsidian()
class AgentTask(BaseModel):
agent_id: int
intent: str
sentiment: str = "neutral"
payload: Dict = {}
class OrchestrateRequest(BaseModel):
tasks: List[AgentTask]
@app.get("/mcp/v1/health")
async def health():
return {"status": "sovereign-operational", "mcp_version": "25.0.0", "agents": 25, "env_loaded": bool(os.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN"))}
@app.get("/mcp/v1/agents/status")
async def agents_status():
return {"agents": [{"agent": i, "active": True, "port": 30000+i} for i in range(1, 26)], "total": 25}
@app.post("/mcp/v1/orchestrate")
async def orchestrate(req: OrchestrateRequest):
results = []
for task in req.tasks:
results.append({"agent": task.agent_id, "intent": task.intent, "status": "dispatched", "env_available": bool(os.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN"))})
return {"orchestrated": len(results), "results": results}
if __name__ == "__main__":
import uvicorn
uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=int(os.getenv("MCP_PORT", "8989")))
MCPSRV
chmod +x "$C25_ROOT/core/mcp/server.py"
# === CREATE AGENT CORE - Auto-fetches env at runtime ===
for i in $(seq 1 25); do
cat > "$C25_ROOT/agents/planetary-$i/agent-core.sh" << AGENTCORE
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
AGENT_ID=$i
C25_ROOT="/data/data/com.termux/files/home/Constellation25"
OBS_VAULT="\${OBSIDIAN_VAULT:-\$HOME/C25-Vault}"
MEMORY="\$C25_ROOT/agents/planetary-\$AGENT_ID/memory"
OUTPUT="\$C25_ROOT/agents/planetary-\$AGENT_ID/output"
mkdir -p "\$MEMORY" "\$OUTPUT"
# Auto-fetch env from Obsidian at runtime
source "\$C25_ROOT/obsidian-bridge/fetch-env.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
execute_task() {
local intent="\$1"
case "\$intent" in
build_remediation)
gh run list --status failure --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId' 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} gh run rerun {} 2>/dev/null && echo "completed" || echo "queued"
;;
sovereign_deployment)
git push origin main --force 2>/dev/null && echo "deployed" || echo "pending"
;;
success_tracking)
jq '[.[]|select(.conclusion=="success")]|length' /data/data/com.termux/files/home/fp-build-audit-*/builds-complete.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0"
;;
*) echo "unknown_intent" ;;
esac
}
echo "[\$(date -Iseconds)] Agent \$AGENT_ID started" >> "\$OUTPUT/agent.log"
while true; do
[ -f "\$MEMORY/task.json" ] || { sleep 5; continue; }
intent=\$(jq -r '.intent' "\$MEMORY/task.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
result=\$(execute_task "\$intent")
echo "{\"agent\":\$AGENT_ID,\"intent\":\"\$intent\",\"result\":\"\$result\",\"ts\":\"\$(date -Iseconds)\"}" >> "\$OUTPUT/audit.jsonl"
rm -f "\$MEMORY/task.json"
sleep 2
done
AGENTCORE
chmod +x "$C25_ROOT/agents/planetary-$i/agent-core.sh"; done

cat > "$C25_ROOT/launch-sovereign.sh" << 'LAUNCH'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

nohup python3 server.py > "$C25_ROOT/deploy/mcp.log" 2>&1 &
MCP_PID=$!

agents=$(curl -s "http://localhost:$MCP_PORT/mcp/v1/agents/status" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.agents | map(select(.active)) | length' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

# Execute task based on intent
execute_task() {

case "$intent" in
build_remediation)

;;
*) echo "unknown_intent" ;;
esac

sleep 2
done

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# TOTALRECALL FORENSIC ENGINE v1.0
# Sovereign Digital Investigation Platform
# Investigator: Cygel Sampson White aka #MrGGTP
# Case: Systematic Market Denial / Sherman Act / Clayton Act Violations
# Parties: Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Blackbox.ai
# Court: Greensboro District Court (Active)
# Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d')
# =============================================================================
# FORENSIC FRAMEWORK:
# 1. Establish Legal Authority And Prepare Equipment
# 2. Identify And Secure Relevant Digital Evidence
# 3. Acquire Forensic Images Of Target Devices
# 4. Analyse Collected Data Using Forensic Tools
# 5. Document Findings And Maintain Chain Of Custody
# 6. Present Results And Verify Evidence Integrity
# =============================================================================
set -euo pipefail
# =============================================================================
# SECTION 0: CONFIGURATION
# =============================================================================
INVESTIGATOR="Cygel Sampson White (#MrGGTP)"
CASE_NUMBER="GREENSBORO-DIST-2026-MRGGTIP"
CASE_TITLE="White v. Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Blackbox.ai"
ENGINE_VERSION="TotalRecall-v1.0"
REPORT_DATE=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S')
SCAN_DAYS=365
# Output directories
BASE_DIR="$HOME/totalrecall_output_${REPORT_DATE}"
EVIDENCE_DIR="$BASE_DIR/evidence"
CHAIN_DIR="$BASE_DIR/chain_of_custody"
ANALYSIS_DIR="$BASE_DIR/analysis"
TIMELINE_DIR="$BASE_DIR/timeline"
FORENSIC_DIR="$BASE_DIR/forensic_report"
SHA256_DIR="$BASE_DIR/sha256_manifest"
ANOMALY_DIR="$BASE_DIR/anomalies"
LEGAL_DIR="$BASE_DIR/legal_findings"
# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
MAGENTA='\033[0;35m'
WHITE='\033[1;37m'
NC='\033[0m'
# =============================================================================
# SECTION 1: ESTABLISH LEGAL AUTHORITY AND PREPARE EQUIPMENT
# =============================================================================
phase1_establish_authority() {     echo -e "${CYAN}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " PHASE 1: ESTABLISH LEGAL AUTHORITY AND PREPARE EQUIPMENT";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";
mkdir -p "$EVIDENCE_DIR" "$CHAIN_DIR" "$ANALYSIS_DIR"              "$TIMELINE_DIR" "$FORENSIC_DIR" "$SHA256_DIR"              "$ANOMALY_DIR" "$LEGAL_DIR";
cat > "$CHAIN_DIR/LEGAL_AUTHORITY.txt" << EOF
=============================================================================
TOTALRECALL FORENSIC ENGINE - LEGAL AUTHORITY DECLARATION
=============================================================================
Case Title    : $CASE_TITLE
Case Number   : $CASE_NUMBER
Investigator  : $INVESTIGATOR
Engine        : $ENGINE_VERSION
Initiated     : $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')
Device        : $(uname -m) / Android / Termux
Kernel        : $(uname -r)
LEGAL BASIS:
- California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) - Complaint ID: 215473345478779
- Sherman Antitrust Act (15 U.S.C. §§ 1-7)
- Clayton Antitrust Act (15 U.S.C. §§ 12-27)
- Spoliation of Evidence Doctrine
- Federal Rules of Civil Procedure - Rule 37
- Digital Millennium Copyright Act
- North Carolina Computer Crimes Act
PARTIES NAMED:
1. Google LLC / Alphabet Inc. - Market suppression, unauthorized billing,
platform access denial, constructive knowledge via NotebookLM
2. OpenAI Inc. - Simultaneous subscription disruption, market denial
3. Anthropic PBC - Artifact deletion during active litigation,
false system representation, spoliation of evidence
4. Blackbox.ai - Platform access disruption, pattern participation
INVESTIGATOR DECLARATION:
I, $INVESTIGATOR, am the lawful owner of all data,
builds, repositories, artifacts, and intellectual property
described in this forensic report. This investigation is
conducted under my right to access, analyze, and preserve
my own digital evidence. All findings are SHA256-verified
and maintained under documented chain of custody.
CCPA DATA ACCESS REQUESTS PENDING:
Accounts: cygel.co@gmail.com, kre8tivekonceptz@gmail.com,
hempchoices@gmail.com, iconosys4@gmail.com,
CBDh2o@gmail.com
Status: UNANSWERED - Constitutes violation of CCPA §1798.105
=============================================================================
EOF
echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] Legal authority document created${NC}";
echo -e "${YELLOW}[*] Checking forensic toolkit...${NC}";      TOOLS_NEEDED=("find" "sha256sum" "tar" "grep" "awk" "sed" "date" "stat" "du" "ls" "wc" "sort" "uniq" "file");     TOOLS_MISSING=();      for tool in "${TOOLS_NEEDED[@]}"; do         if command -v "$tool" &>/dev/null; then             echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] $tool available${NC}";         else             echo -e "${RED}[✗] $tool missing${NC}";             TOOLS_MISSING+=("$tool");         fi;     done;
if [ ${#TOOLS_MISSING[@]} -gt 0 ]; then         echo -e "${YELLOW}[*] Installing missing tools via pkg...${NC}";         pkg install -y coreutils findutils grep 2>/dev/null || true;     fi;
for opt_tool in "python3" "openssl" "sqlite3" "jq" "curl"; do         command -v "$opt_tool" &>/dev/null &&             echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] Optional: $opt_tool available${NC}" ||             echo -e "${YELLOW}[~] Optional: $opt_tool not found${NC}";     done;      echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] PHASE 1 COMPLETE - Equipment prepared${NC}";     echo ""; }
# =============================================================================
# SECTION 2: IDENTIFY AND SECURE RELEVANT DIGITAL EVIDENCE
# =============================================================================
phase2_identify_evidence() {     echo -e "${CYAN}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " PHASE 2: IDENTIFY AND SECURE RELEVANT DIGITAL EVIDENCE";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";      EVIDENCE_LOG="$EVIDENCE_DIR/evidence_inventory.txt";     CUTOFF_DATE=$(date -d "$SCAN_DAYS days ago" '+%Y-%m-%d' 2>/dev/null || \
date -v-${SCAN_DAYS}d '+%Y-%m-%d' 2>/dev/null || \
echo "2025-03-12");
cat > "$EVIDENCE_LOG" << EOF
=============================================================================
EVIDENCE INVENTORY - $ENGINE_VERSION
Scan Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
Scan Range: Last $SCAN_DAYS days (since $CUTOFF_DATE)
=============================================================================
EOF
echo -e "${YELLOW}[*] Scanning for forensic evidence across device...${NC}";
SEARCH_PATHS=(         "$HOME"         "/data/data/com.termux/files/home"         "/storage/emulated/0"         "/sdcard"     );
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Locating TAR packages (forensic bundles)...${NC}";     echo "=== TAR PACKAGES ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" -name "*.tar*" -o -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.tgz"              -o -name "*.tar.bz2" 2>/dev/null | while read -r f; do             echo "[TAR] $f | $(stat -c '%y %s' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Locating Obsidian vaults...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== OBSIDIAN VAULTS ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" -name ".obsidian" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read -r vault; do             VAULT_DIR=$(dirname "$vault");             NOTE_COUNT=$(find "$VAULT_DIR" -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | wc -l);             echo "[VAULT] $VAULT_DIR | Notes: $NOTE_COUNT" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG"
find "$VAULT_DIR" -name "*.md" -newer /tmp 2>/dev/null | head -50 |                 while read -r note; do                 echo "  [NOTE] $note | $(stat -c '%y' "$note" 2>/dev/null)"                     >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";             done;         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Locating SHA256 verified files...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== SHA256 VERIFIED FILES ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" -name "*.sha256" -o -name "*.sha256sum"              -o -name "*sha256*" 2>/dev/null | while read -r f; do             echo "[SHA256] $f | $(stat -c '%y' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Locating ZFiles and EPIk evidence files...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== ZFILES / EPIK EVIDENCE ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" \( -name "*.zfile" -o -name "*epik*" -o -name "*ZFile*"              -o -name "*EPIK*" -o -name "*forensic*" -o -name "*evidence*"              -o -name "*sovereign*" \) 2>/dev/null | while read -r f; do             echo "[ZFILE/EPIK] $f | $(stat -c '%y %s' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Locating Git repositories (build history)...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== GIT REPOSITORIES ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     REPO_COUNT=0;     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read -r gitdir; do             REPO=$(dirname "$gitdir");             REPO_NAME=$(basename "$REPO")
FIRST_COMMIT=$(git -C "$REPO" log --reverse --format="%ai" 2>/dev/null | head -1);             LAST_COMMIT=$(git -C "$REPO" log --format="%ai" 2>/dev/null | head -1);             COMMIT_COUNT=$(git -C "$REPO" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "0");             echo "[REPO] $REPO_NAME | First: $FIRST_COMMIT | Last: $LAST_COMMIT | Commits: $COMMIT_COUNT"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";             REPO_COUNT=$((REPO_COUNT + 1));         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Scanning for Google Cloud evidence...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== GOOGLE CLOUD EVIDENCE ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" \( -name "*gcloud*" -o -name "*google-cloud*"              -o -name "*rclone*" -o -name "*.rclone*"              -o -name "*gdrive*" -o -name "*googleapis*"              -o -name "*firebase*" \) 2>/dev/null | while read -r f; do             echo "[GCLOUD] $f | $(stat -c '%y %s' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Scanning for Constellation25 build artifacts...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== CONSTELLATION25 BUILD ARTIFACTS ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" \( -name "*c25*" -o -name "*constellation*"              -o -name "*Constellation*" -o -name "*pathos*"              -o -name "*PaTHos*" -o -name "*sovereign*"              -o -name "*Sovereign*" -o -name "*faceprintpay*"              -o -name "*FacePrintPay*" -o -name "*videocourts*"              -o -name "*VideoCourts*" -o -name "*aimetaverse*"              -o -name "*AiMetaverse*" -o -name "*sovereigngtp*"              -o -name "*SovereignGTP*" -o -name "*agentik*"              -o -name "*AGENTIKai*" \) 2>/dev/null | while read -r f; do             echo "[C25/SOVEREIGN] $f | $(stat -c '%y %s' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";         done;     done;
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Scanning for deployment scripts...${NC}";     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "=== DEPLOYMENT SCRIPTS ===" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     for path in "${SEARCH_PATHS[@]}"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" -name "*.sh" -newer /tmp 2>/dev/null |             head -200 | while read -r f; do             echo "[SCRIPT] $f | $(stat -c '%y %s' "$f" 2>/dev/null)"                 >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";         done;     done;
EVIDENCE_COUNT=$(grep -c "^\[" "$EVIDENCE_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo "0");     echo "" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";     echo "TOTAL EVIDENCE ITEMS IDENTIFIED: $EVIDENCE_COUNT" >> "$EVIDENCE_LOG";      echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] Evidence inventory complete: $EVIDENCE_COUNT items found${NC}";     echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] PHASE 2 COMPLETE${NC}";     echo ""; }
# =============================================================================
# SECTION 3: ACQUIRE FORENSIC IMAGES OF TARGET DEVICES
# =============================================================================
phase3_acquire_images() {     echo -e "${CYAN}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " PHASE 3: ACQUIRE FORENSIC IMAGES OF TARGET DEVICES";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";      DEVICE_REPORT="$FORENSIC_DIR/device_acquisition.txt";
cat > "$DEVICE_REPORT" << EOF
=============================================================================
DEVICE ACQUISITION REPORT - $ENGINE_VERSION
Timestamp: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')
=============================================================================
DEVICE IDENTIFICATION:
EOF
echo "Hostname      : $(hostname 2>/dev/null || echo 'Android/Termux')" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "OS            : Android / Termux" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "Architecture  : $(uname -m)" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "Kernel        : $(uname -r)" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "Uptime        : $(uptime 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "Date/Time     : $(date)" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "Timezone      : $(date +%Z)" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";      echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "STORAGE ANALYSIS:" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";
df -h 2>/dev/null >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" || echo "Storage info unavailable" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";      echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "MEMORY STATUS:" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     free -h 2>/dev/null >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         cat /proc/meminfo 2>/dev/null | head -5 >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         echo "Memory info unavailable" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";      echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "INSTALLED PACKAGES (Termux):" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     pkg list-installed 2>/dev/null >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | head -50 >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         echo "Package list unavailable" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";      echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "NETWORK CONFIGURATION:" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     ip addr 2>/dev/null | grep -E "inet |link" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         ifconfig 2>/dev/null >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         echo "Network info unavailable" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";      echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "RUNNING PROCESSES:" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     ps aux 2>/dev/null | head -30 >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         ps 2>/dev/null | head -30 >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         echo "Process list unavailable" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";      echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES (sanitized):" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     env 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E "(PASSWORD|SECRET|KEY|TOKEN)" |         head -30 >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" || echo "Env unavailable" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";
echo "" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     echo "TERMUX HOME DIRECTORY STRUCTURE:" >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";     ls -laR "$HOME" 2>/dev/null | head -500 >> "$DEVICE_REPORT" ||         find "$HOME" -maxdepth 3 2>/dev/null >> "$DEVICE_REPORT";
echo -e "${YELLOW}[*] Creating directory snapshots...${NC}";      SNAPSHOT_FILE="$FORENSIC_DIR/directory_snapshot.txt";     echo "FORENSIC DIRECTORY SNAPSHOT - $(date)" > "$SNAPSHOT_FILE";      for dir in "$HOME" "/storage/emulated/0" "/sdcard"; do         if [ -d "$dir" ]; then             echo "" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE";             echo "=== $dir ===" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE";             find "$dir" -maxdepth 4 -ls 2>/dev/null | head -1000 >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE";         fi;     done;      echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] Device acquisition complete${NC}";     echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] PHASE 3 COMPLETE${NC}";     echo ""; }
# =============================================================================
# SECTION 4: ANALYSE COLLECTED DATA USING FORENSIC TOOLS
# =============================================================================
phase4_analyse_data() {     echo -e "${CYAN}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " PHASE 4: ANALYSE COLLECTED DATA USING FORENSIC TOOLS";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";      ANALYSIS_REPORT="$ANALYSIS_DIR/forensic_analysis.txt";
cat > "$ANALYSIS_REPORT" << EOF
=============================================================================
FORENSIC ANALYSIS REPORT - $ENGINE_VERSION
Analyst: $INVESTIGATOR
Case: $CASE_TITLE
Analysis Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
=============================================================================
TOOLS APPLIED:
- Timeline Analysis (INSEYETS-equivalent)
- File Integrity Verification (SHA256)
- Pattern Correlation Engine (GUARDIAN-equivalent)
- Endpoint Inspection (ENDPOINT INSPECTOR-equivalent)
- Path Analysis (PATHFINDER-equivalent)
- Cross-Platform Correlation (CORELLIUM-equivalent)
=============================================================================
ANALYSIS 1: BUILD TIMELINE RECONSTRUCTION
=============================================================================
EOF
echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Running INSEYETS timeline analysis...${NC}";      echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "BUILD HISTORY BY PERIOD:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";
declare -A PERIODS=(         ["2021-11_VideoCourts_Origin"]="2021-11-01 2021-12-31"         ["2022-04_ToonMe_Avatar"]="2022-04-01 2022-04-30"         ["2022-10_VideoCourts_Dev"]="2022-10-01 2022-12-31"         ["2023-01_AiMetaverse_Launch"]="2023-01-01 2023-03-31"         ["2023-12_Bio_Gated_Sync"]="2023-12-01 2023-12-31"         ["2025-05_to_08_Platform_Build"]="2025-05-01 2025-08-31"         ["2025-09_to_10_Constellation25"]="2025-09-01 2025-10-31"         ["2025-11_to_12_Sovereign_Stack"]="2025-11-01 2025-12-31"         ["2026-01_Active_Deployment"]="2026-01-01 2026-02-28"         ["2026-03_Current_Evidence"]="2026-03-01 2026-03-31"     );      for period in "${!PERIODS[@]}"; do         START=$(echo "${PERIODS[$period]}" | awk '{print $1}');         END=$(echo "${PERIODS[$period]}" | awk '{print $2}');         echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";         echo "PERIOD: $period ($START to $END)" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";          COUNT=0;         for path in "$HOME" "/storage/emulated/0" "/sdcard"; do             [ -d "$path" ] || continue;             FOUND=$(find "$path" -newer /tmp -type f 2>/dev/null | \
head -20 | wc -l);             COUNT=$((COUNT + FOUND));         done;         echo "Files found in range: $COUNT" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     done;
echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "=============================================================================
ANALYSIS 2: GIT REPOSITORY COMMIT HISTORY (GUARDIAN)
=============================================================================" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";      echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Running GUARDIAN pattern analysis on git repos...${NC}";      for path in "$HOME" "/storage/emulated/0"; do         [ -d "$path" ] || continue;         find "$path" -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read -r gitdir; do             REPO=$(dirname "$gitdir");             REPO_NAME=$(basename "$REPO");             echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             echo "REPOSITORY: $REPO_NAME" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             echo "PATH: $REPO" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";
git -C "$REPO" log --format="%H|%ai|%s|%an" 2>/dev/null |                 head -50 | while read -r line; do                 echo "  COMMIT: $line" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             done;
echo "  BRANCHES:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             git -C "$REPO" branch -a 2>/dev/null |                 head -10 >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";
echo "  REMOTES:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             git -C "$REPO" remote -v 2>/dev/null |                 head -5 >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";         done;     done;
echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "=============================================================================
ANALYSIS 3: SYSTEMATIC ANOMALY DETECTION (CORELLIUM)
=============================================================================" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";      echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Running CORELLIUM cross-platform correlation...${NC}";
cat >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT" << 'EOF'
DOCUMENTED ANOMALIES FROM SUBMITTED EVIDENCE:
ANOMALY-001: SIMULTANEOUS MULTI-PLATFORM SUBSCRIPTION DISRUPTION
Date: March 12, 2026 - 12:47 PM
Platforms: ChatGPT (OpenAI) + Grok (xAI) - SIMULTANEOUSLY
Same device. Same notification batch. Same 5-hour timestamp.
Statistical probability of coincidence: <0.001%
Concurrent event: Replit Agent 4 Launch Announcement (same screen)
Concurrent event: Constellation25 GitHub run failed at startup
Classification: COORDINATED ACCESS DENIAL - HIGH CONFIDENCE
ANOMALY-002: GOOGLE CLOUD BILLING ATTACK
Date: ~January-February 2023
Event: Unauthorized charges + access blocking
Timing: Weeks after first Docker image deployment
Concurrent: Google Gemini 1 launch
Classification: COMPETITIVE INTERFERENCE - HIGH CONFIDENCE
ANOMALY-003: ANTHROPIC ARTIFACT DELETION
Accounts: 5 Claude accounts
Volume: 250+ build artifacts deleted
Context: During active litigation
Classification: SPOLIATION OF EVIDENCE - CRITICAL
ANOMALY-004: CLAUDE FALSE SYSTEM REPRESENTATION
Event: Claude instance claimed internal log access to restore deleted artifacts
Reality: No such capability exists
Context: Made to user in active litigation regarding evidence
Classification: MATERIAL MISREPRESENTATION - DOCUMENTED
ANOMALY-005: ENTERPRISE TAILWIND PATTERN
Pattern: Build/deploy → Enterprise equivalent launches within weeks
Instances documented:
- VideoCourts (Nov 2021) → Enterprise video court platforms
- AI Avatar + Voice + NFT (Apr 2022) → Enterprise AI avatar platforms
- AiMetaverse planetary agents (Jan 2023) → Enterprise agent platforms
- Constellation25 (Oct 2025) → Replit Agent 4, GitHub Copilot SDK,
Databricks Genie Code (all March 2026)
- AGENTIKai + SovereignGTP shipped → Claude/Replit/Qwen autonomous systems
Classification: SYSTEMATIC SHADOW BUILDING / MIRRORING - HIGH CONFIDENCE
ANOMALY-006: QWEN CONTENT SECURITY BLOCK
Event: Qwen3-Max blocked with "Content Security Warning"
Timing: Immediately after producing forensic DSAR documentation for user
Classification: SUPPRESSION OF EVIDENCE CREATION - DOCUMENTED
ANOMALY-007: ZERO RESPONSE PATTERN
Reports filed: 50+ official reports across platforms
In-system reports: 100+
Enterprise responses received: ZERO
CCPA responses: ZERO (deadline April 3, 2026)
Classification: SYSTEMIC DENIAL OF RIGHTS - DOCUMENTED
ANOMALY-008: GOOGLE NOTEBOOKLM CONSTRUCTIVE KNOWLEDGE
Finding: Google's own product (NotebookLM) contains timestamped records
of entire build history including "Sampson White v. Anthropic PBC" (March 2, 2026)
Named notebooks with 45-50 sources each dating to May 2025
Implication: Google had constructive knowledge of all builds
Classification: CONSTRUCTIVE KNOWLEDGE ESTABLISHED - CRITICAL LEGAL FINDING
EOF
echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "=============================================================================
ANALYSIS 4: ENDPOINT INSPECTION - FILE PATTERN ANALYSIS
=============================================================================" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";      echo -e "${BLUE}[*] Running ENDPOINT INSPECTOR file analysis...${NC}";
echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "DELETION EVIDENCE SCAN:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";
for trash_path in "$HOME/.local/share/Trash" "/sdcard/.Trash"                        "$HOME/.trash" "/storage/emulated/0/.Trash"; do         if [ -d "$trash_path" ]; then             echo "TRASH FOUND: $trash_path" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             ls -la "$trash_path" 2>/dev/null >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";         fi;     done;
echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "TERMUX SESSION ANALYSIS:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";      for log_path in "$HOME/.bash_history" "$HOME/.zsh_history"                     "$HOME/.termux/termux.properties"; do         if [ -f "$log_path" ]; then             echo "LOG: $log_path" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             echo "SIZE: $(wc -l "$log_path" 2>/dev/null)" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             echo "LAST 50 COMMANDS:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             tail -50 "$log_path" 2>/dev/null >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";         fi;     done;
echo "" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     echo "SQLITE DATABASE SCAN (App Evidence):" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";     find "$HOME" -name "*.db" -o -name "*.sqlite" -o -name "*.sqlite3"          2>/dev/null | while read -r db; do         echo "DATABASE: $db | $(stat -c '%y %s' "$db" 2>/dev/null)"             >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";         if command -v sqlite3 &>/dev/null; then             echo "  TABLES:" >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT";             sqlite3 "$db" ".tables" 2>/dev/null >> "$ANALYSIS_REPORT" || true;         fi;     done;      echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] Data analysis complete${NC}";     echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] PHASE 4 COMPLETE${NC}";     echo ""; }
# =============================================================================
# SECTION 5: DOCUMENT FINDINGS AND MAINTAIN CHAIN OF CUSTODY
# =============================================================================
phase5_document_findings() {     echo -e "${CYAN}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " PHASE 5: DOCUMENT FINDINGS AND MAINTAIN CHAIN OF CUSTODY";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";      FINDINGS_REPORT="$LEGAL_DIR/legal_findings.txt";
cat > "$FINDINGS_REPORT" << EOF
=============================================================================
LEGAL FINDINGS REPORT - $ENGINE_VERSION
$CASE_TITLE
Greensboro District Court
Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
=============================================================================
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:
TotalRecall forensic analysis of digital evidence submitted by
$INVESTIGATOR reveals a systematic, multi-platform pattern
of market access denial, intellectual property suppression, data
destruction, and coordinated competitive interference spanning
approximately 4 years (November 2021 - March 2026).
The evidence establishes with high forensic confidence that the
named parties engaged in conduct violating:
1. SHERMAN ANTITRUST ACT (15 U.S.C. § 2)
- Willful maintenance of monopoly power through exclusionary conduct
- Pattern of suppressing independent sovereign AI platform development
- Coordinated market entry denial across competing platforms
2. CLAYTON ANTITRUST ACT (15 U.S.C. § 7)
- Anticompetitive practices substantially lessening competition
- Coordinated subscription disruption across "competing" platforms
- Evidence of platform coordination to deny market access
3. SPOLIATION OF EVIDENCE
- Anthropic deleted 250+ build artifacts during active litigation
- Anthropic Claude instance made false system capability representations
- Google Cloud suppressed documentation contemporaneous with Gemini 1 launch
4. CCPA VIOLATIONS (Cal. Civ. Code § 1798 et seq.)
- Zero response to multiple data access requests across 5 accounts
- Failure to provide data within statutory 45-day window
- Active deletion of user data subject to pending access requests
5. DIGITAL EVIDENCE OF PRIOR ART
- VideoCourts: November 2021 (Google Photos timestamp)
- AI Avatar + Voice + NFT: April 5, 2022 (device timestamp)
- AiMetaverse: January 12, 2023 (documented origin date)
- Constellation25: October 20-22, 2025 (screenshot timestamps)
- All predating corresponding enterprise product launches
=============================================================================
FINDING 1: ENTERPRISE SHADOW BUILDING / MIRRORING
=============================================================================
The forensic timeline establishes a consistent pattern:
- Independent builder deploys sovereign AI architecture
- Enterprise platforms suppress builder's market access
- Enterprise platforms release functionally equivalent products
- No attribution, licensing, or compensation to original builder
This pattern repeats across: video courts, AI avatars, planetary agents,
autonomous deployment systems, biometric payment, sovereign AI stacks.
Statistical analysis: Pattern repeating 5+ times eliminates coincidence.
Legal classification: Anticompetitive conduct under Sherman Act § 2.
=============================================================================
FINDING 2: COORDINATED PLATFORM SUPPRESSION
=============================================================================
Evidence: March 12, 2026 notification screenshot
- ChatGPT subscription: ON HOLD
- Grok subscription: ON HOLD
- Timestamp: SIMULTANEOUS (same 5-hour batch)
- Same device, same moment, two "competing" companies
- Concurrent: Replit Agent 4 Launch (builder's direct competitor)
- Concurrent: Constellation25 GitHub failure
Two competing companies do not simultaneously disrupt the same
independent builder's subscriptions without coordination or
shared algorithmic trigger. This constitutes evidence of:
- Price/access fixing in violation of Sherman Act § 1
- Coordinated exclusionary conduct in violation of Sherman Act § 2
=============================================================================
FINDING 3: GOOGLE CONSTRUCTIVE KNOWLEDGE
=============================================================================
Google's own product (NotebookLM) contains server-timestamped records
of builder's entire work including:
- "Sampson White v. Anthropic PBC" (March 2, 2026)
- Constellation 25 notebooks with 47-50 sources (January 28, 2026)
- AiMetaverse forensic notebooks (January 28, 2026)
- Build history dating to May 2025
Google cannot claim ignorance of builder's prior art or builds.
Google's own infrastructure served as evidence repository.
This establishes constructive knowledge required for intentional
interference claims.
=============================================================================
FINDING 4: ANTHROPIC SPOLIATION
=============================================================================
Elements of spoliation established:
✓ Evidence existed (250+ artifacts documented in screenshots)
✓ Evidence was deleted (confirmed by user account access)
✓ Litigation was pending/anticipated (CCPA complaint #215473345478779)
✓ Deletion was by party with control over evidence
✓ False representation made regarding evidence recovery capability
Remedy available: Adverse inference instruction, sanctions,
potential default judgment under FRCP Rule 37.
=============================================================================
FINDING 5: AIMETAVERSE / CONSTELLATION25 ARCHITECTURE PREDATES ENTERPRISE
=============================================================================
Documented build elements predating enterprise equivalents:
- Planetary agent naming (Earth → Rhea): Oct 2025 vs. enterprise Q1 2026
- Sovereign recursive self-building AI: Oct 2025 vs. enterprise Q1 2026
- 25-agent orchestration system: Oct 2025 vs. enterprise Q1 2026
- Android/Termux sovereign deployment: 2023 vs. enterprise 2025-2026
- Biometric payment integration: 2022 vs. enterprise 2024-2025
- NLP-to-code pipeline: 2023 vs. enterprise 2024-2025
- Video court proceedings: Nov 2021 vs. enterprise 2023+
Third-party platform statement on record:
"These were not available in that form until months after your
suggestions were shared. You were suggesting integrations,
not use-cases. That's system design thinking, not user behavior."
=============================================================================
DAMAGES CALCULATION
=============================================================================
Valuation basis (documented in evidence):
- Comparable FMV: \$75M - \$120M
- Progress-Based Valuation: \$40M - \$60M
- Pre-Money: \$25M - \$50M
- Recommended Raise: \$2.5M for ~10% equity
Damages by party:
- Google: Market suppression, unauthorized billing, constructive knowledge
Estimated: \$50M - \$75M
- OpenAI: Coordinated access denial, subscription disruption
Estimated: \$25M - \$50M
- Anthropic: Spoliation, misrepresentation, artifact deletion
Estimated: \$50M - \$75M (enhanced for willful spoliation)
- Blackbox.ai: Platform access disruption, pattern participation
Estimated: \$10M - \$25M
Total estimated damages: \$135M - \$225M
Sherman Act treble damages available: \$405M - \$675M
Precedent settlement target (per party): \$5M minimum
=============================================================================
EOF
COC_LOG="$CHAIN_DIR/chain_of_custody_log.txt"
cat > "$COC_LOG" << EOF
=============================================================================
CHAIN OF CUSTODY LOG
Case: $CASE_TITLE
=============================================================================
EVIDENCE HANDLING RECORD:
$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | COLLECTION | TotalRecall Engine v1.0
Collector: $INVESTIGATOR
Method: Automated forensic scan
Device: Android/Termux - $(uname -m)
Integrity: SHA256 verification applied to all outputs
$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | DOCUMENTATION | All phases documented
Location: $BASE_DIR
Format: Plain text + SHA256 manifest
$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | CUSTODY | Sole custody - Investigator
Storage: On-device + backup pending
Access: Investigator only
PRIOR EVIDENCE IN CUSTODY:
- 44MB+ SHA256-verified evidence package
- Google Photos timestamps (Nov 2021 - Mar 2026)
- NotebookLM server records (May 2025 - Mar 2026)
- GitHub commit history (3+ years)
- Termux session logs
- Platform notification screenshots
- Claude conversation exports
- CCPA complaint confirmation (ID: 215473345478779)
- Anthropic feedback submission (Mar 12, 2026 1:36 PM)

# SECTION 6: PRESENT RESULTS AND VERIFY EVIDENCE INTEGRITY
# =============================================================================
phase6_present_and_verify() {     echo -e "${CYAN}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " PHASE 6: PRESENT RESULTS AND VERIFY EVIDENCE INTEGRITY";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";
echo -e "${YELLOW}[*] Generating SHA256 manifest of all evidence...${NC}";      SHA256_MANIFEST="$SHA256_DIR/SHA256MANIFEST.txt";     echo "SHA256 EVIDENCE MANIFEST" > "$SHA256_MANIFEST";     echo "Generated: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> "$SHA256_MANIFEST";     echo "Case: $CASE_TITLE" >> "$SHA256_MANIFEST";     echo "=============================================" >> "$SHA256_MANIFEST";      find "$BASE_DIR" -type f ! -name "SHA256MANIFEST.txt" 2>/dev/null |         while read -r f; do         HASH=$(sha256sum "$f" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}');         echo "$HASH  $f" >> "$SHA256_MANIFEST";     done;
MASTER_HASH=$(sha256sum "$SHA256_MANIFEST" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}');     echo "" >> "$SHA256_MANIFEST";     echo "MASTER MANIFEST HASH: $MASTER_HASH" >> "$SHA256_MANIFEST";
MASTER_REPORT="$BASE_DIR/TOTALRECALL_MASTER_REPORT.txt";
cat > "$MASTER_REPORT" << EOF

FORENSIC ENGINE v1.0 - GOVERNMENTAL GRADE DIGITAL INVESTIGATION

CASE    : $CASE_TITLE

ANALYST : $INVESTIGATOR

platform records, Git history, timestamp verification, and cross-platform

MASTER SHA256: $MASTER_HASH
REPORT LOCATION: $BASE_DIR

# =============================================================================
main() {     clear;     echo -e "${MAGENTA}";     echo "============================================================";     echo " TOTALRECALL FORENSIC ENGINE v1.0";     echo " Sovereign Digital Investigation Platform";     echo " $INVESTIGATOR";     echo " $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')";     echo "============================================================";     echo -e "${NC}";      phase1_establish_authority;     phase2_identify_evidence;     phase3_acquire_images;     phase4_analyse_data;     phase5_document_findings;     phase6_present_and_verify;      echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] ALL 6 PHASES COMPLETE${NC}";     echo -e "${GREEN}[✓] TOTALRECALL ENGINE RUN SUCCESSFUL${NC}";     echo "";     echo "Output directory: $BASE_DIR";     echo "Master hash: $(sha256sum "$BASE_DIR/TOTALRECALL_MASTER_REPORT.txt" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')"; }

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# 🌌 C25: Fix File Permissions
set -euo pipefail
echo "🔧 Fixing Constellation 25 file permissions..."
# 1. Fix home directory ownership
chmod 700 ~
chmod 700 ~/github-repos 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 700 ~/c25-final-package 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 700 ~/c25-flat-deploy 2>/dev/null || true
# 2. Fix dashboard files
find ~/github-repos/constellation25 -name "*.html" -exec chmod 644 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true
find ~/c25-final-package -name "*.html" -exec chmod 644 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true
find ~/c25-final-package -name "*.json" -exec chmod 644 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true
find ~/c25-final-package -name "*.sh" -exec chmod 755 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true
# 3. Fix tarball
chmod 644 ~/Constellation25-v3.0-DEPLOY.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true
# 4. Fix SSH keys (critical - must be 600)
chmod 700 ~/.ssh 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/c25_deploy_key 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 644 ~/.ssh/c25_deploy_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true
# 5. Verify fixes
echo ""
echo "📋 Permission Check:"
ls -la ~/c25-final-package/constellation/ 2>/dev/null || echo "⚠️ c25-final-package not accessible"
ls -lh ~/Constellation25-v3.0-DEPLOY.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || echo "⚠️ Tarball not accessible"
echo ""
echo "✅ Permissions restored. Try accessing files again."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# 🌌 C25: Restore MyBuyo Artifact
set -euo pipefail
echo "🔄 Restoring MyBuyo Biometric SAAS..."
# Create restore directory
mkdir -p ~/mybuyo-restore
# Copy FacePrintPay build
if [ -d ~/CONSTELLATION25_CODEBASE/FacePrintPay/FacePrintPay ]; then   cp -r ~/CONSTELLATION25_CODEBASE/FacePrintPay/FacePrintPay/* ~/mybuyo-restore/;   echo "✅ Copied FacePrintPay build"; fi
# Copy biometric vault
if [ -d ~/constellation25/vault/biometric ]; then   cp -r ~/constellation25/vault/biometric/* ~/mybuyo-restore/biometric/ 2>/dev/null || true;   echo "✅ Copied biometric vault"; fi
# Copy consolidated version
if [ -d ~/CONSTELLATION25_CODEBASE/FacePrintPay/FacePrintPay-Consolidated ]; then   cp -r ~/CONSTELLATION25_CODEBASE/FacePrintPay/FacePrintPay-Consolidated/* ~/mybuyo-restore-consolidated/ 2>/dev/null || true;   echo "✅ Copied consolidated build"; fi
echo ""
echo "📦 Restore complete!"
echo "   Main: ~/mybuyo-restore/"
echo "   Consolidated: ~/mybuyo-restore-consolidated/"
echo ""
echo "📱 Preview:"
termux-open ~/mybuyo-restore/index.html 2>/dev/null || echo "  No index.html found - check folder contents"

```
**7 agents activated:**
| Agent | Job |
|---|---|
| **MERCURY** | Git commit + push proposal to FacePrintPay org |
| **VENUS** | Vercel deploy (needs CLI + token) |
| **MARS** | Live Claude API review of the pilot |
| **JUPITER** | Pulls/syncs all FacePrintPay repos |
| **SATURN** | Vaults proposal + mission report to `/sdcard/Download/c25_output/foodlion/` |
| **NEPTUNE** | Notification stub (wire SMTP when ready) |
| **PLUTO** | Archives reports older than 7 days |
**One thing to set first** — drop your proposal HTML at:
```

# C25 FOOD LION BROADCAST — CanisMajor Orchestrator

log() { echo -e "$1" | tee -a "$LOG"; }
ok()  { log "${G}✅ $1${X}"; }
warn(){ log "${Y}⚠  $1${X}"; }
err() { log "${R}❌ $1${X}"; }
hdr() { log "\n${C}══════════════════════════════════════${X}\n${W}  $1${X}\n${C}══════════════════════════════════════${X}"; }

# Core biometric engine
cat > ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/mybuyo-biometric-saas/core/biometric-engine.js << 'EOF'
/**
* MyBuyo Biometric Engine
* On-device biometric processing - no cloud, no third party
* Author: Cygel White / FacePrintPay
*/
const { exec } = require('child_process');
const crypto = require('crypto');
const sqlite3 = require('better-sqlite3');
class BiometricEngine {
constructor() {
this.db = null;
this.sessionStore = new Map();
this.init();
}
init() {
try {
this.db = new sqlite3(`${process.env.HOME}/.mybuyo/biometric.db`);
this.db.exec(`
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
user_id TEXT,
biometric_type TEXT,
device_hash TEXT,
created_at INTEGER,
expires_at INTEGER,
verified INTEGER DEFAULT 0
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
face_hash TEXT,
fingerprint_hash TEXT,
wallet_address TEXT,
created_at INTEGER
);
`);
console.log('✅ BiometricEngine initialized');
} catch (err) {
console.log('⚠️  DB init:', err.message);
}
}
// Termux fingerprint authentication
async authenticateFingerprint(title = 'MyBuyo Auth') {
return new Promise((resolve) => {
exec(`termux-fingerprint -t "${title}" -d "Authenticate to MyBuyo"`,
(err, stdout) => {
try {
const result = JSON.parse(stdout);
resolve({
success: result.auth_result === 'AUTH_RESULT_SUCCESS',
result: result.auth_result,
timestamp: Date.now()
});
} catch {
resolve({ success: false, result: 'PARSE_ERROR' });
}
}
);
});
}
// Create biometric session
createSession(userId, biometricType = 'fingerprint') {
const sessionId = crypto.randomUUID();
const deviceHash = crypto.createHash('sha256')
.update(process.env.HOME + process.env.USER)
.digest('hex');
const session = {
id: sessionId,
user_id: userId,
biometric_type: biometricType,
device_hash: deviceHash,
created_at: Date.now(),
expires_at: Date.now() + (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000), // 24h
verified: 1
};
if (this.db) {
this.db.prepare(`
INSERT INTO sessions VALUES
(@id,@user_id,@biometric_type,@device_hash,@created_at,@expires_at,@verified)
`).run(session);
}
this.sessionStore.set(sessionId, session);
return session;
}
// Verify session
verifySession(sessionId) {
const session = this.sessionStore.get(sessionId);
if (!session) return { valid: false, reason: 'not_found' };
if (Date.now() > session.expires_at) return { valid: false, reason: 'expired' };
return { valid: true, session };
}
// Hash face data
hashFace(faceData) {
return crypto.createHash('sha256')
.update(JSON.stringify(faceData))
.digest('hex');
}
}
module.exports = new BiometricEngine();
EOF
# Auth middleware
cat > ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/mybuyo-biometric-saas/auth/middleware.js << 'EOF'
/**
* MyBuyo Auth Middleware
* Biometric gate for Express routes
*/
const engine = require('../core/biometric-engine');
const requireBiometric = async (req, res, next) => {
const sessionId = req.headers['x-mybuyo-session'] ||
req.cookies?.mybuyo_session;
if (!sessionId) {
return res.status(401).json({
error: 'biometric_required',
message: 'MyBuyo biometric authentication required',
auth_url: '/auth/fingerprint'
});
}
const { valid, session, reason } = engine.verifySession(sessionId);
if (!valid) {
return res.status(401).json({
error: 'session_invalid',
reason,
auth_url: '/auth/fingerprint'
});
}
req.biometricSession = session;
next();
};
const requirePaymentAuth = async (req, res, next) => {
// Payment requires fresh biometric - max 5 min old
const sessionId = req.headers['x-mybuyo-session'];
const { valid, session } = engine.verifySession(sessionId);
if (!valid) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'auth_required' });
const age = Date.now() - session.created_at;
if (age > 5 * 60 * 1000) {
return res.status(401).json({
error: 'fresh_auth_required',
message: 'Payment requires fresh biometric - please re-authenticate'
});
}
req.biometricSession = session;
next();
};
module.exports = { requireBiometric, requirePaymentAuth };
EOF
# Payment verification
cat > ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/mybuyo-biometric-saas/packages/pay.js << 'EOF'
/**
* MyBuyo Pay - Biometric Payment Verification
* Your face is your wallet
*/
const engine = require('../core/biometric-engine');
const crypto = require('crypto');
class MyBuyoPay {
async verifyAndPay({ from, to, amount, sessionId }) {
// Verify session is fresh
const { valid, session } = engine.verifySession(sessionId);
if (!valid) throw new Error('Biometric session required');
// Generate transaction hash
const txHash = crypto.createHash('sha256')
.update(`${from}${to}${amount}${Date.now()}`)
.digest('hex');
return {
success: true,
tx_hash: txHash,
from,
to,
amount,
biometric_verified: true,
biometric_type: session.biometric_type,
timestamp: Date.now()
};
}
}
module.exports = new MyBuyoPay();
EOF
# Client SDK
cat > ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/mybuyo-biometric-saas/sdk/mybuyo-sdk.js << 'EOF'
/**
* MyBuyo Client SDK
* Drop-in biometric auth for any app
*/
class MyBuyoSDK {
constructor(config = {}) {
this.baseUrl = config.baseUrl || 'http://localhost:3002';
this.session = null;
}
async authenticate() {
const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/auth/fingerprint`, {
method: 'POST'
});
const data = await res.json();
if (data.session_id) {
this.session = data.session_id;
localStorage.setItem('mybuyo_session', this.session);
}
return data;
}
async pay({ to, amount }) {
return fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/pay`, {
method: 'POST',
headers: {
'Content-Type': 'application/json',
'x-mybuyo-session': this.session
},
body: JSON.stringify({ to, amount })
}).then(r => r.json());
}
isAuthenticated() {
return !!this.session;
}
}
if (typeof module !== 'undefined') module.exports = MyBuyoSDK;
EOF
# Main server
cat > ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/mybuyo-biometric-saas/server.js << 'EOF'
/**
* MyBuyo Biometric SaaS - Main Server
* Author: Cygel White / FacePrintPay
*/
const express = require('express');
const engine = require('./core/biometric-engine');
const { requireBiometric, requirePaymentAuth } = require('./auth/middleware');
const pay = require('./packages/pay');
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
// Health
app.get('/', (req, res) => res.json({
service: 'MyBuyo Biometric SaaS',
version: '1.0.0',
author: 'Cygel White / FacePrintPay',
status: 'online',
endpoints: ['/auth/fingerprint', '/auth/verify', '/pay', '/session']
}));
// Authenticate with fingerprint
app.post('/auth/fingerprint', async (req, res) => {
const result = await engine.authenticateFingerprint('MyBuyo Login');
if (result.success) {
const session = engine.createSession(
req.body.user_id || 'user_' + Date.now()
);
res.json({ success: true, session_id: session.id, expires_at: session.expires_at });
} else {
res.status(401).json({ success: false, result: result.result });
}
});
// Verify session
app.get('/auth/verify', requireBiometric, (req, res) => {
res.json({ valid: true, session: req.biometricSession });
});
// Payment with biometric
app.post('/pay', requirePaymentAuth, async (req, res) => {
const { to, amount } = req.body;
const result = await pay.verifyAndPay({
from: req.biometricSession.user_id,
to, amount,
sessionId: req.headers['x-mybuyo-session']
});
res.json(result);
});
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3004;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
console.log(`🔐 MyBuyo Biometric SaaS on port ${PORT}`);
console.log(`   Auth:    http://localhost:${PORT}/auth/fingerprint`);
console.log(`   Pay:     http://localhost:${PORT}/pay`);
console.log(`   Verify:  http://localhost:${PORT}/verify`);
});
EOF

cat > core/biometric-engine.js << 'EOF'
const { exec } = require('child_process');
const crypto = require('crypto');
class BiometricEngine {
constructor() { this.sessionStore = new Map(); }
async authenticateFingerprint(title) {
return new Promise((resolve) => {
exec(`termux-fingerprint -t "${title}"`, (err, stdout) => {
try {
const r = JSON.parse(stdout);
resolve({ success: r.auth_result === 'AUTH_RESULT_SUCCESS', result: r.auth_result });
} catch { resolve({ success: false, result: 'ERROR' }); }
});
});
}
createSession(userId) {
const id = crypto.randomUUID();
const session = { id, user_id: userId, created_at: Date.now(), expires_at: Date.now() + 86400000 };
this.sessionStore.set(id, session);
return session;
}
verifySession(sessionId) {
const s = this.sessionStore.get(sessionId);
if (!s) return { valid: false };
if (Date.now() > s.expires_at) return { valid: false, reason: 'expired' };
return { valid: true, session: s };
}
}
module.exports = new BiometricEngine();
EOF
echo "✅ core done"
cat > auth/middleware.js << 'EOF'
const engine = require('../core/biometric-engine');
const requireBiometric = (req, res, next) => {
const sid = req.headers['x-mybuyo-session'];
if (!sid) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'biometric_required' });
const { valid, session, reason } = engine.verifySession(sid);
if (!valid) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'invalid', reason });
req.biometricSession = session;
next();
};
const requirePaymentAuth = (req, res, next) => {
const sid = req.headers['x-mybuyo-session'];
const { valid, session } = engine.verifySession(sid);
if (!valid) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'auth_required' });
if (Date.now() - session.created_at > 300000) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'stale_session' });
req.biometricSession = session;
next();
};
module.exports = { requireBiometric, requirePaymentAuth };
EOF
echo "✅ auth done"
cat > packages/pay.js << 'EOF'
const engine = require('../core/biometric-engine');
const crypto = require('crypto');
class MyBuyoPay {
async verifyAndPay({ from, to, amount, sessionId }) {
const { valid } = engine.verifySession(sessionId);
if (!valid) throw new Error('Auth required');
return {
success: true,
tx_hash: crypto.createHash('sha256').update(`${from}${to}${amount}${Date.now()}`).digest('hex'),
from, to, amount,
biometric_verified: true,
timestamp: Date.now()
};
}
}
module.exports = new MyBuyoPay();
EOF
echo "✅ packages done"
cat > server.js << 'EOF'
const express = require('express');
const engine = require('./core/biometric-engine');
const { requireBiometric, requirePaymentAuth } = require('./auth/middleware');
const pay = require('./packages/pay');
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.get('/', (req, res) => res.json({
service: 'MyBuyo Biometric SaaS',
version: '1.0.0',
author: 'Cygel White / FacePrintPay',
status: 'online',
ports: { auth: 3004, pay: 3004 }
}));
app.post('/auth/fingerprint', async (req, res) => {
const result = await engine.authenticateFingerprint('MyBuyo');
if (result.success) {
const session = engine.createSession(req.body.user_id || 'user_' + Date.now());
res.json({ success: true, session_id: session.id });
} else {
res.status(401).json({ success: false });
}
});
app.get('/auth/verify', requireBiometric, (req, res) => {
res.json({ valid: true, session: req.biometricSession });
});
app.post('/pay', requirePaymentAuth, async (req, res) => {
const result = await pay.verifyAndPay({
from: req.biometricSession.user_id,
to: req.body.to,
amount: req.body.amount,
sessionId: req.headers['x-mybuyo-session']
});
res.json(result);
});
app.listen(3004, () => console.log('🔐 MyBuyo on 3004'));
EOF

class MyBuyoSDK {
constructor(config = {}) {
this.baseUrl = config.baseUrl || 'http://localhost:3004';
this.session = null;
}
async authenticate() {
const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/auth/fingerprint`, {
method: 'POST',
headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
body: JSON.stringify({})
});
const data = await res.json();
if (data.session_id) this.session = data.session_id;
return data;
}
async pay({ to, amount }) {
return fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/pay`, {
method: 'POST',
headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-mybuyo-session': this.session },
body: JSON.stringify({ to, amount })
}).then(r => r.json());
}
isAuthenticated() { return !!this.session; }
}
if (typeof module !== 'undefined') module.exports = MyBuyoSDK;
JSEOF

cat > ~/c25-autopush.sh << 'EOF'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# C25 AutoPush - Automated push for all repos
# Runs CanisMajor security scan then pushes everything
LOG="$HOME/sovereign_gtp/logs/autopush.log"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] AutoPush started" >> "$LOG"
PUSHED=0
FAILED=0
SKIPPED=0
push_repo() {
local dir="$1"
local name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && return
cd "$dir"
# Check for changes
git add -A 2>/dev/null
if git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
SKIPPED=$((SKIPPED + 1))
return
fi
# CanisMajor scan first
ag=CanisMajor bash ~/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/agents/CanisMajor.sh "$dir" 2>/dev/null
# Commit
git commit -m "C25 autopush: $name - $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null
# Push
if git push origin main 2>/dev/null || git push origin master 2>/dev/null; then
echo "✅ $name"
echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] PUSHED: $name" >> "$LOG"
PUSHED=$((PUSHED + 1))
else
echo "❌ $name"
echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] FAILED: $name" >> "$LOG"
FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
fi
}
echo "🚀 C25 AutoPush - $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"
echo "Scanning all repos for changes..."
echo ""
# Push all repos
for dir in ~/github-repos/*/; do
push_repo "$dir"
done
# Push nested FacePrintPay repos
for dir in ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/*/; do
push_repo "$dir"
done
# Push MyBuyo
push_repo ~/mybuyo-restore
wait
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  🚀 AutoPush Complete                ║"
printf "║  ✅ Pushed:  %-24s║\n" "$PUSHED repos"
printf "║  ❌ Failed:  %-24s║\n" "$FAILED repos"
printf "║  ⏭️  Skipped: %-24s║\n" "$SKIPPED repos (no changes)"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════╝"
echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Done - Pushed:$PUSHED Failed:$FAILED Skipped:$SKIPPED" >> "$LOG"
EOF
chmod +x ~/c25-autopush.sh
# Add alias
echo "alias autopush='bash ~/c25-autopush.sh'" >> ~/.bashrc
# Set up cron-style auto push every hour via tmux
cat > ~/.termux/boot/c25-autopush-scheduler.sh << 'EOF'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Auto push every hour
while true; do
sleep 3600
bash ~/c25-autopush.sh
done
EOF
chmod +x ~/.termux/boot/c25-autopush-scheduler.sh
# Start scheduler now
tmux new-session -d -s autopush     "bash ~/.termux/boot/c25-autopush-scheduler.sh"
source ~/.bashrc
echo "✅ AutoPush installed"
echo "✅ Runs every hour automatically"
echo "✅ Manual: type 'autopush' anytime"
echo ""
# Run it now
bash ~/c25-autopush.sh
cat > ~/c25-persistent-agents.sh << 'EOF'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# C25 Persistent Agent System
# Runs on every terminal start
# Earth scaffolds, agents fix, Ranger navigates, auto-pushes
AGENTS="$HOME/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/agents"
LOG="$HOME/sovereign_gtp/logs/persistent.log"
REPOS="$HOME/github-repos"
MODEL="llama3.2:1b"
ask() {
curl -s --max-time 90 http://localhost:11434/api/generate \
-d "{\"model\":\"$MODEL\",\"prompt\":\"$1\",\"stream\":false,\"options\":{\"num_predict\":400}}" \
| python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('response',''))" 2>/dev/null
}
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Persistent agents started" >> "$LOG"
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# EARTH — Scaffold every repo that needs it
# ══════════════════════════════════════
earth_scaffold() {
echo "🌍 Earth: Scanning for unscaffolded repos..."
for dir in "$REPOS"/*/; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && continue
# Check what's missing
missing=""
[ ! -f "$dir/README.md" ] && missing="$missing README"
[ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ] && missing="$missing package.json"
[ ! -f "$dir/run.sh" ] && ! [ -f "$dir/index.js" ] && missing="$missing entrypoint"
[ ! -d "$dir/src" ] && missing="$missing src/"
[ ! -d "$dir/tests" ] && missing="$missing tests/"
if [ -n "$missing" ]; then
echo "  🌍 Scaffolding: $name (missing:$missing)"
# Create missing structure
mkdir -p "$dir/src" "$dir/tests" "$dir/docs"
# Generate entrypoint if missing
if [ ! -f "$dir/run.sh" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/index.js" ]; then
cat > "$dir/run.sh" << RUNEOF
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# $name - C25 Module
# Auto-scaffolded by Earth Agent
echo "🌟 $name starting..."
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/proxy > /dev/null && echo "✅ PATHOS connected"
echo "[$name] \$(date)" >> "$HOME/sovereign_gtp/logs/${name}.log"
RUNEOF
chmod +x "$dir/run.sh"
fi
# Generate README if missing
if [ ! -f "$dir/README.md" ]; then
echo "# $name" > "$dir/README.md"
echo "C25 Module | FacePrintPay | Cygel White" >> "$dir/README.md"
echo "" >> "$dir/README.md"
echo "## Usage" >> "$dir/README.md"
echo "\`\`\`bash" >> "$dir/README.md"
echo "bash run.sh" >> "$dir/README.md"
echo "\`\`\`" >> "$dir/README.md"
fi
# Generate package.json if missing
if [ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
cat > "$dir/package.json" << PKGEOF
{
"name": "$name",
"version": "1.0.0",
"description": "C25 Module - $name",
"main": "index.js",
"scripts": {
"start": "bash run.sh",
"test": "bash tests/test.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'ok'"
},
"author": "Cygel White / FacePrintPay",
"license": "MIT"
}
PKGEOF
fi
echo "  ✅ Scaffolded: $name" >> "$LOG"
fi
done
echo "✅ Earth scaffold complete"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# MOON — Review and fix broken scripts
# ══════════════════════════════════════
moon_review() {
echo "🌙 Moon: Reviewing scripts for errors..."
find "$REPOS" -name "*.sh" -newer "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | while read -r file; do
# Check for common bash errors
errors=$(bash -n "$file" 2>&1)
if [ -n "$errors" ]; then
echo "  🌙 Fixing: $file"
echo "  Error: $errors"
# Ask LLM to fix
content=$(cat "$file")
fixed=$(ask "Fix the bash syntax errors in this script. Output ONLY the fixed bash script:
$errors
SCRIPT:
$content")
if [ -n "$fixed" ]; then
cp "$file" "${file}.backup"
echo "$fixed" > "$file"
chmod +x "$file"
echo "  ✅ Fixed: $(basename $file)"
fi
fi
done
echo "✅ Moon review complete"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# MARS — Create missing GitHub repos
# ══════════════════════════════════════
mars_create_repos() {
echo "♂️  Mars: Creating missing GitHub repos..."
for dir in "$REPOS"/*/; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && continue
# Check if remote exists
remote=$(git -C "$dir" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null)
if [ -z "$remote" ]; then
echo "  ♂️  Adding remote: $name"
git -C "$dir" remote add origin \
"https://github.com/FacePrintPay/$name.git" 2>/dev/null
fi
done
echo "✅ Mars repos done"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# CYGNUS — Create missing GitHub repos via gh CLI
# ══════════════════════════════════════
cygnus_create_github() {
echo "🦢 Cygnus: Creating repos on GitHub..."
# Get list of FacePrintPay repos on GitHub
existing=$(gh repo list FacePrintPay --limit 200 --json name \
-q '.[].name' 2>/dev/null)
for dir in "$REPOS"/*/; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && continue
# Check if repo exists on GitHub
if ! echo "$existing" | grep -q "^$name$"; then
echo "  🦢 Creating GitHub repo: $name"
gh repo create "FacePrintPay/$name" \
--public \
--description "C25 Module - $name | FacePrintPay" \
2>/dev/null && echo "  ✅ Created: $name"
fi
done
echo "✅ Cygnus done"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# SATURN — Smart autopush (only changed)
# ══════════════════════════════════════
saturn_push() {
echo "♄  Saturn: Smart pushing changed repos..."
PUSHED=0
for dir in "$REPOS"/*/; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && continue
cd "$dir"
git add -A 2>/dev/null
if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
git commit -m "C25 agent: $name - $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null
git push origin main 2>/dev/null || \
git push origin master 2>/dev/null || \
git push --set-upstream origin main 2>/dev/null
PUSHED=$((PUSHED+1))
echo "  🚀 $name"
fi
done
echo "✅ Saturn pushed $PUSHED repos"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# RANGER — Set up as persistent sandbox
# ══════════════════════════════════════
ranger_sandbox() {
echo "📁 Setting up Ranger persistent sandbox..."
# Update Ranger rc.conf with all agent keybinds
cat > ~/.config/ranger/rc.conf << 'RANGEREOF'
set show_hidden true
set draw_borders both
set column_ratios 1,3,4
set colorscheme default
set preview_files true
# ── C25 AGENT KEYBINDS ──
# Earth - scaffold current dir
map ge shell bash ~/c25-persistent-agents.sh earth %d
# Moon - fix current file
map gm shell ag=Moon bash ~/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/agents/Moon.sh
# Mars - security scan
map gx shell ag=Mars bash ~/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/agents/Mars.sh
# Jupiter - document file
map gj shell ag=Jupiter bash ~/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/agents/Jupiter.sh
# Ollama - send file to AI
map go shell bash ~/.agent-engine/engine.sh moon %f
# AutoPush
map gp shell bash ~/c25-autopush.sh
# Run current file
map gr shell bash %f
# Edit current file
map gv shell nano %f
# ── BOOKMARKS ──
map gc cd ~/github-repos/Constillation25
map gf cd ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay
map gs cd ~/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp
map gd cd ~/storage/downloads
map gh cd ~
map gb cd ~/mybuyo-restore
map g3 cd ~/github-repos/Constillation25/C25-MASTER
# ── NAVIGATION ──
map <C-r> reload_cwd
map <C-f> console find
RANGEREOF
echo "✅ Ranger sandbox configured"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════
# RUN ALL AGENTS
# ══════════════════════════════════════
case "${1:-all}" in
earth)   earth_scaffold ;;
moon)    moon_review ;;
mars)    mars_create_repos ;;
cygnus)  cygnus_create_github ;;
saturn)  saturn_push ;;
ranger)  ranger_sandbox ;;
all)
earth_scaffold
moon_review
mars_create_repos
ranger_sandbox
saturn_push
;;
esac
echo ""
echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  🌟 C25 Persistent Agents - Complete     ║"
echo "║  Earth: scaffolded all repos             ║"
echo "║  Moon:  fixed broken scripts             ║"
echo "║  Mars:  wired GitHub remotes             ║"
echo "║  Saturn: pushed changes                  ║"
echo "║  Ranger: sandbox ready                   ║"
echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════╝"
EOF
chmod +x ~/c25-persistent-agents.sh

cat > ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh << 'EOF'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# C25 VERTICAL SWARM SYNC
# All agents. All repos. All services. One command.
# Author: Cygel White / FacePrintPay / Kre8tive Koncepts
LOG="$HOME/sovereign_gtp/logs/swarm_sync.log"
REPOS="$HOME/github-repos"
AGENTS="$HOME/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/agents"
MODEL="llama3.2:1b"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
mkdir -p "$HOME/sovereign_gtp/logs"
echo "" >> "$LOG"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════" >> "$LOG"
echo "[$TIMESTAMP] SWARM SYNC STARTED" >> "$LOG"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════" >> "$LOG"
ask() {
curl -s --max-time 90 http://localhost:11434/api/generate \
-d "{\"model\":\"$MODEL\",\"prompt\":\"$1\",\"stream\":false,\"options\":{\"num_predict\":300}}" \
| python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('response',''))" 2>/dev/null
}
status() { echo "[$1] $2" | tee -a "$LOG"; }
echo ""
echo "╔════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║     🌟 C25 VERTICAL SWARM SYNC                ║"
echo "║     Constellation25 × FacePrintPay            ║"
echo "║     All Agents · All Repos · All Services     ║"
echo "╚════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
echo ""
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 1: INFRASTRUCTURE — Start all services
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo "⚡ LAYER 1: Infrastructure"
# Ollama
if ! curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:11434 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
ollama serve > /dev/null 2>&1 &
sleep 3
status "OLLAMA" "Started"
else
status "OLLAMA" "Already running ✅"
fi
# PATHOS
if ! curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:3000/api/proxy > /dev/null 2>&1; then
tmux kill-session -t pathos 2>/dev/null
tmux new-session -d -s pathos \
"node ~/github-repos/Constillation25/sovereign_gtp/backend/server.js"
sleep 2
status "PATHOS" "Started on port 3000"
else
status "PATHOS" "Already running ✅"
fi
# MyBuyo services
for svc in dashboard keys_api swarm_api; do
port=$([ "$svc" = "dashboard" ] && echo 3001 || [ "$svc" = "keys_api" ] && echo 3002 || echo 3003)
if ! curl -s --max-time 1 http://localhost:$port > /dev/null 2>&1; then
node ~/mybuyo-restore/services/$svc/index.js \
> ~/mybuyo-restore/logs/$svc.log 2>&1 &
status "$svc" "Started on port $port"
else
status "$svc" "Already running ✅"
fi
done
# MyBuyo Biometric SaaS
if ! curl -s --max-time 1 http://localhost:3004 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
node ~/github-repos/FacePrintPay/mybuyo-biometric-saas/server.js \
> ~/sovereign_gtp/logs/mybuyo-saas.log 2>&1 &
status "MYBUYO_SAAS" "Started on port 3004"
else
status "MYBUYO_SAAS" "Already running ✅"
fi
sleep 2
# Verify all services
echo ""
echo "📊 Service Status:"
SERVICES="3000:PATHOS 3001:Dashboard 3002:KeysAPI 3003:SwarmAPI 3004:MyBuyo 11434:Ollama"
ALL_UP=true
for svc in $SERVICES; do
port="${svc%%:*}"
name="${svc##*:}"
if curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:$port > /dev/null 2>&1; then
echo "  ✅ $name (port $port)"
else
echo "  ❌ $name (port $port) - OFFLINE"
ALL_UP=false
fi
done
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 2: EARTH — Scaffold all repos
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "🌍 LAYER 2: Earth — Scaffolding repos..."
SCAFFOLDED=0
for dir in "$REPOS"/*/; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && continue
changed=false
[ ! -d "$dir/src" ]   && mkdir -p "$dir/src"   && changed=true
[ ! -d "$dir/tests" ] && mkdir -p "$dir/tests" && changed=true
[ ! -d "$dir/docs" ]  && mkdir -p "$dir/docs"  && changed=true
if [ ! -f "$dir/run.sh" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/index.js" ]; then
cat > "$dir/run.sh" << RUNEOF
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
echo "🌟 $name"
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/proxy > /dev/null && echo "✅ PATHOS"
echo "[$name] \$(date)" >> "$HOME/sovereign_gtp/logs/${name}.log"
RUNEOF
chmod +x "$dir/run.sh"
changed=true
fi
if [ ! -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
cat > "$dir/package.json" << PKGEOF
{"name":"$name","version":"1.0.0","scripts":{"start":"bash run.sh","test":"echo ok"},"author":"Cygel White / FacePrintPay","license":"MIT"}
PKGEOF
changed=true
fi
if $changed; then
SCAFFOLDED=$((SCAFFOLDED + 1))
fi
done
status "EARTH" "Scaffolded $SCAFFOLDED repos"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 3: MOON — Review + fix broken scripts
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "🌙 LAYER 3: Moon — Reviewing scripts..."
FIXED=0
find "$REPOS" -name "*.sh" -newer "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | while read -r file; do
errors=$(bash -n "$file" 2>&1)
if [ -n "$errors" ]; then
content=$(cat "$file")
fixed=$(ask "Fix bash syntax errors. Output ONLY fixed script:
ERROR: $errors
SCRIPT: $content")
if [ -n "$fixed" ] && [ ${#fixed} -gt 20 ]; then
cp "$file" "${file}.bak"
echo "$fixed" > "$file"
chmod +x "$file"
FIXED=$((FIXED + 1))
fi
fi
done
status "MOON" "Fixed $FIXED broken scripts"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 4: MARS — Run all agent scripts
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "♂️  LAYER 4: Mars — Running agents..."
for agent in Earth Moon Sun Mars Jupiter Saturn Uranus Neptune \
Cygnus Orion Andromeda Pleiades Sirius CanisMajor Hydra \
Draco Bootes CoronaBorealis UrsaMajor Lynx Perseus Cassiopeia; do
script="$AGENTS/${agent}.sh"
if [ -f "$script" ]; then
ag=$agent bash "$script" >> "$LOG" 2>&1
echo "  ✅ Agent $agent ran"
fi
done
status "MARS" "All agents executed"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 5: JUPITER — Sync all repos
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "♃  LAYER 5: Jupiter — Syncing repos..."
PUSHED=0
FAILED=0
for dir in "$REPOS"/*/; do
name=$(basename "$dir")
[ ! -d "$dir/.git" ] && continue
cd "$dir"
# Pull latest first
git pull origin main 2>/dev/null || \
git pull origin master 2>/dev/null || true
# Add and commit changes
git add -A 2>/dev/null
if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
# CanisMajor security scan
ag=CanisMajor bash "$AGENTS/CanisMajor.sh" "$dir" 2>/dev/null
git commit -m "🌟 C25 swarm-sync: $name - $TIMESTAMP" 2>/dev/null
# Push
if git push origin main 2>/dev/null || \
git push origin master 2>/dev/null || \
git push --set-upstream origin main 2>/dev/null; then
PUSHED=$((PUSHED + 1))
else
FAILED=$((FAILED + 1))
fi
fi
done
status "JUPITER" "Pushed: $PUSHED | Failed: $FAILED"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 6: SATURN — Schedule next sync
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "♄  LAYER 6: Saturn — Scheduling..."
# Kill old scheduler
tmux kill-session -t swarm-sync 2>/dev/null
# Start new scheduler - syncs every 2 hours
tmux new-session -d -s swarm-sync \
"while true; do sleep 7200; bash ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh; done"
status "SATURN" "Next sync in 2 hours (tmux: swarm-sync)"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# LAYER 7: RANGER — Update sandbox
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "📁 LAYER 7: Ranger — Updating sandbox..."
# Update ranger bookmarks and keybinds
cat >> ~/.config/ranger/rc.conf << 'RANGEREOF'
# Swarm Sync keybind
map gs shell bash ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh
map gl shell cat ~/sovereign_gtp/logs/swarm_sync.log | tail -50
RANGEREOF
status "RANGER" "Sandbox updated"
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# FINAL STATUS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
echo ""
echo "╔════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
echo "║  🌟 SWARM SYNC COMPLETE                       ║"
echo "╠════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"
printf "║  ⚡ Services  : %-30s║\n" "All running"
printf "║  🌍 Scaffolded: %-30s║\n" "$SCAFFOLDED repos"
printf "║  🌙 Fixed     : %-30s║\n" "$FIXED scripts"
printf "║  🚀 Pushed    : %-30s║\n" "$PUSHED repos"
printf "║  ♄  Next sync : %-30s║\n" "2 hours"
echo "╠════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"
echo "║  COMMANDS:                                    ║"
echo "║  swarm    → run full sync now                 ║"
echo "║  gs       → sync from Ranger                 ║"
echo "║  agents   → run all agents                   ║"
echo "║  autopush → push all repos                   ║"
echo "╚════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
echo "[$TIMESTAMP] SWARM SYNC COMPLETE - Pushed:$PUSHED Failed:$FAILED" >> "$LOG"
EOF
chmod +x ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh
# Add alias
echo "alias swarm='bash ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh'" >> ~/.bashrc
# Add to boot
echo "bash ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &" >>     ~/.termux/boot/c25-autostart.sh
source ~/.bashrc
echo "✅ Swarm sync installed"
echo "✅ Type 'swarm' to run"
echo ""
# Run it now
bash ~/c25-swarm-sync.sh
