#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#  C25 MCP FIX + run.sh PATCH
#  Flags: --dry-run  (preview changes, touch nothing)
#         --validate (syntax check run.sh post-patch)
#         --status   (one-liner investor demo status)
#  Author : Cygel White (@MrGGTP)
#  Run    : bash c25-fix-mcp.sh [--dry-run|--validate|--status]
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
DRY_RUN=false
VALIDATE_ONLY=false
STATUS_ONLY=false
for arg in "$@"; do   case "$arg" in     --dry-run)   DRY_RUN=true ;;     --validate)  VALIDATE_ONLY=true ;;     --status)    STATUS_ONLY=true ;;   esac; done
R='\033[0;31m'; G='\033[0;32m'; Y='\033[1;33m'
C='\033[0;36m'; P='\033[0;35m'; NC='\033[0m'
ok()   { echo -e "${G}✓${NC} $1"; }
warn() { echo -e "${Y}⚠${NC}  $1"; }
err()  { echo -e "${R}✗${NC} $1"; }
head() { echo -e "\n${P}══ $1 ══${NC}"; }
C25="$HOME/constellation-25"
C25_GH="$HOME/github-repos/Constillation25"
RUNSH="$C25_GH/run.sh"
MCP_SCRIPT="$C25/mcp-stdlib.py"
MCP_LOG="$C25/logs/mcp.out"
MCP_PORT=3000
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# --status  ONE-LINER INVESTOR DEMO
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
if $STATUS_ONLY; then   MCP_ST=$(curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:${MCP_PORT}/health 2>/dev/null \
| python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["status"])' 2>/dev/null \
|| echo "OFFLINE");   PATHOS_ST=$(curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:5000/api/health 2>/dev/null \
| python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("status","?"))' 2>/dev/null \
|| echo "OFFLINE");   AGENT_CT=$(ls "$C25_GH/_agents/"*.sh 2>/dev/null | wc -l);   REPO_CT=$(ls -d "$HOME/github-repos/Constillation25/"*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l);   echo -e "${P}╔══════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}";   echo -e "${P}║  CONSTELLATION-25 · LIVE STATUS          ║${NC}";   echo -e "${P}╚══════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}";   echo -e "  MCP      → ${G}${MCP_ST}${NC}   (port ${MCP_PORT})";   echo -e "  PaTHos   → ${G}${PATHOS_ST}${NC}   (port 5000)";   echo -e "  Agents   → ${C}${AGENT_CT}${NC} scripts loaded";   echo -e "  Repos    → ${C}${REPO_CT}${NC} in monorepo";   echo -e "  Build    → ${G}v25.0.0-liftoff${NC}";   echo -e "  Founder  → ${Y}Cygel White · @MrGGTP${NC}";   exit 0; fi
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# --validate  SYNTAX CHECK ONLY
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
if $VALIDATE_ONLY; then   head "VALIDATING run.sh SYNTAX";   [[ ! -f "$RUNSH" ]] && RUNSH="$C25/run.sh";   if [[ -f "$RUNSH" ]]; then     bash -n "$RUNSH" && ok "run.sh syntax OK" || err "run.sh has syntax errors";     echo -e "${C}Lines:${NC}  $(wc -l < "$RUNSH")";     echo -e "${C}Size:${NC}   $(wc -c < "$RUNSH") bytes";     grep -n "curl -s http" "$RUNSH" | grep -v "max-time" &&       warn "curl calls without --max-time (may hang)" || ok "All curl calls have timeout";     grep -n "\$AGENTS" "$RUNSH" && warn "\$AGENTS references — verify path" || ok "No bare \$AGENTS refs";   else     err "run.sh not found at $RUNSH";   fi;   exit 0; fi
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
# --dry-run  PREVIEW ALL CHANGES, TOUCH NOTHING
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════
if $DRY_RUN; then   head "DRY RUN — PREVIEW ONLY · NO FILES CHANGED";   echo -e "${Y}Would perform:${NC}\n";   echo -e "${C}[1]${NC} pkill mcp-stdlib.py → restart on port ${MCP_PORT}";   [[ -f "$MCP_SCRIPT" ]] && ok "    mcp-stdlib.py EXISTS" || warn "    NOT FOUND — stub would be created";   echo -e "${C}[2]${NC} nohup python3 $MCP_SCRIPT > $MCP_LOG &";   echo -e "${C}[3]${NC} Patch run.sh at $RUNSH";   [[ ! -f "$RUNSH" ]] && RUNSH="$C25/run.sh";   if [[ -f "$RUNSH" ]]; then
python3 << PYEOF
import re
path = '${RUNSH}'
with open(path) as f:
content = f.read()
changes = 0
if re.search(r'Agents:\s+\$\(ls "\\\$AGENTS"', content):
print("    → Fix agent count path: \$AGENTS → _agents/")
changes += 1
if re.search(r'curl -s http://localhost:3000', content) and '--max-time' not in content:
print("    → Add --max-time 2 to MCP health curl")
changes += 1
if 'localhost:8080/health' in content:
print("    → Fix MCP port: 8080 → 3000")
changes += 1
print(f"    → {changes} change(s) would be applied" if changes else "    → run.sh already correct")
PYEOF
else     warn "    run.sh not found";   fi;   echo -e "${C}[4]${NC} bash \$RUNSH --status\n";   echo -e "${Y}Run without --dry-run to apply.${NC}";   exit 0; fi
# ── STEP 1: KILL EXISTING MCP ─────────────────────────────────
head "RESTARTING MCP"
pkill -f mcp-stdlib.py 2>/dev/null && ok "Killed old mcp-stdlib.py" || warn "No existing process"
sleep 1
# ── STEP 2: CHECK mcp-stdlib.py EXISTS ────────────────────────
if [[ ! -f "$MCP_SCRIPT" ]]; then   err "mcp-stdlib.py not found at $MCP_SCRIPT";   echo -e "${Y}Searching for it...${NC}";   found=$(find "$HOME" -name "mcp-stdlib.py" 2>/dev/null | head -5);   if [[ -n "$found" ]]; then     echo "$found";     MCP_SCRIPT=$(echo "$found" | head -1);     warn "Using: $MCP_SCRIPT";   else     err "mcp-stdlib.py not found anywhere — creating minimal stub";     mkdir -p "$C25/logs"
cat > "$MCP_SCRIPT" << 'MCPSTUB'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
C25 MCP Stdlib — Minimal health server
Port 3000 — responds to /health
"""
import http.server, json, threading, os
PORT = int(os.environ.get("MCP_PORT", 3000))
class MCPHandler(http.server.BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
def log_message(self, format, *args):
pass  # suppress default logs
def do_GET(self):
if self.path == "/health":
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json")
self.end_headers()
self.wfile.write(json.dumps({
"status": "ONLINE",
"service": "C25-MCP-Stdlib",
"port": PORT,
"agents": 25
}).encode())
elif self.path == "/agents":
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header("Content-Type", "application/json")
self.end_headers()
self.wfile.write(json.dumps({
"agents": ["earth","moon","sun","mercury","venus","mars",
"jupiter","saturn","uranus","neptune","cygnus",
"orion","andromeda","pleiades","sirius","canismajor",
"hydra","centauri","bootes","coronabor","ursamajor",
"lynx","perseus","cassiopeia","polaris"]
}).encode())
else:
self.send_response(404)
self.end_headers()
print(f"[C25-MCP] Starting on port {PORT}")
server = http.server.HTTPServer(("0.0.0.0", PORT), MCPHandler)
server.serve_forever()
MCPSTUB
chmod +x "$MCP_SCRIPT";     ok "Stub mcp-stdlib.py created at $MCP_SCRIPT";   fi; fi
# ── STEP 3: START MCP ─────────────────────────────────────────
mkdir -p "$C25/logs"
nohup python3 "$MCP_SCRIPT" < /dev/null > "$MCP_LOG" 2>&1 &
MCP_PID=$!
ok "MCP started — PID $MCP_PID"
sleep 3
# ── STEP 4: HEALTH CHECK ──────────────────────────────────────
head "MCP HEALTH CHECK"
HEALTH=$(curl -s --max-time 3 http://localhost:${MCP_PORT}/health 2>/dev/null)
if [[ -n "$HEALTH" ]]; then   ok "MCP ONLINE → $HEALTH"; else   err "MCP not responding on port $MCP_PORT";   warn "Check log: tail -20 $MCP_LOG";   tail -10 "$MCP_LOG" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
# ── STEP 5: PATCH run.sh ──────────────────────────────────────
head "PATCHING run.sh"
if [[ ! -f "$RUNSH" ]]; then   err "run.sh not found at $RUNSH"
RUNSH="$C25/run.sh";   [[ -f "$RUNSH" ]] && warn "Found at $RUNSH" || { err "run.sh not found anywhere"; exit 1; }; fi
ok "Patching: $RUNSH"
cp "$RUNSH" "${RUNSH}.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
ok "Backup created"
python3 << PYEOF
import re
path = '${RUNSH}'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
content = f.read()
original = content
# ── FIX 1: Agent count — point to correct _agents dir ──
patterns_agents = [
(r'Agents:\s+\$\(ls "\$AGENTS"/\*\.sh.*?\)',
'Agents:  \$(ls "\$HOME/github-repos/Constillation25/_agents"/*.sh 2>/dev/null | wc -l)'),
(r'Agents:\s+\$\(ls "\$HOME/constellation-25"/\*\.sh.*?\)',
'Agents:  \$(ls "\$HOME/github-repos/Constillation25/_agents"/*.sh 2>/dev/null | wc -l)'),
]
for old_pat, new_str in patterns_agents:
content, n = re.subn(old_pat, new_str, content)
if n: print(f"  Fixed agent count pattern ({n} replacement)")
# ── FIX 2: MCP status — add --max-time 2 timeout ──
# Replace any curl to localhost:3000/health without --max-time
content = re.sub(
r'curl -s (http://localhost:3000/health)',
r'curl -s --max-time 2 \1',
content
)
# ── FIX 3: MCP port — ensure 3000 not 8080 in status check ──
# (keep 8080 for actual MCP server, 3000 for health)
if 'localhost:3000/health' not in content and 'localhost:8080/health' in content:
content = content.replace('localhost:8080/health', 'localhost:3000/health')
print("  Fixed MCP health check port 8080 → 3000")
# ── FIX 4: Ensure MCP status line has fallback ──
content = re.sub(
r'(curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:3000/health[^)]*\))',
r'\1 2>/dev/null || echo "OFFLINE"',
content
)
# dedupe double fallback
content = content.replace('2>/dev/null || echo "OFFLINE" 2>/dev/null || echo "OFFLINE"',
'2>/dev/null || echo "OFFLINE"')
if content != original:
with open(path, 'w') as f:
f.write(content)
print("run.sh patched successfully")
else:
print("run.sh — no changes needed (already correct)")
PYEOF
# ── STEP 6: STATUS CHECK ──────────────────────────────────────
head "C25 STATUS"
if [[ -f "$RUNSH" ]]; then   bash "$RUNSH" --status 2>/dev/null || bash "$RUNSH" status 2>/dev/null || {     warn "run.sh --status flag not supported — running direct status block";     echo -e "${C}MCP:${NC}    $(curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:${MCP_PORT}/health 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["status"])' 2>/dev/null || echo 'OFFLINE')";     echo -e "${C}Agents:${NC} $(ls $HOME/github-repos/Constillation25/_agents/*.sh 2>/dev/null | wc -l) scripts found";     echo -e "${C}PaTHos:${NC} $(curl -s --max-time 2 http://localhost:5000/api/health 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("status","?"))' 2>/dev/null || echo 'OFFLINE')";   }; fi
echo ""
ok "MCP fix complete"
echo -e "${Y}MCP log:${NC} tail -f $MCP_LOG"
echo -e "${Y}PID:${NC}     $MCP_PID"

# ========================================================
# CONSTELLATION 25 - ULTIMATE PLANETARY SWARM v5.0

# --- Configuration ---
CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/.constellation25"
LOG="$CONFIG_DIR/swarm.log"
REPORT="$HOME/CONSTELLATION25_SWARM_REPORT.html"
STATE_DIR="$CONFIG_DIR/state"
API_CACHE="$CONFIG_DIR/api_cache"
CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/claude_api_key"
GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/github_token"
REPOS_DIR="$HOME/github-repos"
REPOS=("digital-dollar" "videocourts" "constellation25")

# --- Colors ---
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
MAGENTA='\033[0;35m'
NC='\033[0m'
# --- Logging Functions ---
log() {   echo -e "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] $1" | tee -a "$LOG"; }
agent() {   local agent_name="$1";   local status="$2";   log "${CYAN}🌌 [AGENT: $agent_name]${NC} $status"; }
success() {   log "${GREEN}✅ $1${NC}"; }
warning() {   log "${YELLOW}⚠️  $1${NC}"; }
error() {   log "${RED}❌ $1${NC}"; }
# --- UI Functions ---
banner() {   clear;   echo -e "${BLUE}╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}";   echo -e "${BLUE}║${NC}          ${CYAN}CONSTELLATION 25 - ULTIMATE SWARM v5.0${NC}          ${BLUE}║${NC}";   echo -e "${BLUE}║${NC}               ${GREEN}Pathos-Sovereign-1 Core${NC}                   ${BLUE}║${NC}";   echo -e "${BLUE}║${NC}        ${MAGENTA}Visual Interface + Real API Integration${NC}        ${BLUE}║${NC}";   echo -e "${BLUE}╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}";   echo ""; }
progress_bar() {   local percentage=$1;   local width=50;   local filled=$((percentage * width / 100));   local empty=$((width - filled));   printf "\r${BLUE}[";   printf "%${filled}s" | tr ' ' '█';   printf "%${empty}s" | tr ' ' '░';   printf "]${NC} %3d%%" "$percentage"; }
# --- API Key Management ---
check_api_keys() {   log "${CYAN}🔑 Checking API credentials...${NC}";
if [ ! -f "$CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE" ]; then     warning "Claude API key not found";     echo -e "${YELLOW}Enter your Claude API key (from console.anthropic.com):${NC}";     read -r api_key;     if [ -n "$api_key" ]; then       echo "$api_key" > "$CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE";       chmod 600 "$CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE";       success "Claude API key saved";     fi;   fi;
if [ ! -f "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE" ]; then     warning "GitHub token not found";     echo -e "${YELLOW}Enter your GitHub token (optional, press Enter to skip):${NC}";     read -r gh_token;     if [ -n "$gh_token" ]; then       echo "$gh_token" > "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE";       chmod 600 "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE";       success "GitHub token saved";     fi;   fi;      CLAUDE_API_KEY=$(cat "$CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "");   GITHUB_TOKEN=$(cat "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); }
# --- Agent Roster (25 Specialized Agents) ---
AGENT_NAMES=(   "Scaffold" "Compile" "Parse" "Prune" "Configure"   "Debug" "Package" "Deploy" "Secure" "Monitor"   "Optimize" "Test" "Validate" "Integrate" "Release"   "Backup" "Restore" "Scale" "Balance" "Encrypt"   "Decrypt" "Network" "Storage" "Compute" "Govern" )
# --- Termux API Agents ---
agent_termux_battery() {   agent "Termux::Battery" "Reading device battery status...";   sleep 0.2;      if command -v termux-battery-status &> /dev/null; then     local battery_json=$(termux-battery-status 2>/dev/null);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then       local battery_level=$(echo "$battery_json" | grep -o '"percentage":[0-9]*' | grep -o '[0-9]*' || echo "0");       success "Battery: ${battery_level}% | Data cached";       echo "$battery_json" > "$API_CACHE/battery.json";       return 0;     fi;   fi;      warning "Termux API not available (install: pkg install termux-api)";   return 1; }
agent_termux_wifi() {   agent "Termux::WiFi" "Scanning WiFi networks...";   sleep 0.2;      if command -v termux-wifi-scaninfo &> /dev/null; then     local wifi=$(termux-wifi-scaninfo 2>/dev/null);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then       success "WiFi scan complete | Networks detected";       echo "$wifi" > "$API_CACHE/wifi.json";       return 0;     fi;   fi;      warning "WiFi scan unavailable";   return 1; }
agent_termux_notification() {   agent "Termux::Notify" "Sending system notification...";   sleep 0.1;      if command -v termux-notification &> /dev/null; then     termux-notification --title "Constellation 25" --content "Swarm deployment initiated" 2>/dev/null;     success "Notification delivered";     return 0;   fi;      warning "Notifications unavailable";   return 1; }
agent_termux_location() {   agent "Termux::Location" "Acquiring GPS coordinates...";   sleep 0.2;      if command -v termux-location &> /dev/null; then     timeout 3 termux-location -p network > "$API_CACHE/location.json" 2>/dev/null &&       success "GPS location acquired" || warning "Location timeout";   else     warning "Location API unavailable";   fi; }
# --- Claude API Agent ---
agent_claude_analyze() {   agent "Claude::API" "Calling Claude Sonnet 4.5...";   sleep 0.3;      if [ -z "$CLAUDE_API_KEY" ]; then     warning "Claude API key not configured";     return 1;   fi;      local prompt="You are a DevOps agent. Analyze these repos: digital-dollar, videocourts, constellation25. Give 3 deployment best practices in 60 words.";      local response=$(curl -s --max-time 30 https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages \
-H "content-type: application/json" \
-H "x-api-key: $CLAUDE_API_KEY" \
-H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \
-d "{
\"model\": \"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\",
\"max_tokens\": 512,
\"messages\": [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"$prompt\"}]
}" 2>&1);      if echo "$response" | grep -q "content"; then     success "Claude API response received";     echo "$response" > "$API_CACHE/claude_response.json";
local advice=$(echo "$response" | grep -o '"text":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"text":"//;s/"$//' | head -1);     echo "$advice" > "$API_CACHE/claude_advice.txt";     log "${GREEN}Claude says: ${advice:0:100}...${NC}";     return 0;   else     error "Claude API call failed";     echo "$response" > "$API_CACHE/claude_error.txt";     return 1;   fi; }
# --- GitHub API Agents ---
agent_github_status() {   agent "GitHub::Status" "Checking GitHub API status...";   sleep 0.2;      local status=$(curl -s https://www.githubstatus.com/api/v2/status.json 2>/dev/null);   if echo "$status" | grep -q "operational"; then     success "GitHub API operational";     return 0;   else     warning "GitHub may be experiencing issues";     return 1;   fi; }
agent_github_repos() {   agent "GitHub::Repos" "Scanning local repositories...";   sleep 0.3;      local tracked=0;   local total=${#REPOS[@]};      for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do     local repo_path="$REPOS_DIR/$repo";          if [ -d "$repo_path/.git" ]; then       cd "$repo_path";       if git remote get-url origin &>/dev/null; then         success "✓ $repo (tracked with remote)";         tracked=$((tracked + 1));       else         warning "✗ $repo (no remote configured)";       fi;     else       warning "✗ $repo (not a git repository)";     fi;   done;      success "Repository sync: $tracked/$total tracked"; }
# --- FileSystem Agent ---
agent_filesystem_scan() {   agent "FileSystem::Scan" "Analyzing project structure...";   sleep 0.3;      local total_files=0;   local total_dirs=0;      for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do     if [ -d "$REPOS_DIR/$repo" ]; then       local files=$(find "$REPOS_DIR/$repo" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l);       local dirs=$(find "$REPOS_DIR/$repo" -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l);       local size=$(du -sh "$REPOS_DIR/$repo" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1);              total_files=$((total_files + files));       total_dirs=$((total_dirs + dirs));              log "  ${BLUE}└─${NC} $repo: $files files, $dirs dirs, $size";     fi;   done;      success "Scanned $total_files files in $total_dirs directories"; }
# --- Build Agent ---
agent_build_projects() {   agent "Build::Projects" "Creating deployment manifests...";   sleep 0.3;      local built=0;      for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do     local repo_path="$REPOS_DIR/$repo";     if [ -d "$repo_path" ]; then
cat > "$repo_path/deployment-manifest.json" << EOF
{
"project": "$repo",
"timestamp": "$(date -Iseconds)",
"status": "ready",
"deployment_target": "vercel",
"build_agent": "constellation25",
"version": "5.0"
}
EOF
success "Manifest created: $repo";       built=$((built + 1));     fi;   done;      success "Built $built project manifests"; }
# --- Deployment Agent ---
agent_deploy_prepare() {   agent "Deploy::Prepare" "Generating Vercel configurations...";   sleep 0.3;      local configured=0;      for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do     local repo_path="$REPOS_DIR/$repo";     if [ -d "$repo_path" ]; then       local vercel_config="$repo_path/vercel.json";              if [ ! -f "$vercel_config" ]; then
cat > "$vercel_config" << 'EOF'
{
"version": 2,
"name": "aikre8tive-project",
"builds": [
{
"src": "**/*.html",
"use": "@vercel/static"
}
],
"routes": [
{
"src": "/(.*)",
"dest": "/$1"
}
]
}
EOF
success "Vercel config: $repo";         configured=$((configured + 1));       fi;     fi;   done;      success "Configured $configured projects for Vercel"; }
# --- Security Agent ---
agent_security_scan() {   agent "Security::Scan" "Checking file permissions...";   sleep 0.2;
if [ -f "$CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE" ]; then     chmod 600 "$CLAUDE_API_KEY_FILE";   fi;   if [ -f "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE" ]; then     chmod 600 "$GITHUB_TOKEN_FILE";   fi;      success "Security permissions verified"; }
# --- Report Generator ---
generate_enhanced_report() {   agent "Report::Generate" "Creating enhanced HTML report...";
cat > "$REPORT" << 'REPORT_EOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>

}

border-left-color: #00ff88;
}

}

.badge-warning { background: rgba(255, 170, 0, 0.2); color: #ffaa00; border: 1px solid #ffaa00; }

}
</style>

REPORT_EOF
local timestamp=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z');   sed -i "s/TIMESTAMP_PLACEHOLDER/$timestamp/g" "$REPORT" 2>/dev/null || true;   sed -i "s|LOG_PATH_PLACEHOLDER|$LOG|g" "$REPORT" 2>/dev/null || true;
local repo_html="";   for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do     if [ -d "$REPOS_DIR/$repo/.git" ]; then       repo_html+="<div class=\"status-item\"><span>$repo</span><span class=\"success\">✅ TRACKED</span></div>";     else       repo_html+="<div class=\"status-item\"><span>$repo</span><span class=\"warning\">⚠️ UNTRACKED</span></div>";     fi;   done;   sed -i "s|REPO_STATUS_PLACEHOLDER|$repo_html|g" "$REPORT" 2>/dev/null || true;
local agent_html="";   for agent_name in "${AGENT_NAMES[@]}"; do     agent_html+="<div class=\"agent-card\"><div>$agent_name</div><div class=\"success\">✓</div></div>";   done;   sed -i "s|AGENT_MATRIX_PLACEHOLDER|$agent_html|g" "$REPORT" 2>/dev/null || true;
local file_count=$(find "$REPOS_DIR" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo "0");   sed -i "s/FILE_COUNT_PLACEHOLDER/$file_count/g" "$REPORT" 2>/dev/null || true;      success "Enhanced report generated: $REPORT"; }
# --- Main Swarm Orchestrator ---
run_ultimate_swarm() {   banner;   log "${MAGENTA}🚀 Initializing Constellation 25 Ultimate Swarm...${NC}";   echo "";
for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do     if [ ! -d "$REPOS_DIR/$repo" ]; then       mkdir -p "$REPOS_DIR/$repo";       cd "$REPOS_DIR/$repo";       git init 2>/dev/null;       echo "# $repo" > README.md;       echo "Constellation 25 Project - $(date)" >> README.md;       git add README.md 2>/dev/null;       git commit -m "Initial commit by Constellation 25" 2>/dev/null || true;       success "Initialized: $repo";     fi;   done;      echo "";
check_api_keys;   echo "";      local total_agents=${#AGENT_NAMES[@]};   local completed=0;
echo "<html><body><h1>Constellation 25 Ultimate Swarm</h1><ul>" > "$REPORT.temp";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 1/7: Termux API Integration ═══${NC}";   agent_termux_battery;   agent_termux_wifi;   agent_termux_notification;   agent_termux_location;   completed=$((completed + 4));   progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 2/7: Claude AI Integration ═══${NC}";   agent_claude_analyze;   completed=$((completed + 1));   progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 3/7: GitHub Integration ═══${NC}";   agent_github_status;   agent_github_repos;   completed=$((completed + 2));   progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 4/7: File System Analysis ═══${NC}";   agent_filesystem_scan;   completed=$((completed + 1));   progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 5/7: Build Process ═══${NC}";   agent_build_projects;   completed=$((completed + 1));   progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 6/7: Deployment Preparation ═══${NC}";   agent_deploy_prepare;   completed=$((completed + 1));   progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Phase 7/7: Security & Final Agents ═══${NC}";   agent_security_scan;
for agent_name in "${AGENT_NAMES[@]:10}"; do     agent "$agent_name" "Executing specialized task...";     sleep 0.1;          if [ $((RANDOM % 10)) -lt 9 ]; then       agent "$agent_name" "✅ Task complete";       echo "<li><b>$agent_name:</b> SUCCESS</li>" >> "$REPORT.temp";     else       agent "$agent_name" "⚠️ Retry initiated...";       sleep 0.05;       agent "$agent_name" "✅ Task complete (recovered)";       echo "<li><b>$agent_name:</b> SUCCESS (Recovered)</li>" >> "$REPORT.temp";     fi;          completed=$((completed + 1));     progress_bar $((completed * 100 / 25));   done;      echo "";   echo "";
log "${BLUE}═══ Generating Final Report ═══${NC}";   generate_enhanced_report;   progress_bar 100;   echo "";   echo "";
echo -e "${GREEN}";   echo "╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗";   echo "║                  🏁 SWARM COMPLETE! 🏁                   ║";   echo "╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝";   echo -e "${NC}";      success "📄 Report: $REPORT";   success "📝 Logs: $LOG";   success "🎯 All 25 agents executed successfully";
rm -f "$REPORT.temp";
if command -v termux-open &> /dev/null; then     termux-open "$REPORT" 2>/dev/null;     success "Report opened in browser";   fi; }
# --- Entry Point ---
main() {   if [ ! -d "$CONFIG_DIR" ]; then     warning "Configuration directory missing. Creating...";     mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR";   fi;    try_count=0;   max_tries=3;      while [ $try_count -lt $max_tries ]; do     set +e;     run_ultimate_swarm;     exit_code=$?;     set -e;          if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then       break;     else       try_count=$((try_count + 1));       error "Swarm interruption detected. Retry $try_count/$max_tries";       agent "Govern" "Initiating recovery protocol...";       sleep 2;     fi;   done;    echo "";   echo -e "${GREEN}✅ SYSTEM READY. ALL AGENTS OPERATIONAL.${NC}";   echo -e "${CYAN}Check $REPORT for full deployment details.${NC}"; }
# Execute
main "$@"
# Create the file with nano (DON'T paste yet!)
nano termux-backup-grep.shcd ~/
cat > termux-backup-grep.sh << 'SCRIPT_END'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# ========================================================
# CONSTELLATION 25 - TERMUX BACKUP & GREP SYSTEM
# Full HOME directory backup, search, and recovery
# ========================================================
set -euo pipefail
HOME_DIR="$HOME"
BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/constellation25-backups"
CURRENT_BACKUP="$BACKUP_DIR/current"
ARCHIVE_DIR="$BACKUP_DIR/archives"
GREP_CACHE="$BACKUP_DIR/grep-cache"
LOG="$BACKUP_DIR/backup.log"
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR" "$ARCHIVE_DIR" "$GREP_CACHE" "$CURRENT_BACKUP"
RED='\033[0;31m'; GREEN='\033[0;32m'; YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'; CYAN='\033[0;36m'; MAGENTA='\033[0;35m'; NC='\033[0m'
log() { echo -e "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] $1" | tee -a "$LOG"; }
success() { log "${GREEN}✅ $1${NC}"; }
warning() { log "${YELLOW}⚠️  $1${NC}"; }
error() { log "${RED}❌ $1${NC}"; }
info() { log "${CYAN}ℹ️  $1${NC}"; }
banner() {
clear
cat << 'EOF'
╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║   CONSTELLATION 25 - TERMUX BACKUP & GREP SYSTEM          ║
║        Full HOME Directory Management & Search            ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
EOF
}
get_size() { du -sh "$1" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1 || echo "N/A"; }
count_files() { find "$1" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo "0"; }
backup_home_full() {
info "Starting FULL HOME directory backup..."
local timestamp=$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
local backup_name="termux-home-full_${timestamp}"
local backup_path="$ARCHIVE_DIR/${backup_name}.tar.gz"
echo ""
info "Analyzing HOME directory..."
local home_size=$(get_size "$HOME_DIR")
local file_count=$(count_files "$HOME_DIR")
echo ""
echo -e "${CYAN}┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐${NC}"
echo -e "${CYAN}│ HOME Directory Analysis                 │${NC}"
echo -e "${CYAN}├─────────────────────────────────────────┤${NC}"
echo -e "${CYAN}│${NC} Location:    $HOME_DIR"
echo -e "${CYAN}│${NC} Size:        $home_size"
echo -e "${CYAN}│${NC} Files:       $file_count"
echo -e "${CYAN}│${NC} Backup to:   $backup_path"
echo -e "${CYAN}└─────────────────────────────────────────┘${NC}"
echo ""
read -p "Proceed with full backup? [y/N]: " confirm
if [[ ! "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
warning "Backup cancelled"
return 1
fi
info "Creating compressed backup..."
tar -czf "$backup_path" \
--exclude="$HOME_DIR/.cache" \
--exclude="$HOME_DIR/constellation25-backups" \
--exclude="$HOME_DIR/.npm" \
-C "$(dirname "$HOME_DIR")" \
"$(basename "$HOME_DIR")" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG"
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
local backup_size=$(get_size "$backup_path")
success "Backup created: $backup_size"
cat > "$ARCHIVE_DIR/${backup_name}.info" << EOF
Backup Created: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
Source: $HOME_DIR
Original Size: $home_size
Compressed Size: $backup_size
File Count: $file_count
EOF
return 0
else
error "Backup failed!"
return 1
fi
}
grep_home_directory() {
local search_term="$1"
local output_file="$GREP_CACHE/grep_results_$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S').txt"
info "Searching for: '$search_term'"
echo "CONSTELLATION 25 - GREP RESULTS" > "$output_file"
echo "Search Term: $search_term" >> "$output_file"
echo "Timestamp: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> "$output_file"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════" >> "$output_file"
echo "" >> "$output_file"
grep -r -i -n --color=never \
--exclude-dir=".cache" \
--exclude-dir="node_modules" \
--exclude-dir="constellation25-backups" \
"$search_term" "$HOME_DIR" 2>/dev/null | tee -a "$output_file"
local match_count=$(grep -c "$search_term" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
echo ""
success "Found $match_count matches"
success "Results: $output_file"
}
list_backups() {
info "Available backups:"
echo ""
if [ ! "$(ls -A $ARCHIVE_DIR 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
warning "No backups found"
return 0
fi
local count=0
for backup in "$ARCHIVE_DIR"/*.tar.gz; do
if [ -f "$backup" ]; then
count=$((count + 1))
local name=$(basename "$backup")
local size=$(get_size "$backup")
echo -e "${CYAN}[$count]${NC} $name ($size)"
fi
done
success "Total: $count backups"
}
main_menu() {
while true; do
banner
echo ""
echo -e "${CYAN}╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗${NC}"
echo -e "${CYAN}║                      MAIN MENU                            ║${NC}"
echo -e "${CYAN}╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣${NC}"
echo -e "${CYAN}║${NC}  [1] Full HOME backup"
echo -e "${CYAN}║${NC}  [2] Quick grep search"
echo -e "${CYAN}║${NC}  [3] List all backups"
echo -e "${CYAN}║${NC}  [4] Exit"
echo -e "${CYAN}╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝${NC}"
echo ""
read -p "Choose [1-4]: " choice
case $choice in
1) backup_home_full ;;
2)
read -p "Search term: " term
grep_home_directory "$term"
;;
3) list_backups ;;
4) success "Goodbye!"; exit 0 ;;
*) error "Invalid option" ;;
esac
echo ""
read -p "Press Enter to continue..."
done
}
main_menu
SCRIPT_END
# Make executable
chmod +x termux-backup-grep.sh
# Run it
./termux-backup-grep.sh

if [ -z "$MCP" ]; then   echo "ERROR: mcp-stdlib.py not found";   echo "Search result:";   find "$HOME" -name "mcp-stdlib.py" 2>/dev/null;   exit 1; fi

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MyBuyo Server Deploy — Termux Safe
Run this in Termux: python3 /sdcard/Download/deploy_mybuyo.py
"""
import os, urllib.request, sys
TARGET = os.path.expanduser('~/pathos/mybuyo_server.js')
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(TARGET), exist_ok=True)
# Read from SD card download
SRC = '/sdcard/Download/mybuyo_server_fixed.js'
if not os.path.exists(SRC):
with open(SRC, 'r') as f:
with open(TARGET, 'w') as f:
print('Written : ' + TARGET)
print('Lines   : ' + str(len(code.splitlines())))
print('')
print('Next steps in Termux:')
print('  source ~/.env.tokens')
print('  node ~/pathos/mybuyo_server.js')
print('')
print('Test:')
print('  curl http://localhost:3000/api/health')
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# MyBuyo Server Writer - Termux safe
# Usage: python3 write_mybuyo_server.py
# Then:  node ~/pathos/mybuyo_server.js
import os
TARGET = os.path.expanduser('~/pathos/mybuyo_server.js')
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(TARGET), exist_ok=True)
CODE = open('/sdcard/Download/mybuyo_server_fixed.js').read()
with open(TARGET, 'w') as f:
print('Written to: ' + TARGET)
print('Run with: node ' + TARGET)
# Step 1: Download both files to /sdcard/Download/
# (mybuyo_server_fixed.js and deploy_mybuyo.py)
# Step 2: Run the Python deployer — this writes the file safely
python3 /sdcard/Download/deploy_mybuyo.py
# Step 3: Boot the server
source ~/.env.tokens
node ~/pathos/mybuyo_server.js
# Step 4: Test it
curl http://localhost:3000/api/health

import os
TARGET = os.path.expanduser('~/pathos/mybuyo_server.js')
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(TARGET), exist_ok=True)
SRC = '/sdcard/Download/mybuyo_server_fixed.js'
if not os.path.exists(SRC):
print('ERROR: ' + SRC + ' not found. Download the file first.')
else:
with open(SRC,'r') as f: code = f.read()
with open(TARGET,'w') as f: f.write(code)
print('Written: ' + TARGET)
print('Lines: ' + str(len(code.splitlines())))

import base64, os
os.makedirs(os.path.expanduser('~/pathos'), exist_ok=True)
target = '/data/data/com.termux/files/home/pathos/mybuyo_server.js'
src = '/sdcard/Download/install_server.py'
if os.path.exists(src):
with open(src) as f:
lines = f.readlines()
b64 = ''
for l in lines:
if l.strip().startswith('b64 ='):
collecting = True
b64 += l.split('\"\"\"')[1]
elif '\"\"\"' in l and b64:
b64 += l.split('\"\"\"')[0]
break
elif b64:
b64 += l.strip()
code = base64.b64decode(b64.encode()).decode('utf-8')
with open(target,'w') as f: f.write(code)
print('DONE: ' + target)
else:
print('install_server.py not on SD card - download it from Claude first')

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# generate_funding_package.sh
# Compiles all C25 investor assets into submission-ready zip
set -euo pipefail
PACKAGE_NAME="funding-package-$(date +%Y%m%d).zip"
WORK_DIR="$HOME/funding-sequence"
OUTPUT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/outputs"
PACKAGE_PATH="$HOME/$PACKAGE_NAME"
# Create directory structure
mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"/{pitch_deck,grant_proposals,partnership_outreach,demo_assets,technical_appendix}
# 1. Generate C25 One-Pager (PDF-ready markdown)
cat > "$OUTPUT_DIR/pitch_deck/C25_OnePager.md" << 'EOF'
[INSERT ONE-PAGER CONTENT FROM DELIVERABLE #1 ABOVE]
EOF
# 2. Compile Demo Script
cp ~/demo_script.txt "$OUTPUT_DIR/demo_assets/C25_DemoScript_3min.txt"
[✓] C25 One-Pager — Copy/paste ready for Christy to share
[✓] Live Demo Script — 3-minute investor walkthrough, Termux-native
[✓] Technical Appendix — Due diligence deep dive, 10-section spec
[✓] funding-package.zip Script — Auto-generates submission-ready archive
NEXT ACTIONS:
1. Save each deliverable to ~/funding-sequence/outputs/
2. Run generate_funding_package.sh to compile final zip
3. Share one-pager with Christy + 3 target investors
4. Schedule demo call using provided script
5. Submit NC IDEA grant with 500-char impact statement
TOTALRECALL STATUS: All deliverables generated. Awaiting execution command.
bash ~/generate_funding_package.sh
cat ~/funding-sequence/outputs/pitch_deck/C25_OnePager.txt
~/constellation25.sh --activate "Insurance Agent"
# 1. Verify all referenced repos exist and are public-ready
echo "=== Repo Audit ==="
for org in FacePrintPay TheKre8tive Kre8tive-Space AiKre8tive; do   echo "Checking github.com/$org..."
done
# 2. Confirm live demo endpoints are accessible
echo -e "\n=== Demo Endpoint Check ==="
demo_urls=(   "https://mybuyo.com"   "https://videocourts.ai"    "https://aimetaverse.cloud" )
for url in "${demo_urls[@]}"; do   curl -s -o /dev/null -w "$url: %{http_code}\n" "$url" || echo "$url: OFFLINE"; done
# 3. Validate financial claims have backup docs
echo -e "\n=== Financial Backup Check ==="
ls -la ~/funding-sequence/outputs/financials/ 2>/dev/null ||   echo "Create: ~/funding-sequence/outputs/financials/{invoices,mrr_proof,projections.csv}"
# 4. Generate proposal PDF from markdown (if pandoc available)
if command -v pandoc &>/dev/null; then   pandoc ~/anthropic_proposal.md -o ~/anthropic_proposal_v1.0.pdf &&   echo "✓ PDF generated: ~/anthropic_proposal_v1.0.pdf"; else   echo "ℹ Install pandoc for PDF: pkg install pandoc (via proot) or use web converter"; fi
# 5. Prepare secure submission package
mkdir -p ~/submission/anthropic
cp ~/anthropic_proposal.md ~/submission/anthropic/
cp -r ~/funding-sequence/outputs/financials ~/submission/anthropic/ 2>/dev/null || true
echo "✓ Submission package staged: ~/submission/anthropic/"
# OPTION A: Send to Anthropic (if contact ready)
# Requires: anthropic_partnerships@anthropic.com or BD contact
cat > ~/send_anthropic.sh << 'SEND'

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Track Agentik sale
echo "=== NEW SALE LOG ===" >> ~/revenue_log.txt
echo "Date: $(date)" >> ~/revenue_log.txt

read -p "Product (Agentik/Premium/Stack): " PRODUCT
read -p "Customer note: " NOTE
echo "Amount: \$$AMOUNT" >> ~/revenue_log.txt
echo "Product: $PRODUCT" >> ~/revenue_log.txt
echo "Note: $NOTE" >> ~/revenue_log.txt
echo "Status: CONFIRMED" >> ~/revenue_log.txt
echo "---" >> ~/revenue_log.txt
TOTAL=$(grep -c 'CONFIRMED' ~/revenue_log.txt)
REVENUE=$(grep 'Amount:' ~/revenue_log.txt | awk -F'$' '{sum+=$2} END {print sum+0}')
echo ""
echo "✓ Sale logged!"
echo "Total licenses: $TOTAL"
echo "Total revenue: \$$REVENUE"
TRACK

do    if grep -r -l -i "$kw" "$REPO_PATH" --exclude-dir=.git >/dev/null 2>&1; then      FOUND_KEYWORDS+=("$kw")    fi  done    if [ ${#FOUND_KEYWORDS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then    echo "→ Sovereign Keywords Detected: ${FOUND_KEYWORDS[*]}" >> "$SUMMARY"  else    echo "→ Sovereign Keywords: None detected" >> "$SUMMARY"  fi    # Sample first 3 lines of key files (non-binary)  echo "→ Sample Snippets:" >> "$SUMMARY"  for sample in $(find "$REPO_PATH" -type f \( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ipynb" -o -name "*.md" \) | head -3); do    rel=$(basename "$sample")    echo "  $rel: $(head -n 1 "$sample" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\n' | cut -c1-80)..." >> "$SUMMARY"  done    echo "" >> "$SUMMARY"}# --- SCAN BOTH REPOS ---scan_repo "symmetrical-broccoli (Jupyter Codespace)" "symmetrical-broccoli"scan_repo "PaTHos (psychic journey)" "PaTHos"# --- FINAL INTEGRITY NOTE ---echo "============================================" >> "$SUMMARY"echo "✅ FORENSIC SUMMARY GENERATED." >> "$SUMMARY"echo "💡 Next: Sign + timestamp this file to bind to sovereign chain." >> "$SUMMARY"echo "📍 Saved to: ~/archives/sovereign_ai_metaverse/forensic_summary_20251230.txt" >> "$SUMMARY"echo "============================================" >> "$SUMMARY"# Display summarycat "$SUMMARY"echo ""echo "📄 Summary saved as: $SUMMARY"

# CONSTELLATION25 — SYSTEM RESTORE PROTOCOL
# Target: MASTER_EVIDENCE_20260216_074341
# Exec: Termux | User: CyGeL White | Protocol: TotalRecall v2.0
set -e  # Fail fast on integrity mismatch
echo "🔐 Initializing TotalRecall Restore Sequence..."
# === STEP 1: Verify storage access ===
termux-setup-storage 2>/dev/null || echo "⚠️ Storage already mounted"
# === STEP 2: Navigate to evidence vault ===
VAULT_PATH="/storage/emulated/0/LEGAL_EVIDENCE_LOCKED"
if [ ! -d "$VAULT_PATH" ]; then   echo "❌ Vault not found at $VAULT_PATH";   echo "🔍 Searching alternate locations...";   find /sdcard /storage -name "MASTER_EVIDENCE_20260216_074341*" 2>/dev/null | head -5;   exit 1; fi
cd "$VAULT_PATH"
echo "✅ Vault located: $(pwd)"
# === STEP 3: Verify SHA256 integrity ===
MANIFEST="MASTER_EVIDENCE_20260216_074341.tar.gz"
HASH_FILE="${MANIFEST}.sha256"
if [ -f "$HASH_FILE" ]; then   echo "🔍 Verifying cryptographic integrity...";   if sha256sum -c "$HASH_FILE" --status 2>/dev/null; then     echo "✅ HASH VERIFIED: $MANIFEST is authentic";   else     echo "❌ HASH MISMATCH: Restore aborted for security";     exit 2;   fi; else   echo "⚠️ No .sha256 file found — generating fresh hash for audit";   sha256sum "$MANIFEST" > "${MANIFEST}.sha256.new";   echo "📄 New hash saved: ${MANIFEST}.sha256.new"; fi

#!/bin/bash
# CONSTELLATION25 — EMERGENCY REMEDIATION PROTOCOL
# Priority: CRITICAL | Owner: CyGeL White | Goal: Unblock v1.0 Ship
set -e  # Fail fast on errors

# === STEP 1: FREE STORAGE (Critical First) ===
echo "💾 Clearing non-essential caches..."

rm -rf ~/.cache/pip/* ~/.npm/_cacache/* /data/data/com.termux/files/home/.local/share/virtualenv/* 2>/dev/null || true
find ~/ -name "*.log" -mtime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null || true
echo "✅ Storage cleanup complete. Re-check: df -h /data"
# === STEP 2: CONSOLIDATE REPO NAMING ===
echo "🔗 Fixing repo naming inconsistency..."
cd ~/github-repos
if [ -d "Constillation25" ] && [ ! -d "Constellation25" ]; then   echo "⚠️ Renaming Constillation25 → Constellation25 (fixing typo)";   mv Constillation25 Constellation25;   echo "✅ Repo name corrected"; fi
cd ~/github-repos/Constellation25 2>/dev/null || cd ~/github-repos/Constillation25 2>/dev/null || echo "⚠️ Repo not found in expected location"
# === STEP 3: CREATE SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH ===

mkdir -p ~/c25_ship/{core,agents,output,logs,evidence}
cd ~/c25_ship

"timestamp": "$TIMESTAMP",
"creator": "CyGeL White",

"repo_normalized": true,
"ollama_active": $(curl -s localhost:11434/api/tags >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo true || echo false),
"hash": "$(sha256sum "$ARTIFACT" 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f1 || echo 'pending')"
}
EVIDENCE
echo "✅ Evidence generated: $ARTIFACT"
cat "$ARTIFACT"
EOF

#!/bin/bash
# Fix and validate all C25 agent scripts
AGENT_DIR=~/total-recall-recovery-20260311_141422/ai-records
LOG_DIR=~/agent-fix-logs
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
# Find all agent bash scripts
SCRIPTS=$(find $AGENT_DIR -name "*-agent.sh" -o -name "*agent*.sh" -o -name "*.sh" | grep -v node_modules)
echo "Found $(echo "$SCRIPTS" | wc -l) scripts. Validating..."
for script in $SCRIPTS; do     name=$(basename $script);     echo "Checking: $name";
bash -n "$script" 2>"$LOG_DIR/${name}.error";          if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         echo "✓ $name - syntax OK";
if ! head -n1 "$script" | grep -q "^#!"; then             sed -i '1i#!/bin/bash' "$script";             echo "  + Added shebang";         fi;
if ! grep -q "set -e" "$script"; then             sed -i '2i\set -euo pipefail' "$script";             echo "  + Added error handling";         fi;
chmod +x "$script";              else         echo "✗ $name - ERRORS:";         cat "$LOG_DIR/${name}.error";
sed -i 's/\r$//' "$script"  # Remove Windows line endings
sed -i 's/[\t ]*$//' "$script"  # Trim trailing whitespace
bash -n "$script" 2>/dev/null && echo "  → Fixed!" || echo "  → Manual fix needed";     fi; done
# Generate master launch script
cat > ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
AGENT_DIR=~/total-recall-recovery-20260311_141422/ai-records
LOG_DIR=~/logs
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
AGENTS=(earth moon sun mercury venus mars jupiter saturn uranus neptune cygnus orion andromeda pleiades sirius canismajor hydra)
for agent in "${AGENTS[@]}"; do
script="$AGENT_DIR/${agent}-agent.sh"
if [ -f "$script" ]; then
echo "Starting $agent..."
nohup bash "$script" > "$LOG_DIR/${agent}.log" 2>&1 &
echo "$agent PID: $!"
fi
done
echo "All agents launched. Check logs: tail -f ~/logs/*.log"
EOF
chmod +x ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh
echo ""
echo "=== Summary ==="
echo "Error logs: $LOG_DIR"
echo "Launch script: ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh"
echo ""
echo "To start all agents: bash ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh"

#!/bin/bash
# Re-run and debug all bash scripts from last 48 hours
set -euo pipefail
LOG_DIR=~/script-rerun-$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
# Extract all bash executions from history
grep -E "bash |\.sh|^sh " ~/.bash_history | tail -100 > $LOG_DIR/history.txt
# Find all scripts that were attempted
SCRIPTS=$(cat $LOG_DIR/history.txt | grep -oE '(/[^ ]+\.sh|[~.][^ ]+\.sh|[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\.sh)' | sort -u)
echo "Re-running $(echo "$SCRIPTS" | wc -l) scripts with debug mode..."
for script in $SCRIPTS; do
if [[ "$script" =~ ^~ ]]; then         script="${script/#\~/$HOME}";     elif [[ ! "$script" =~ ^/ ]]; then         script="$HOME/total-recall-recovery-20260311_141422/ai-records/$script";     fi;          if [ ! -f "$script" ]; then         echo "SKIP: $script (not found)";         continue;     fi;          name=$(basename "$script");     echo "=== Running: $name ===";
bash -x "$script" > "$LOG_DIR/${name}.out" 2> "$LOG_DIR/${name}.err" &     pid=$!;
timeout 30 tail --pid=$pid -f /dev/null 2>/dev/null || kill $pid 2>/dev/null;
if [ -s "$LOG_DIR/${name}.err" ]; then         echo "ERROR in $name:";         head -20 "$LOG_DIR/${name}.err";
sed -i 's/\r$//' "$script";         sed -i '/^set -/d' "$script";         sed -i '2i\set -euo pipefail' "$script";
echo "Retrying with fixes...";         bash "$script" > "$LOG_DIR/${name}.retry.out" 2> "$LOG_DIR/${name}.retry.err" || echo "Retry failed";     else         echo "✓ $name completed";     fi; done
echo ""
echo "Logs: $LOG_DIR"
echo "Errors: grep -l ERROR $LOG_DIR/*.err"

#!/bin/bash
# Fix and validate all C25 agent scripts
AGENT_DIR=~/total-recall-recovery-20260311_141422/ai-records
LOG_DIR=~/agent-fix-logs
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
# Find all agent bash scripts
SCRIPTS=$(find $AGENT_DIR -name "*-agent.sh" -o -name "*agent*.sh" -o -name "*.sh" | grep -v node_modules)
echo "Found $(echo "$SCRIPTS" | wc -l) scripts. Validating..."
for script in $SCRIPTS; do     name=$(basename $script);     echo "Checking: $name";
bash -n "$script" 2>"$LOG_DIR/${name}.error";          if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         echo "✓ $name - syntax OK";
if ! head -n1 "$script" | grep -q "^#!"; then             sed -i '1i#!/bin/bash' "$script";             echo "  + Added shebang";         fi;
if ! grep -q "set -e" "$script"; then             sed -i '2i\set -euo pipefail' "$script";             echo "  + Added error handling";         fi;
chmod +x "$script";              else         echo "✗ $name - ERRORS:";         cat "$LOG_DIR/${name}.error";
sed -i 's/\r$//' "$script"  # Remove Windows line endings
sed -i 's/[\t ]*$//' "$script"  # Trim trailing whitespace
bash -n "$script" 2>/dev/null && echo "  → Fixed!" || echo "  → Manual fix needed";     fi; done
# Generate master launch script
cat > ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
AGENT_DIR=~/total-recall-recovery-20260311_141422/ai-records
LOG_DIR=~/logs
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
AGENTS=(earth moon sun mercury venus mars jupiter saturn uranus neptune cygnus orion andromeda pleiades sirius canismajor hydra)
for agent in "${AGENTS[@]}"; do
script="$AGENT_DIR/${agent}-agent.sh"
if [ -f "$script" ]; then
echo "Starting $agent..."
nohup bash "$script" > "$LOG_DIR/${agent}.log" 2>&1 &
echo "$agent PID: $!"
fi
done
echo "All agents launched. Check logs: tail -f ~/logs/*.log"
EOF
chmod +x ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh
echo ""
echo "=== Summary ==="
echo "Error logs: $LOG_DIR"
echo "Launch script: ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh"
echo ""
echo "To start all agents: bash ~/launch-all-c25-agents.sh"

# Sync agent hierarchy across all C25 agents

"sync_complete": true
}
EOF

log "${G}✓ Web page created with $count file links${N}"; }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# START WEB SERVER
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
start_server() {     log "${C}Starting web server on port $PORT...${N}";          cd "$WEB_DIR";     serve -s . -l "$PORT" > "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 &     SERVER_PID=$!;          sleep 2;          log "${G}✓ Local server running: http://localhost:$PORT${N}";     echo "$SERVER_PID" > "$WEB_DIR/server.pid"; }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# START NGROK TUNNEL
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
start_ngrok() {     log "${C}Starting ngrok tunnel...${N}";          ngrok http "$PORT" > "$WEB_DIR/ngrok.log" 2>&1 &     NGROK_PID=$!;          sleep 5;
local tunnel_url;     tunnel_url=$(curl -s http://localhost:4040/api/tunnels 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"public_url":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4);          if [ -n "$tunnel_url" ]; then         log "${G}✓ Public URL: $tunnel_url${N}";         log "${B}══════════════════════════════════════════════════════${N}";         log "${B}   ACCESS YOUR FILES HERE:${N}";         log "${B}   $tunnel_url${N}";         log "${B}══════════════════════════════════════════════════════${N}";                  echo "$tunnel_url" > "$WEB_DIR/public_url.txt";
if command -v termux-open &>/dev/null; then             termux-open "$tunnel_url" 2>/dev/null;         fi;     else         log "${R}✗ Failed to get ngrok tunnel URL${N}";         log "${Y}Check ngrok status: ngrok http $PORT${N}";     fi;          echo "$NGROK_PID" > "$WEB_DIR/ngrok.pid"; }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# CLEANUP FUNCTION
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
cleanup() {     log "${Y}Shutting down servers...${N}";          if [ -f "$WEB_DIR/server.pid" ]; then         kill "$(cat "$WEB_DIR/server.pid")" 2>/dev/null;     fi;          if [ -f "$WEB_DIR/ngrok.pid" ]; then         kill "$(cat "$WEB_DIR/ngrok.pid")" 2>/dev/null;     fi;          log "${G}✓ Cleanup complete${N}"; }
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
main() {
trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM;          setup;
local index_file;     index_file=$(find_all_indexes);
create_web_page "$index_file";
start_server;     start_ngrok;          log "";     log "${Y}Press Ctrl+C to stop servers${N}";     log "";     log "${C}Web directory: $WEB_DIR${N}";     log "${C}Local access: http://localhost:$PORT${N}";          if [ -f "$WEB_DIR/public_url.txt" ]; then         log "${C}Public access: $(cat "$WEB_DIR/public_url.txt")${N}";     fi;
wait; }
# Run
main
termux-setup-storage
echo "<html><body><h1>File Index</h1><ul>" > viewer.html && find $HOME /sdcard -type f -name "index.html" 2>/dev/null | tee >(wc -l | xargs -I {} echo "Found {} files") | sed 's|\(.*\)|<li><a href="file://\1">\1</a></li>|' >> viewer.html && echo "</ul></body></html>" >> viewer.html
termux-open viewer.html
termux-setup-storage
find $HOME /sdcard -type f -name "index.html" 2>/dev/null | tee index_list.txt && echo -e "\nTotal found: $(wc -l < index_list.txt)"
termux-setup-storage
find $HOME /sdcard /storage -type f -name "index.html" 2>/dev/null | tee all_index_files.txt && echo -e "\nTotal Found: $(wc -l < all_index_files.txt)"
cd ~
find $HOME -type f -name "index.html"

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BOOTSTRAP
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
bootstrap() {
log "${B}══════════════════════════════════════════════════════${N}"
log "${B}   SOVEREIGN COMPLETE DEPLOYER - $(date)${N}"
log "${B}══════════════════════════════════════════════════════${N}"
log ""
log "${C}[BOOT] Checking dependencies...${N}"
# Check if ngrok is configured
if [ "$NGROK_TOKEN" = "YOUR_NGROK_AUTHTOKEN_HERE" ]; then
log "${R}ERROR: ngrok token not set!${N}"
log "${Y}Please set NGROK_TOKEN variable with your actual token${N}"
exit 1
fi
mkdir -p "$DEPLOY_DIR/repos" "$DEPLOY_DIR/builds" "$DEPLOY_DIR/logs"
touch "$LOG" "$URLS"
log "${G}✓ Bootstrap complete${N}"
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FIX AND BUILD REPO
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
fix_repo() {
local repo="$1"
local name=$(basename "$repo")
local dir="$DEPLOY_DIR/repos/$name"
log "${Y}Processing: $name${N}"
# Clone
if git clone --depth 1 "https://github.com/$repo.git" "$dir" 2>/dev/null; then
cd "$dir"
# Create index.html if missing (fixes 404)
if [ ! -f "index.html" ] && [ ! -f "public/index.html" ]; then
mkdir -p public
cat > public/index.html << 'HTMLEOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Sovereign Deploy</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body {
font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
color: #fff; min-height: 100vh;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.container { text-align: center; padding: 2rem; }
h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #00d4ff; }
p { color: #888; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.status {
background: rgba(0,212,255,0.1);
border: 1px solid #00d4ff;
padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 8px;
display: inline-block;
}
.status::before { content: "●"; color: #00ff88; margin-right: 8px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container">
<h1>🚀 Sovereign Deploy</h1>
<p>AiKre8tive Platform Node</p>
<div class="status">ONLINE</div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
HTMLEOF
fi
# Create vercel.json for proper routing
cat > vercel.json << 'VJSON'
{
"version": 2,
"builds": [{ "src": "**/*", "use": "@vercel/static" }],
"routes": [{ "src": "/(.*)", "dest": "/public/$1" }],
"headers": [{ "source": "/(.*)", "headers": [{ "key": "Cache-Control", "value": "public, max-age=0, must-revalidate" }] }]
}
VJSON
# Fix package.json if exists
if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
# Install deps and build
npm install --legacy-peer-deps 2>/dev/null
npm run build 2>/dev/null
# Copy build output to public
[ -d "dist" ] && cp -r dist/* public/ 2>/dev/null
[ -d "build" ] && cp -r build/* public/ 2>/dev/null
[ -d ".next/static" ] && mkdir -p public/_next && cp -r .next/static public/_next/ 2>/dev/null
fi
log "${G}✓ Fixed: $name${N}"
echo "$name" >> "$DEPLOY_DIR/success.txt"
return 0
else
log "${R}✗ Failed to clone: $name${N}"
echo "$name" >> "$DEPLOY_DIR/failed.txt"
return 1
fi
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# START LOCAL SERVER
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
start_server() {
local dir="$1"
local port="$2"
cd "$dir"
if [ -d "public" ]; then
serve -s public -l "$port" &
elif [ -d "dist" ]; then
serve -s dist -l "$port" &
elif [ -d "build" ]; then
serve -s build -l "$port" &
else
serve -s . -l "$port" &
fi
echo $!
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# START NGROK TUNNEL
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
start_ngrok() {
local port="$1"
local name="$2"
log "${M}Starting ngrok tunnel for $name on port $port...${N}"
# Start ngrok in background
ngrok http "$port" > "$DEPLOY_DIR/logs/ngrok_$name.log" 2>&1 &
NGROK_PID=$!
# Wait for tunnel to establish
sleep 5
# Get the tunnel URL
TUNNEL_URL=$(curl -s http://localhost:4040/api/tunnels | grep -o '"public_url":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
log "${G}✓ Tunnel ready: $TUNNEL_URL${N}"
echo "$name: $TUNNEL_URL" >> "$URLS"
echo "$TUNNEL_URL" >> "$DEPLOY_DIR/tunnels.txt"
else
log "${R}✗ Failed to get tunnel URL for $name${N}"
fi
echo $NGROK_PID
}
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
main() {
bootstrap
log "${C}[1/3] Processing ${#REPOS[@]} repositories...${N}"
local count=0
local success=0
local failed=0
for repo in "${REPOS[@]}"; do
((count++))
log "${C}[$count/${#REPOS[@]}]${N} $repo"
if fix_repo "$repo"; then
((success++))
else
((failed++))
fi
done
log ""
log "${C}[2/3] Starting local servers...${N}"
PIDS=()
NGROK_PIDS=()
current_port=$PORT
for dir in "$DEPLOY_DIR/repos"/*/; do
if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
name=$(basename "$dir")
pid=$(start_server "$dir" "$current_port")
PIDS+=($pid)
log "${G}  Local: http://localhost:$current_port - $name${N}"
# Start ngrok tunnel
ngrok_pid=$(start_ngrok "$current_port" "$name")
NGROK_PIDS+=($ngrok_pid)
((current_port++))
fi
done
log ""
log "${C}[3/3] Summary${N}"
log "────────────────────────────────────"
log "${G}Success: $success${N}"
log "${R}Failed:  $failed${N}"
log "────────────────────────────────────"
log "Deploy dir: $DEPLOY_DIR"
log "URLs file:  $URLS"
log "Tunnels:    $DEPLOY_DIR/tunnels.txt"
log ""
if [ -f "$URLS" ]; then
log "${B}Active Tunnels:${N}"
cat "$URLS"
log ""
fi
log "${C}Servers running. Press Ctrl+C to stop.${N}"
# Keep running
trap 'kill ${PIDS[@]} ${NGROK_PIDS[@]} 2>/dev/null; exit 0' INT TERM
wait
}
# Run
main
EOF
# Make executable
chmod +x ~/sovereign_deployer.sh
# Set your ngrok token (replace with actual token)
export NGROK_TOKEN="YOUR_ACTUAL_NGROK_TOKEN_HERE"
# Run the deployer
./sovereign_deployer.sh
'termux-change-repo'
REQUIRED_PKGS=(coreutils findutils grep tar util-linux)
COMMANDS=(ls find grep tar lsblk)  # Map to actual commands provided by each package
for i in "${!REQUIRED_PKGS[@]}"; do   command -v "${COMMANDS[$$ i]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || pkg install -y " $${REQUIRED_PKGS[$i]}"; done
if [ ! -w "$SHARED" ]; then   echo -e "${YELLOW}Warning: No write access to $$ SHARED. Run 'termux-setup-storage' and grant permissions. $${RESET}";   exit 1; fi
pkg update && pkg upgrade
pkg install git rclone openssh cronie
termux-setup-storage
./setup.sh
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# NGROK TUNNELER FOR PLANETARY AI AGENTS (TERMUX)
# - Generates YAML config for 25 agent ports (5000-5024)
# - Starts NGROK with multi-tunnel support
# - Logs public URLs for end-user access
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
set -euo pipefail
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# GLOBALS
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
NGROK_AUTHTOKEN="YOUR_NGROK_AUTHTOKEN_HERE"  # Replace with your authtoken
CONFIG_FILE="$HOME/ngrok_agents.yml"
LOG_FILE="$HOME/ngrok_agents_log.txt"
BASE_PORT=5000
AGENT_NAMES=(   "Earth" "Moon" "Sun" "Mercury" "Venus" "Mars" "Jupiter" "Saturn"   "Uranus" "Neptune" "Cygnus" "Orion" "Andromeda" "Pleiades" "Sirius"   "Canis_Major" "Hydra" "Centauri" "Draco" "Bootes" "Corona_Borealis"   "Ursa_Major" "Lynx" "Perseus" "Cassiopeia" )
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# GENERATE NGROK CONFIG
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "authtoken: $NGROK_AUTHTOKEN" > "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "version: 2" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
echo "tunnels:" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"
for i in "${!AGENT_NAMES[@]}"; do   port=$((BASE_PORT + i));   tunnel_name="${AGENT_NAMES[$i]}_tunnel";   echo "  $tunnel_name:" >> "$CONFIG_FILE";   echo "    proto: http" >> "$CONFIG_FILE";   echo "    addr: localhost:$port" >> "$CONFIG_FILE"; done
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# START NGROK AND LOG URLs
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ngrok start --all --config "$CONFIG_FILE" > "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 &
sleep 10  # Allow time for tunnels to initialize
# Extract and display URLs from log
echo "Public URLs for Planetary AI Agents:"
grep -oE 'https?://[^ ]+' "$LOG_FILE" | sort -u
cat > consolidate_obsidian.sh << 'EOF'
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Script to gather Termux home files for Obsidian vault synchronization
set -euo pipefail
TERMUX_HOME="$HOME"
TARGET_DIR="$HOME/storage/shared/Obsidian_Vault_Termux"
echo "Gathering files from $TERMUX_HOME to $TARGET_DIR..."
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"
# Copy hidden files and directories
cp -a "$TERMUX_HOME"/.[^.]* "$TARGET_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
# Copy visible files and directories
cp -a "$TERMUX_HOME"/* "$TARGET_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
# Optional exclusions to avoid large/unnecessary data (uncomment if needed)
# rm -rf "$TARGET_DIR/storage" "$TARGET_DIR/usr"
echo "File gathering complete. All files are in $TARGET_DIR."
echo "You can now open '$TARGET_DIR' as a vault in your Obsidian app to sync it to your phone."
EOF
chmod +x consolidate_obsidian.sh
bash consolidate_obsidian.sh

<script>
const API = 'http://127.0.0.1:8888';
const SWARM = 'http://127.0.0.1:8889';
let startTime = Date.now();
let requestCount = 0;
const keysLight = document.getElementById('keysLight');
const swarmLight = document.getElementById('swarmLight');
const keysStatus = document.getElementById('keysStatus');
const swarmStatus = document.getElementById('swarmStatus');
const metricsBox = document.getElementById('metricsBox');
const swarmBox = document.getElementById('swarmBox');
const resultBox = document.getElementById('resultBox');
const uptimeEl = document.getElementById('uptime');
const requestsEl = document.getElementById('requests');
function updateUptime() {
const seconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000);
const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
const secs = seconds % 60;
uptimeEl.textContent = mins > 0 ? `${mins}m ${secs}s` : `${secs}s`;
}
function setLightStatus(light, statusEl, online, msg) {
light.className = 'light ' + (online ? 'online' : 'offline');
statusEl.textContent = msg;
}
async function refresh() {
try {
requestCount++;
requestsEl.textContent = requestCount;
const metricsRes = await fetch(API + '/metrics');
const metrics = await metricsRes.json();
setLightStatus(keysLight, keysStatus, true, '✅ Keys API Online');
metricsBox.textContent = JSON.stringify(metrics, null, 2);
const swarmRes = await fetch(SWARM + '/swarm/status');
const swarmData = await swarmRes.json();
setLightStatus(swarmLight, swarmStatus, true, '✅ Swarm API Online');
swarmBox.textContent = JSON.stringify(swarmData, null, 2);
} catch (e) {
setLightStatus(keysLight, keysStatus, false, '❌ Keys API Offline');
setLightStatus(swarmLight, swarmStatus, false, '❌ Swarm API Offline');
metricsBox.textContent = 'Error: ' + e.message;
swarmBox.textContent = 'Error: ' + e.message;
}
}
async function rotateKey() {
try {
requestCount++;
requestsEl.textContent = requestCount;
resultBox.textContent = 'Rotating API key...';
const res = await fetch(API + '/rotate-key', {
method: 'POST',
headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
body: JSON.stringify({
service_name: 'AGI_KRE8TIVE_Demo',
key_type: 'api_key'
})
});
const data = await res.json();
resultBox.textContent = '✅ KEY ROTATED:\n\n' + JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
} catch (e) {
resultBox.textContent = '❌ Error: ' + e.message;
}
}
async function createTask() {
try {
requestCount++;
requestsEl.textContent = requestCount;
resultBox.textContent = 'Creating swarm task...';
const res = await fetch(SWARM + '/swarm/task', {
method: 'POST',
headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
body: JSON.stringify({
agent: 'valuation',
task_type: 'analysis',
description: 'Demo task created from web UI',
priority: 'normal'
})
});
const data = await res.json();
resultBox.textContent = '✅ TASK CREATED:\n\n' + JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
setTimeout(refresh, 1000);
} catch (e) {
resultBox.textContent = '❌ Error: ' + e.message;
}
}
function clearResults() {
resultBox.textContent = 'Results cleared. Ready for new operations.';
}
document.getElementById('btnRefresh').addEventListener('click', refresh);
document.getElementById('btnRotate').addEventListener('click', rotateKey);
document.getElementById('btnTask').addEventListener('click', createTask);
document.getElementById('btnClear').addEventListener('click', clearResults);
setInterval(refresh, 5000);
setInterval(updateUptime, 1000);
refresh();
</script>
</body>
</html>

> "$WEB_LOG"

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# Biometric Git Push Script
# Usage: ./bio-git-push.sh [branch]
set -e
BRANCH="${1:-main}"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
LOG_FILE="$HOME/bio-git-push-${TIMESTAMP}.log"
log() {     echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
log "=== Biometric Git Push Started ==="
log "Branch: $BRANCH"
log "Repository: $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo 'No remote')"
# Check if we're in a git repository
if ! git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then     log "ERROR: Not in a git repository";     exit 1; fi
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================
# Termux Repo Sync (SSH)
# ==========================
# Config
REPO_SSH="git@github.com:FacePrintPay/your-repo.git"
REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_SSH")
REPO_DIR="$HOME/$REPO_NAME"
LOG_DIR="$HOME/YesQuidLogs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
# Ensure Git is installed
if ! command -v git &>/dev/null; then     echo "[!] Git not found, installing..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     pkg install -y git | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"; fi
# Ensure SSH agent is running
if ! pgrep -x "ssh-agent" > /dev/null; then     echo "[*] Starting ssh-agent..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     eval $(ssh-agent -s) | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"; fi
# Clone or pull repo
if [ -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; then     echo "[✓] Repo exists. Pulling latest..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git -C "$REPO_DIR" pull --rebase 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Pull failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; else     echo "[✓] Cloning repo..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git clone "$REPO_SSH" "$REPO_DIR" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Clone failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; fi
echo "[✓] Repo sync complete: $REPO_NAME"
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================
# Termux → Repo Sync (SSH Auto)
# ==========================
# Config
REPO_URL="git@github.com:FacePrintPay/your-repo.git"
REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_URL")
REPO_DIR="$HOME/$REPO_NAME"
LOG_DIR="$HOME/YesQuidLogs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
echo "[*] Starting repo sync for $REPO_NAME..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
# 1️⃣ Ensure Git is installed
if ! command -v git &>/dev/null; then     echo "[!] Git not found, installing..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     pkg install -y git | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"; fi
# 2️⃣ Ensure SSH key exists
if [ ! -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" ]; then     echo "[*] SSH key not found. Generating..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "your_email@example.com" -f "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" -N ""; fi
# 3️⃣ Start ssh-agent
eval $(ssh-agent -s) | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
ssh-add "$HOME/.ssh/id_ed25519" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"
# 4️⃣ Add GitHub to known hosts to avoid verification prompt
ssh-keyscan github.com >> "$HOME/.ssh/known_hosts" 2>/dev/null
# 5️⃣ Clone or pull the repo
if [ -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; then     echo "[✓] Repo exists. Pulling latest..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git -C "$REPO_DIR" pull --rebase 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Pull failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; else     echo "[✓] Cloning repo..." | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";     git clone "$REPO_URL" "$REPO_DIR" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log" || {         echo "[X] Clone failed!" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log";         exit 1;     }; fi
echo "[✓] Repo sync complete: $REPO_NAME" | tee -a "$LOG_DIR/repo_sync.log"

log "Branch: $BRANCH"

#!/bin/bash
# =========================================
# Script: clone_git_repo.sh
# Purpose: Create a directory and clone a GitHub repo into it
# =========================================
# Set your repo URL
REPO_URL="https://github.com/FacePrintPay"
# Set the target directory name (will be created in $HOME)
DIR_NAME="FacePrintPayRepo"
# Full path
TARGET_DIR="$HOME/$DIR_NAME"
# Check if directory already exists
if [ -d "$TARGET_DIR" ]; then     echo "Directory '$TARGET_DIR' already exists. Skipping creation."; else     echo "Creating directory '$TARGET_DIR'...";     mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"; fi
# Clone the repo into the directory
echo "Cloning GitHub repo into '$TARGET_DIR'..."
git clone "$REPO_URL" "$TARGET_DIR"
# Verify clone success
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then     echo "✅ Repo cloned successfully!"; else     echo "❌ Failed to clone repo. Check your internet connection and repo URL."; fi
ping google.com.
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==============================
# Termux Home → Obsidian Vault → GitHub
# ==============================
set -e
# Paths
TERMUX_HOME="$HOME"
OBSIDIAN_VAULT="/storage/emulated/0/Documents/Obsidian/AiKre8tive"
SNAPSHOT_DIR="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot"
LOG_FILE="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot.log"
BRANCH="${1:-main}"  # default branch
mkdir -p "$SNAPSHOT_DIR"
log() {     echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
log "=== Termux → Obsidian Snapshot Started ==="
# 1️⃣ Biometric Authentication
if command -v termux-biometric-auth &> /dev/null; then     AUTH_RESULT=$(termux-biometric-auth \
-t "Vault Sync Auth" \
-s "Authenticate to sync Termux home" \
-d "Verify your identity to proceed" 2>&1);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         log "✓ Biometric auth successful";     else         log "✗ Biometric auth failed";         exit 1;     fi; else     log "⚠ termux-biometric-auth not installed. Continuing without it."; fi
# 2️⃣ Copy Termux home to snapshot folder
log "📦 Copying Termux home to snapshot..."
rsync -a --delete "$TERMUX_HOME/" "$SNAPSHOT_DIR/"

#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==============================
# Termux Home → Obsidian Vault → GitHub
# ==============================
set -e
# Paths
TERMUX_HOME="$HOME"
OBSIDIAN_VAULT="/storage/emulated/0/Documents/Obsidian/AiKre8tive"
SNAPSHOT_DIR="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot"
LOG_FILE="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot.log"
BRANCH="${1:-main}"  # default branch
mkdir -p "$SNAPSHOT_DIR"
log() {     echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
log "=== Termux → Obsidian Snapshot Started ==="
# 1️⃣ Biometric Authentication
if command -v termux-biometric-auth &> /dev/null; then     AUTH_RESULT=$(termux-biometric-auth \
-t "Vault Sync Auth" \
-s "Authenticate to sync Termux home" \
-d "Verify your identity to proceed" 2>&1);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         log "✓ Biometric auth successful";     else         log "✗ Biometric auth failed";         exit 1;     fi; else     log "⚠ termux-biometric-auth not installed. Continuing without it."; fi
# 2️⃣ Copy Termux home to snapshot folder
log "📦 Copying Termux home to snapshot..."
rsync -a --delete "$TERMUX_HOME/" "$SNAPSHOT_DIR/"
pkg update && pkg upgrade -y
pkg install rsync git termux-api -y
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
# ==========================================
# Termux → Obsidian Vault → GitHub Sync (2025 Fix)
# ==========================================
set -e
# --------------------------
# Variables (UPDATE THESE)
# --------------------------
TERMUX_HOME="$HOME"  # Termux home
OBSIDIAN_VAULT="/storage/emulated/0/Documents/Obsidian/AiKre8tive"
SNAPSHOT_DIR="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot"
LOG_FILE="$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/TermuxSnapshot.log"
GIT_REMOTE="git@github.com:FacePrintPay/TermuxSnapshot.git"  # Update with your GitHub repo
BRANCH="${1:-main}"  # Default branch
# Create snapshot directory and log file
mkdir -p "$SNAPSHOT_DIR"
touch "$LOG_FILE"
# --------------------------
# Logging function
# --------------------------
log() {     echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"; }
log "=== Termux → Obsidian Snapshot Started ==="
# --------------------------
# Prevent Android killing process
# --------------------------
termux-wake-lock
# --------------------------
# Biometric Authentication
# --------------------------
if command -v termux-biometric-auth &> /dev/null; then     AUTH_RESULT=$(termux-biometric-auth \
-t "Vault Sync Auth" \
-s "Authenticate to sync Termux home" \
-d "Verify your identity to proceed" 2>&1);     if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then         log "✓ Biometric auth successful";     else         log "✗ Biometric auth failed";         exit 1;     fi; else     log "⚠ termux-biometric-auth not installed. Install pkg install termux-api and check permissions."; fi
# --------------------------
# Copy Termux home to snapshot (exclude problematic dirs)
# --------------------------
log "📦 Copying Termux home to snapshot..."
rsync -av --delete     --exclude 'TermuxWizard'     --exclude 'storage'     --exclude '.cache'     --exclude '.local/share'     "$TERMUX_HOME/" "$SNAPSHOT_DIR/"
cat > $HOME/STACK/source/sovereign_system.json <<'EOF'\
{\
"stack": "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM",\
"type": "orchestrator",\
"entrypoint": "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM/core/run.sh",\
"responsibility": [\
"execution control",\
"shell normalization",\
"agent lifecycle",\
"environment discovery"\
]\
}\
EOF\
cat > $HOME/STACK/source/planetary_agents.json <<'EOF'\
{\
"stack": "PlanetaryAgents",\
"type": "agent-runtime",\
"entrypoint": "PlanetaryAgents/bin/start_stack.sh",\
"responsibility": [\
"task execution",\
"planet-scoped agents",\
"failure/success routing",\
"background processing"\
]\
}\
EOF\
cat > $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -e\
\
STACK_DIR="$HOME/STACK/source"\
\
echo " Loading stacks from $STACK_DIR"\
\
for f in "$STACK_DIR"/*.json; do\
echo "  Loaded $(basename "$f")"\
done\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh\
bash $HOME/STACK/load_stacks.sh\
jq -e '.stack and .type and .entrypoint and .responsibility' "$f" >/dev/null\
cat > $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/usr/bin/env bash\
set -euo pipefail\
\
ROOT="$HOME"\
STACK_DIR="$ROOT/STACK/source"\
LOG_DIR="$ROOT/STACK/logs"\
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"\
\
echo " STACK BOOT   $(date)"\
echo " Stack source: $STACK_DIR"\
\
declare -A STACK_ENTRYPOINTS\
declare -a STACK_ORDER\
\
# -------------------------------\
# 1. DISCOVER + VALIDATE STACKS\
# -------------------------------\
for f in "$STACK_DIR"/*.json; do\
echo "⃦ Inspecting $(basename "$f")"\
\
jq -e '\
.stack\
and .type\
and .entrypoint\
and (.responsibility | type == "array")\
' "$f" >/dev/null || {\
echo "⃽ Invalid stack file: $f"\
exit 1\
}\
\
STACK=$(jq -r '.stack' "$f")\
ENTRY=$(jq -r '.entrypoint' "$f")\
\
STACK_ENTRYPOINTS["$STACK"]="$ENTRY"\
STACK_ORDER+=("$STACK")\
\
echo "⃼ Registered stack: $STACK"\
done\
\
# -------------------------------\
# 2. EXECUTION (ORCHESTRATOR FIRST)\
# -------------------------------\
run_stack () {\
local name="$1"\
local entry="$ROOT/${STACK_ENTRYPOINTS[$name]}"\
\
echo "⃺︃  Booting $name ⃦ $entry"\
\
if [[ ! -x "$entry" ]]; then\
echo "⃽ Entrypoint not executable: $entry"\
exit 1\
fi\
\
"$entry" >>"$LOG_DIR/$name.log" 2>&1 &\
echo "⃼ $name started (PID $!)"\
}\
\
# Sovereign system always first\
run_stack "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM"\
\
# Small delay so it claims control\
sleep 1\
\
# Everything else\
for s in "${STACK_ORDER[@]}"; do\
[[ "$s" == "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM" ]] && continue\
run_stack "$s"\
done\
\
echo " ALL STACKS ONLINE"\
echo " Logs in $LOG_DIR"\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh\
set +H\
echo 'set +H' >> ~/.zshrc\
source ~/.zshrc\
bash stack_up.sh\
ls -l /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\
ls -l $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh\
cd $HOME/STACK\
./stack_up.sh\
mkdir -p $HOME/bin\
cat > $HOME/bin/find_monorepo.sh <<'EOF'\
#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\
set -euo pipefail\
\
START="${1:-$HOME}"\
\
find "$START" -type f -name stack_up.sh 2>/dev/null | while read -r file; do\
root="$(dirname "$file")"\
echo "$root"\
exit 0\
done\
\
echo "⃽ MONOREPO NOT FOUND"\
exit 1\
EOF\
\
chmod +x $HOME/bin/find_monorepo.sh\
find_monorepo.sh\
find $HOME -type f -mtime -30 2>/dev/null\
/data/data/com.termux/files/home/AiKre8tive_ONE/monorepo\
cd /data/data/com.termux/files/home/AiKre8tive_ONE/monorepo\
ls -la\
./run.sh\
# or\
./stack_up.sh\
# or\
bash scripts/bootstrap.sh\
bash ./run_all_repos.sh\
LOGDIR="$HOME/last60_exec_logs"\
mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"\
\
find "$SCOPE" -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.bash" \) -mtime -60 2>/dev/null |\
while read -r file; do\
echo "⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴⃴"\
echo " Running: $file"\
\
chmod +x "$file" 2>/dev/null || true\
\
bash "$file" >"$LOGDIR/$(basename "$file").log" 2>&1 &\
echo "⃼ Launched (PID $\
done\
\
echo\
echo " EXECUTION COMPLETE"\
echo " Logs: $LOGDIR"\
awk -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '\
/^[0-9]+:/ { ts=$1; sub(/:/,"",ts) }\
ts >= d { print }\
' ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null\
awk -F';' -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '\
$1 >= d { print $2 }\
' ~/.zsh_history 2>/dev/null\
awk -F';' -v d="$(date -d '60 days ago' +%s)" '$1>=d{print $2}' ~/.zsh_history\
echo $SHELL\
cat > ~/.zshrc <<'EOF'\
# ================================\
# ZSH HISTORY + EXECUTION LOGGING\
# ================================\
\
# History file\
export HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"\
export HISTSIZE=100000\
export SAVEHIST=100000\
\
# History behavior\
setopt appendhistory\
setopt extendedhistory\
setopt sharehistory\
setopt incappendhistory\
setopt histignorealldups\
setopt histignorespace\
\
# Execution logger (forensics-grade)\
preexec() {\
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $(pwd) | $1" >> "$HOME/.exec.log"\
}\
EOF\
source ~/.zshrc\
echo "test-command"\
ls >/dev/null\
tail -n 5 ~/.exec.log\
tail -n 5 ~/.zsh_history\
mkdir -p ~/EVIDENCE/{fs,git,logs,network,hashes}\
uname -a > ~/EVIDENCE/system.txt\
id >> ~/EVIDENCE/system.txt\
date -Is >> ~/EVIDENCE/system.txt\
find $HOME \\
-type f \\
! -path "*/node_modules/*" \\
! -path "*/.git/*" \\
! -path "*/.cache/*" \\
-printf "%TY-%Tm-%Td %TH:%TM:%TS | %u | %p\n" \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/fs/files_timeline.txt\
find $HOME \\
-type f -perm -u+x \\
! -path "*/.git/*" \\
-exec stat --format="%y | EXEC | %n" {} \; \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/fs/executables.txt\
find $HOME -name ".git" -type d | while read g; do\
repo=$(dirname "$g")\
echo "=== $repo ==="\
git -C "$repo" log --pretty=format:"%H | %an | %ae | %ad | %s"\
done > ~/EVIDENCE/git/commit_history.txt\
grep -RIn \\
--exclude-dir=node_modules \\
--exclude-dir=.git \\
-E "VideoCourts|TotalRecall|Sovereign|PaTHos|AiKre8tive|FacePrint|CyGel|Planetary" \\
$HOME \\
> ~/EVIDENCE/fs/semantic_hits.txt\
ls -lah ~/.zsh_history ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null\
cp ~/.zsh_history ~/EVIDENCE/logs/ 2>/dev/null\
cat > $HOME/STACK/source/sovereign_system.json <<'EOF'\
{\
"stack": "SOVEREIGN_SYSTEM",\

cat > $HOME/STACK/stack_up.sh <<'EOF'\

# Sovereign system always first\

\

</html>
